subject: It all comes down to you, Peter.

| | | Peter, I really need you to read this.

**We are in SERIOUS DANGER of being outraised this quarter by the Democrats. They’ve received MILLIONS from corrupt billionaires like George Soros.**

The Democrats don’t care about the working class, they don’t care about you, they only care about themselves and their ultra-liberal donors who line their pockets with cash.

We’ve had ENOUGH. We’re not going to sit back and let the Democrats buy their way into another Senate Majority, but we desperately need your help and support.

**[Can we count on you to help us take back a Republican Senate Majority in 2024?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=d02fcc5103074402b335ce25cf97aa68&_e=OBVo3K-7wIKz2PMuXGqig2bCUHUBypi-Y84SzqIdftqI5FUBEKLstvPijndjdNN-AbOfTFmL8SNN4ku11PiH3ktg8fgrsRx-VxFsgeJ13ihxC4YyIQelnNkzxZj-kFmoWa2mLxMmoS2gvx33TdMrhd_6JunUZOULrfb97_8ZtkqC7JJPQqEXtDVu7dDj_oHozERbCI3aIyWud_tTEdGPt1aESybVYyhdhAKVucKlV76kf2mYJRI5wYN0QnW55_gz1Z8CWLrR6oYpRYTQ6j_pQqidML8C43ThGFn2Mn2r47MUa0JRjn6RpTu4NBruR5t0c8hv5DIO4LwoV74uZhun8iWKT3Cn2_as7m7_Yj3FcmE9L_li7A1z7JVtjXa4IGrl)**

Team, Social Security is at a _critical_ crossroads.
Rick Scott has been fighting _tooth and nail_ to take away vital funding for Social Security — a program that tens of millions of Americans depend on to make ends meet and retire in dignity. _He even wrote the plan to dismantle it himself. _
**What Scott doesn't understand is that, unlike him, most of us don't have nearly a _quarter of a billion dollars_ lying around — and that when he fights to dismantle Social Security, he's threatening the livelihoods of so many of the people he's tasked to serve and robbing them of the right to retire with the benefits they've earned. **
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is committed to protecting and expanding Social Security, not destroying it. **That’s why she’s running to defeat Scott and ensure that American families can depend on Social Security for years to come. **
[**But we need to know who you agree with — Debbie or Rick Scott. So, please, before our live poll closes at midnight, tell us:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74519702/441853007/60579448?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk383-su-nd&refcode=jtk383-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWJiMjQ1MjctNDE5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cjXxm76FKzaTj91igg7ylVRN3x6Bb8jZAPmDdkbdC5M=&emci=e3740869-6590-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=5bb24527-4192-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=3969733)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: More threats to repeal Obamacare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I was on the frontlines during the House fight to pass the ACA in 2010. I was there to defend it from Paul Ryan and the Tea Party. From Kevin McCarthy and the MAGA movement. And I’m not done fighting to expand health care — not by a long shot. Not until we’ve ensured universal health care for all.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4663%2E5257348%2EbKPZFw)
Derek —
Donald Trump just issued _another_ social media threat to repeal the _Affordable Care Act_ – which would revoke health care coverage for tens of millions of Americans.
Trump tried everything to repeal and sabotage Obamacare during his four years in office. Now, as the GOP frontrunner for the presidential nomination, he’s doubling down on his efforts to destroy it.
But Trump and every Republican leader and movement for the last dozen years has made it clear they have NO plan to provide coverage to millions of Americans.
**Not the Tea Party. Not the MAGA movement. The GOP has got _nothing._**
I was on the frontlines during the House fight to pass the ACA in 2010. I was there to defend it from Paul Ryan and the Tea Party. From Kevin McCarthy and the MAGA movement. **And I’m not done fighting to expand health care — not by a long shot. Not until we’ve ensured universal health care for _all._**
MAGA extremists in the Senate are ready to stand by Trump and rescind the _Affordable Care Act_. **We can’t let that happen** , and I will fight like hell in the Senate to protect and expand health care coverage.
[**Please join me in standing up to Trump and calling for the protection of the _Affordable Care Act_. Health care is a right — not a privilege. And in the richest nation in the world, we must have universal health care by passing Medicare for All.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202312-ACA-petition.hKo1Oy&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231203_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4663%2E5257348%2EbKPZFw)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202312-ACA-petition.hKo1Oy&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231203_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4663%2E5257348%2EbKPZFw)
---
Ever since its passage in 2010, Republicans have targeted Obamacare and threatened to “repeal and replace” the legislation. They’ve run for office on this platform — and lost. They’ve voted 100 times to repeal the act — failing each time.
For 13 years, Democrats in the Senate have protected the _Affordable Care Act_ , and I’m ready to take up the fight for millions of Americans who deserve the right to low-cost health care.
[**If you support Senate Democrats fighting to protect the _Affordable Care Act_ and making it universal with Medicare for All, add your name today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202312-ACA-petition.hKo1Oy&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231203_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4663%2E5257348%2EbKPZFw)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202312-ACA-petition.hKo1Oy&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231203_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4663%2E5257348%2EbKPZFw)
---
Thanks for raising your voice.
– Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3294?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231203_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=4663%2E5257348%2EbKPZFw)

---

clean_body: | = Peter, We’re looking for some advice! Your input is critical to every decision we make. We’re only able to do the work we do because folks like you support us — that’s why it’s critical we understand what issues you care about as we craft our strategy for the months ahead. We want to know what issues you discuss at your kitchen table and what keeps you up at night. And the most effective way to hear from all of you is with a brief survey. It won’t take more than a few moments, and the results will be invaluable. | We’re looking forward to reading your response. Thanks so much! name: Dom Jones for Assembly
subject: Major Stocking Stuffer Alert! 🎁 CADEM Backs Dom for Assembly AD72!
body:
Happy Holidays from the Dom Jones Team to our Orange County family.
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.domjones.org/so/80OmonbTf/c?w=lEVQ9v7PSX06ul5Uh0GjuWWs3TYqN14c8Lw649oarmQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG9tam9uZXMub3JnL3NvLzgwT21vbmJUZj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjUxYmIxNzQ0LTJhOTMtNDMwYy04YzQ3LTA4MDY4MDZkZDFjMiJ9)_**

# EXCITING NEWS!
# Dom Jones Endorsed by the
# California Democratic Party
---
| |
---
| | Dear Supporters, We are thrilled to share with you the exciting news that Dom Jones, the dynamic and passionate political candidate, has been officially endorsed by the California Democratic Party! This momentous endorsement was made official at the California Democratic Party Convention, which took place from November 17-19, 2023. The endorsement by the California Democratic Party is a significant recognition of Dom Jones' commitment to representing the people of State Assembly District 72 and working towards progressive change. This endorsement affirms Dom's dedication to democratic values, economic prosperity for the OC coastline, and social equality. With this endorsement, Dom Jones not only gains the support of the California Democratic Party but also joins a monumental network of activists, volunteers, and fellow candidates who are making a positive impact in our community.

clean_body: Happy Holidays from the Dom Jones Team to our Orange County family. | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | | EXCITING NEWS! Dom Jones Endorsed by the California Democratic Party | | | | Dear Supporters, We are thrilled to share with you the exciting news that Dom Jones, the dynamic and passionate political candidate, has been officially endorsed by the California Democratic Party! This momentous endorsement was made official at the California Democratic Party Convention, which took place from November 17-19, 2023. The endorsement by the California Democratic Party is a significant recognition of Dom Jones' commitment to representing the people of State Assembly District 72 and working towards progressive change. This endorsement affirms Dom's dedication to democratic values, economic prosperity for the OC coastline, and social equality. With this endorsement, Dom Jones not only gains the support of the California Democratic Party but also joins a monumental network of activists, volunteers, and fellow candidates who are making a positive impact in our community. | | | | | | | | Connect with us | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | This email was sent from .

It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.
**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.
It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/e/encryptedConfirmUnsubscribe?_r=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_s=7454f31be9814dbbbef942fa68def295&_t=4-ZsgIaSDj9UvLUoPY2DnFe25SGVbvnVqJyF8D1S-v0nTcUsXcar1CA3I9w0dg-tnY0MGrGDw7JdtefB5oJ1eA5PW5XhpvgdD4ft-G76tCj-ewowI5OyD8wgEunrj-NYTxZEa2Ht7XoRZ79gCjFJHflc2pHLvF6beLOm7OjEK9Y%3D)

subject: Biden's Digital Dollar Nightmare
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

FedNow The Start of Biden's Digital Dollar

On July 20th, 2023, the Federal Reserve launched FedNow, which
could spark the fuse for a Digital Dollar.

If a Digital Dollar happens, the government could:

Monitor every transaction…

Keep track of your spending habits…

And potentially control your individual choices…

Which MAY steal your freedoms in one way or another.

And if you don't plan for this now…

Your retirement savings could be at risk of being frozen,
hacked, or deleted.

So it makes sense why thousands of Americans are putting a
portion of their savings into physical gold and silver.

And right now, there's a unique IRS loophole that allows
Americans to add REAL, physical gold & silver to their IRA,
401(k), pension, TSP, or savings account that could help protect
from inflation, dollar devaluation and stock market chaos.

You could protect your money 100% tax and penalty-free, too.

All the details are laid out for you in this FREE 2024 Gold IRA
KIT.

In it you'll learn the easy, 3 step process to diversify your
retirement savings with gold & silver.

You have absolutely nothing to lose!

This information is 100% FREE!

THOUSANDS of Americans have already taken advantage of this IRS
LOOPHOLE and protected billions in retirement savings with gold &

But you'll want to act fast...

Because with Biden's long history of voting against

name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: Breaking: Biden intends to sign UN Gun Ban
body:
[unsubscribe](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx0z7vaoyoUANCn0ZKPDcilsDj_yeQ9uGjEAF420ejTzzfTT7-aFXodjALdDj0oCtJIMKadeuWHzhkwSmmvqDFBAqOj9OCMGUYZ2tgzyjgwKoAzDoYA-aHw_8-DKvkU_NejY42gNg979Lastu5xqcHGdBG_5Db1U61rw_9r2LNhz7pb_yb_0n8Mf34_qeEPeSPMCt9VulzYXnTQjnXTsNz52u16-gOlxa_DsW4yphtTeQ2QKZznNVLIy3Fpz4Ow6TMj3vNGF1UE8t2pw5RxlRGZXSYz2CXHzeCYGyaHODX88b6zLlhnue55Vm66Fc7HUS7cFHf2NbW5l52igivW7n1Yz5hSRKkaQV_ZxvQ3XvsvwU5oSglws5LziICenB82jxeZyqqpI7psFMioROAE5g__HQAA___VFoiY)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|

Dear Fellow Patriot,

The United Nations’ “Small Arms Treaty” has been the Gun Control Lobby’s crown jewel for decades.

They’ve been waiting for an anti-gun President, like Joe Biden, to take the White House **so they can launch an all-out effort to ratify it in the U.S. Senate**.

Now, they think they finally see their opportunity to _ram it through_!

But you and I have a chance to stop them cold -- **[as long as we take IMMEDIATE action to help dismantle this dangerous Treaty](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00LvWnCoYANCn0ZLFx93C4vxnMu-BgKKCMgJe5umzkj79rrbtle0kqNb1IDGITkDXtb53EoBwQaxmZmBmNISOmCmqrbOWdaqde4IJBYIZUEKhQ4B-MPz_88JSvBn99eKkYVhHd8xGb0mXY96L1XN4kNljG3pfSmrofw15N-RdDm1W9C_9x9D3XUJDX3yaLMYxU--Ic5dlo9V2cYvi2-2Gjzl9esYHaillOyFTSPwr5VCn-oSVuFWEk9jdnoeX4_FwfN9s3c10Ja7Eh1cZo09wO_7k097faszgbbkC0Lz7kvdrMpFjdxwdOM3uh14bdlu8VZ09Nuv4XaBqudeuEyE44NWN0BDhZt_Q1_qNastlEemIixz8V-blPLcnfyQd9OTb2AsuMaOStEdv0zWHMGchG4anqOfwd670N8qcKYwR0C6h65whG3RVsowP8ltSeEBq-2BAo2SWIlgq_R0AAP__aqKgXA)**.

As Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the email below, it’s absolutely critical we act now!

**Sincerely,

The Hon. Rand Paul
U.S. Senator (R-KY)**

* * *

Fellow Patriot,
**“BIDEN AIMS TO SIGN ON TO UN'S GLOBAL GUN REGISTRATION TREATY.”**
That was the headline in the _Washington Examiner_ shortly after President Biden’s State Department spokesman told international bureaucrats of “the continuing commitment of the United States” to the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” during the gun control Conference of State Parties in Geneva, Switzerland.

Just a few weeks later, President Biden himself spoke before the United Nations in New York City, stating: _“We’ll continue to uphold the long-standing rules and norms... Bedrock commitments,**like support for arms control measures** to reduce the risk and enhance transparency.”_ Fellow Patriot, anyone hoping that President Biden wouldn’t use his bully pulpit to RAM the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” down the throats of Americans just got those hopes CRUSHED.

The battle over implementation of the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” -- the crown jewel in the gun grabbers’ designs for the globe -- is about to reach a fever pitch.

**[That’s why I’m counting on you to please sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to tell your U.S. Senators “NO UN GUN BAN” at once](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00Dm2pCoAANDVaMhhkiEw-O9X1z5AUEGgECin1ffpzju_0TWjMJIj0dsRcYiYZEjKfh21pQIpZWcIMdKGEoO4kVQKTbAyzPZuxBAThCFFBBMkAQI_EP3_84KcvSn59RpwR6GKtrhJpaxacZ9mlAs3mD6xD-PaWu7Ifx1-d_jdipo28C_9x5D31UJHXsOyGAhjJavF1p6GzkYZb70Y0mX1PmkYN5bwd8lPKfwo7h7gJbK5RNIbOkQseNrZh-C1VpHLYGR5Up6ngv1dhPKl0RDkk4bI2NlCWM4dT5oqiikUriyr3CGf7YbQHpZd640_ys93Foym2Kb4cU5UdbWw31Ld80Q86jCzbu3Ia3uiSLV5lkv0XK8Pr_440l13TrRa1j6ObOCQEo77Mpp8uhBcZbyjcInKhb9zbbxAHaiAECAiMzgPh-oEzi_28w3WlAXUQKQdIjBzaghA_kt-BwAA__8k9Z8b)**!

As you’ll see, this survey insists that your U.S. Senators do everything in their power to oppose the UN “Small Arms Treaty” in the U.S. Senate.

_If there’s anything we’ve learned, it’s that globalists have been telling LIES about the supposed “need’ for the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” for years_.

From the beginning, gun grabbers have claimed the purpose of the Treaty is keeping arms out of the hands of terrorists, insurgents, rogue states, and gang members.

But at the very same time the Biden Administration was pledging their support for the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty,” they were leaving $83 BILLION in U.S. military weaponry to the Taliban!

They don’t care about keeping guns out of the hands of terrorists.

_They care about keeping guns out of the hands of law-abiding Americans_!

Reading through the details of the UN “Small Arms Treaty,” it’s hard to see how our Second Amendment could survive, if ratified.

For starters, the Treaty text demands the U.S. identify “end users” (gun buyers), document “the quantity, value, and model/type” of firearms and ammunition, and develop “national control standards” to regulate transfers.

_In other words, by design it’s an International Gun Registry that’ll include detailed information on American gun owners just like you -- the first step toward outright CONFISCATION_.

Worse, all that information would be made accessible by despots and foreign governments including the Treaty's largest signer -- Communist China.

**[As you can see, it’s vital you sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to your U.S. Senators demanding they reject this scheme](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00LvSnCAcQPGn0ZL5c1GgsMiXzb4HCgooiMJ6e_rMpk95Zn7V0Z3QkmNRmw5zwK1ssZS17QQFzYiSDRghWwqctEOjBiFF8y1cu44AoZgAw5RQLBFGP4B__7yAt29G_7waUjFQwexuUDGpsru1aOWWGw1rqJfOlpIq-qsi74q8y66GGf1Pfw19X2Wp6KuZJg0QMrWGGHNqNmqlvfGiiZfpt2FqhDyAHlyOR0y30ZalRRKIM-wzyE-a7g0Wd_e2p5j1wflhDWBcgYfkaJ_z2W7nP1lRcx1rEfPm0jKGyB7bwHowa4rdbJtHjOPJx3Vl4TrXp_g9XRPczhhpBlBDf4vjEsXv-KpIa5yt6Gt-goi5-DbtwfPePjz744h33jjt1WTr0LUNB0Y5qfdOp9Mti8strxhMQbnl37nSXSg3TAAgTGVC5-FwHtD5IX68kY1JQI9E3ACjkTNNEfYf-jcAAP__jnKfLw)**!

Once a nation signs on, the UN’s goal is to quickly impose “International Small Arms Control Standards” (ISACS) on them. Introductory language already includes: *** _Mandated national “screening” for those seeking to own guns_ , giving bureaucrats the final say on whether or not you’re “competent” enough to own a firearm; *** _Restrictive licensing for gun and ammo sales_ , and perhaps even bans on anything from semi-auto rifles to shotguns and handguns; *** _Restrictions on the number of guns and amount of ammo any “properly-licensed” individual may legally own_ ; *** _Bans on magazines holding more than ten rounds_ ; and *** _Bans on owning a firearm for self-defense_ \-- unless a citizen can somehow get government approval (which will only happen if you’re “connected” -- or paid half-a-million dollars for one of Hunter Biden’s paintings). Believe me, the United Nations has no intention of slow walking any of this.

To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand “utopian” designs.

Enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed, they’re pouring money into the UN “Small Arms Treaty” hand-over-fist.

_So, it’s no wonder why they’re hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it_!

**[I’m counting on you to help beat the UN by signing your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to your U.S. Senators](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00DnWpCoYANDVaMjhYyYweP-rrn0gg0KJA-JQrr5Pd975ja7rlNMSVOs7kBiEFqB1O3ZBcsJDD5xyrJT3vBcmYOmFAisYmDZ2BBMKBDOghIJGgH4w_P_zwlK8Gf314qRh2GRfojXzamqJS3UmTl9kl9xO3Vjr2tD_GvJuyLsWYz_oX_qPoe-7Tg198WFwGOedjp54fzkWnHHJJ8Xn29sTCjB2PNnIbw8X2DsXt_Xb50l31tN6zXXclrPYet6PTBLczstqSyx6p2HQeTFXUB8VCUi3DsuRihWC3m5yTz_ZrIU7VpbmE_fugDNe06ac2-4kdLieI9GPUyoQNu83qR40D-R2DRE-jg19fZ6s5r0msZacZD8-ck_nOX_3TdLeDGObO8ElZlSStnRuveI0xV3IhuEhmzj9navdjXbOFMYIqF7RdUbYLboOksIXjfOqcI_UvGFAQTJHEaSD_g4AAP__RSqffg)**.

As soon the gun grabbers have 67 votes to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate, you can bet Biden’s pal, Sen. Chuck Schumer, will call for the vote.

But we can’t wait until then to fight back because even now, one-world bureaucrats are pushing these gun controls deep into every part of government.

_On top of Biden’s ATF anti-gun executive actions, a headline from _The Hill_ shows how “Democrats’ latest backdoor plan to limit gun ownership” involves new State Department “sanctions” designed to drive the price of ammo by BANNING imports_.

That’s the same State Department which NAGR caught red-handed trying to siphon your tax dollars into funding the UN “Small Arms Treaty.”

_Worse, since day one of the COVID-19 outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it’s under the guise of “public health_.”

So now Biden’s Center for Disease Control (CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that says _“Using a public health approach is essential to addressing firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy.”_

That’s why insisting that your U.S. Senators OPPOSE the ratification of the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” is not enough.

We must insist that the U.S. Senate ensures that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent by Biden on implementing any part of this Treaty or what it stands for.

But I’m counting on your help to send that message -- before it’s too late.

**[First, please sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY to tell your U.S. Senators “NO UN GUN BAN” at once](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00D2apCoUANDVaMjHvSBoYPD61dQ-QEBQQUpof3r1883kk5_omLE3g4S-tSNICmIQMAytHx0id4wDCmutNJxj54Rmmom-18qJNoxIkQFSDgwZDATIF4X_v15Uijdnv14dNpyqaI8wqZRVPcJejQrbQ6Y9ttvoa80N-6_Bd4PveqhpJf_Sfwx733Vr2KubZ0NpLMxbtPYy3BllFrv0XbrtdMIl4PB7Ute374p0a6cmy44nqLhu2x7vO65UDAnE7We9pnC7CTX6O2U3-L2iM-h9MPKCbJ2k4rxU3fXy2KHyOu3FQqV8D2c1PA9a3bb7KOBr3NCtWOgt2ZNT-egUOSzzTLP2DQobfMNe60_sU6mLyEdcpPY_siznmZ7ykUyr2bdxFJ2knElsj9HkK2xbKEI2nM5Rhe3vXB1vUjreU0qADZlcZ4AykesbF_cQn3JPNenThwJxkhtGYPlmvwMAAP___qefIQ)**.

Second, please agree to your most generous contribution to help the National Association for Gun Rights mobilize a grassroots firestorm against the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” -- using everything from _U.S. Mail_ , to _phones_ , to _email_ , _blogs_ , and _guest editorials_ , _hard-hitting video_ and even _paid media_ if we can raise resources.

If at all possible, I’m hoping you’ll agree to $100.

I know that’s a lot to ask for, believe me. But the fight is here, Fellow Patriot. It’s on. There’s no time to wait.

**[But if $100 is just too much -- even given the urgency of the situation -- please agree to $30, or at least $15 TODAY](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00D32nCocANDVOCWHH59SWLz_m8w-VFBBUAREndXnJH36W13dtVpJaF-mA4lBKAFKvZaOS80HTY3BPQxKYcUx41wJwc1kOG1ftiOYUCCYASUUFAL0g-H_nzeW4sPorzcnDcN9MMmO_Rb7kuxedG_9g8Y9vHy3lBIb-l9DPg35lNSPK_qX_mPo5y6-oW-28E0E2CefBndep7nvFeYHTBhCMq0pRLcpR6rwlawLtNYt8jhrhyHdhD63Xkxwe_YkUKNqIMezBr_mENk4sRXO_ODg2cjzvNg5PQeritTxG5IiaVj1Oo2lH7HMfbLreFATnD83Hl3yo9yzGYxoSTSVL6EetR1WuM_92PEeznLAnQWZ5wJaJ324S_I88YYIY5eGvtdvaLdcnIgpODksX5ldrduTD0mHfl5eoRNcYkYleaVOx8t6b7OQDcNz6K3_G1u6G2XOWowRUBXRVS3kEV0ncdODli22eEDtdmBAk2SaInAn_R0AAP__0RGsBQ)**.

Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY. There’s no time to waste.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights**

P.S. Reports say the Biden Administration will be signing on to the UN “Small Arms Treaty” any day, setting up an all-out fight over ratification and implementation here in the United States.

Please help fight back.

**[So will you please sign your OFFICIAL FIREARMS SOVEREIGNTY SURVEY IMMEDIATELY along with your most generous contribution of $100 TODAY](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00Dm2pCoAANDVaMhhHgKD_3517QOZhFJEwalW36c77_xG1w7SKoFk7wYkIOKKI6X6afBSeaGkUox6RZzThniJFUFKQESh6-OAISYIQ4oIJkgBBH4g-v_nBQV_U_LrxXBHoV7cHo3ORbc9rs3qOD_ArEs_D1NrpSP_dfjd4XfbtfmAf-k_hrzvNnfkxUKwEC6VTA47d1nqrbbJJcny7cyJwh7xZcq4ZFHkBb-Rj8dU542ZdZ-VZY6jvMdK61NorpEnnuuz-rQrydIRTkoeZmU7bv08Zvpoq0YSPjL6Om_wOaEn2hz790amwDFP4fzotgh4lXs9WfMBh9ICvbkd19tivs2JdZi7OHXk9fkuMteWeNmXJMbpK2o6z_zUTZBRh6lfBs4EpETgfh9sueI8x8pFR2FYdJz_zrXhBpVRCSFARBVwnRFVA64DJ_-AKRcJRyDzBhHwgloCUDrI7wAAAP__yLOfhw)**?

**[Whatever you can give, even just $30 or $15 will go a long way towards helping NAGR defeat this unconstitutional Treaty once and for all](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00DvWnSoYANDRaMni8QlSWNz_npx5oKKAoCj4YvRZSZ9-V3vs2lEK0ta6IwITLjmRsjYdGZlU7TDBgCnXoHEzMj2qhtCJCw1TbTuKKSMUA2GUEYkI-sHk_58PFvwL7NenoRVgFfRhB7VGlQ-75VFZ_6JhC7XvTM6xYv9V9FvRbz7UsKB_6T-GfZ_sK_YB06w8kG3yR-_O-9TPs5D5JTr04dCt7h8Pt-CmYW5hpyYZ7NyWeaIDKbQ8F7ixT-ExrzcJ01Ndlnt5zXaPm7Nh54VFiCksYXuuveVyuu81BQNaOrj3qSyLGl5_skVxTteZ2URP4t04A04S7D032eI4DCZNbWmcMuUMEJdGU7n1oaTzglfnItJMjuwdxLeiXFtTsc9SQrum7Hg8ghO9KSK561rftAvWq9nUoeONwMAErY9ujLf13iYuKsBzUNb_jc3dg1IDLcaIMBnRfVmSBnSf1E0vMmtscY_adccETQJGhog72e8AAAD__4l0rDY)**.

clean_body: Please read the message below from our sponsor. Steve Thompson, Editor | | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, The United Nations’ “Small Arms Treaty” has been the Gun Control Lobby’s crown jewel for decades. They’ve been waiting for an anti-gun President, like Joe Biden, to take the White House so they can launch an all-out effort to ratify it in the U.S. Senate. Now, they think they finally see their opportunity to ram it through! But you and I have a chance to stop them cold -- . As Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights, explains in the email below, it’s absolutely critical we act now! Sincerely, The Hon. Rand Paul U.S. Senator (R-KY) Fellow Patriot, “BIDEN AIMS TO SIGN ON TO UN'S GLOBAL GUN REGISTRATION TREATY.” That was the headline in the Washington Examiner shortly after President Biden’s State Department spokesman told international bureaucrats of “the continuing commitment of the United States” to the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” during the gun control Conference of State Parties in Geneva, Switzerland. Just a few weeks later, President Biden himself spoke before the United Nations in New York City, stating: “We’ll continue to uphold the long-standing rules and norms... Bedrock commitments,like support for arms control measures to reduce the risk and enhance transparency.” Fellow Patriot, anyone hoping that President Biden wouldn’t use his bully pulpit to RAM the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” down the throats of Americans just got those hopes CRUSHED. The battle over implementation of the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” -- the crown jewel in the gun grabbers’ designs for the globe -- is about to reach a fever pitch. ! As you’ll see, this survey insists that your U.S. Senators do everything in their power to oppose the UN “Small Arms Treaty” in the U.S. Senate. If there’s anything we’ve learned, it’s that globalists have been telling LIES about the supposed “need’ for the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” for years. From the beginning, gun grabbers have claimed the purpose of the Treaty is keeping arms out of the hands of terrorists, insurgents, rogue states, and gang members. But at the very same time the Biden Administration was pledging their support for the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty,” they were leaving $83 BILLION in U.S. military weaponry to the Taliban! They don’t care about keeping guns out of the hands of terrorists. They care about keeping guns out of the hands of law-abiding Americans! Reading through the details of the UN “Small Arms Treaty,” it’s hard to see how our Second Amendment could survive, if ratified. For starters, the Treaty text demands the U.S. identify “end users” (gun buyers), document “the quantity, value, and model/type” of firearms and ammunition, and develop “national control standards” to regulate transfers. In other words, by design it’s an International Gun Registry that’ll include detailed information on American gun owners just like you -- the first step toward outright CONFISCATION. Worse, all that information would be made accessible by despots and foreign governments including the Treaty's largest signer -- Communist China. ! Once a nation signs on, the UN’s goal is to quickly impose “International Small Arms Control Standards” (ISACS) on them. Introductory language already includes: * Mandated national “screening” for those seeking to own guns , giving bureaucrats the final say on whether or not you’re “competent” enough to own a firearm; Restrictive licensing for gun and ammo sales , and perhaps even bans on anything from semi-auto rifles to shotguns and handguns; Restrictions on the number of guns and amount of ammo any “properly-licensed” individual may legally own ; Bans on magazines holding more than ten rounds ; and Bans on owning a firearm for self-defense \-- unless a citizen can somehow get government approval (which will only happen if you’re “connected” -- or paid half-a-million dollars for one of Hunter Biden’s paintings). Believe me, the United Nations has no intention of slow walking any of this. To them, your Second Amendment freedoms are a threat to their grand “utopian” designs. Enemies like Red China are so eager to see every American disarmed, they’re pouring money into the UN “Small Arms Treaty” hand-over-fist. So, it’s no wonder why they’re hell-bent on forcing the U.S. to submit to this globalist gun control scam -- and why we must defeat it! . As soon the gun grabbers have 67 votes to ratify the Treaty in the U.S. Senate, you can bet Biden’s pal, Sen. Chuck Schumer, will call for the vote. But we can’t wait until then to fight back because even now, one-world bureaucrats are pushing these gun controls deep into every part of government. On top of Biden’s ATF anti-gun executive actions, a headline from The Hill shows how “Democrats’ latest backdoor plan to limit gun ownership” involves new State Department “sanctions” designed to drive the price of ammo by BANNING imports. That’s the same State Department which NAGR caught red-handed trying to siphon your tax dollars into funding the UN “Small Arms Treaty.” Worse, since day one of the COVID-19 outbreak, our court system has said yes to almost any politician cooking up any unconstitutional idea so long as it’s under the guise of “public health.” So now Biden’s Center for Disease Control (CDC) is pushing a new Euro-centric gun control framework that says “Using a public health approach is essential to addressing firearm violence and keeping people safe and healthy.” That’s why insisting that your U.S. Senators OPPOSE the ratification of the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” is not enough. We must insist that the U.S. Senate ensures that NOT ONE TAXPAYER CENT is spent by Biden on implementing any part of this Treaty or what it stands for. But I’m counting on your help to send that message -- before it’s too late. . Second, please agree to your most generous contribution to help the National Association for Gun Rights mobilize a grassroots firestorm against the UN’s “Small Arms Treaty” -- using everything from U.S. Mail , to phones , to email , blogs , and guest editorials , hard-hitting video and even paid media if we can raise resources. If at all possible, I’m hoping you’ll agree to $100. I know that’s a lot to ask for, believe me. But the fight is here, Fellow Patriot. It’s on. There’s no time to wait. . Whatever you can do, please act IMMEDIATELY. There’s no time to waste. For Freedom, Dudley Brown President National Association for Gun Rights P.S. Reports say the Biden Administration will be signing on to the UN “Small Arms Treaty” any day, setting up an all-out fight over ratification and implementation here in the United States. name: Robertson For Congress
subject: The Open Border Makes All Problems Worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
| | | |
---
# The Open Border Makes All Problems Worse
# By Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District
---
Open borders exacerbate many difficulties regular Americans face each day. Problems like crime, healthcare, drugs, inflation, our national debt, poor-performing schools, and countless others. Illegal immigration makes things much worse for you and all Nevadans.
Every person who enters our Country illegally costs American taxpayers more than $10,000 a year. That money is spent on social programs to house, feed, educate, and provide medical care. Since President Biden took office, ten million people have entered our country illegally. Simple math translates to an annual cost of $100 billion dollars ($10,000 x 10,000,000,000 = $100,000,000,000). That's right! One hundred billion dollars every year! We don't have that money, so we must borrow it, adding to our national debt and driving up inflation. You pay this cost in higher taxes and higher prices for everything you buy.
Have you been to a hospital emergency room lately? If so, you probably had to wait in a long line. Illegal immigration is making these lines much longer. Criminals who break our laws to enter our country go to the emergency room for all their healthcare needs. And, of course, they do not pay for the care they receive. As a result, you pay more for healthcare and wait longer to receive it.
Less than half of Nevada's school children are performing at grade level. Illegal immigration has made this problem much worse. Teachers must accommodate non-English speaking children. The school district must hire translators and specialists to work with these students. Diverting funds, teachers, and resources from the children of tax-paying Nevadans means our children don't get the education they need and deserve.
Crime is rising in Southern Nevada and across the country. Thousands of criminals have crossed our porous southern border. Mexican cartels freely operate in the United States. They bring with them a plethora of crimes, including drugs, guns, gangs, murder, burglary, shoplifting, and human trafficking, not to mention the potential for terrorist acts. Innocent Americans are subjected to rising risk of loss, injury, and death, while scarce law enforcement resources are diverted away from protecting you and your family.
Securing our borders won't fix all Americans' challenges, but it will make them more manageable. As your Representative in Congress, I will fight to secure the border and enforce current laws. I will work with others to create an immigration system that only allows people into our country who can support themselves and make an immediate contribution to our Country.
The Biden Era of open borders must end! That goes for "Ridin with Biden" Dina Titus as well.
---
---
Southern Border Crisis
---

******* Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: Do you support voters having to present identification at the polls? -M.R. A. Yes. The vast majority of Nevadans support voter ID. It only makes sense. What doesn't make sense is elected officials who ignore the people's will. This is a State issue. I encourage all Nevadans to contact their State Senators and Assembly Representatives to voice their strong support for voter ID.
Q. What is your stance on ballot harvesting and early and universal mail-in voting? -N.A. A. Currently the law in Nevada permits ballot harvesting and universal mail-in voting. Both provisions are ripe for abuse. This must be addressed at the State legislature. As a Nevadan, I advocate ending the practices. it should be easy to vote and impossible to cheat. Voter ID is the answer. Mail-in ballots should only be sent to voters with a specific reason to request one (such as service members serving overseas and people confined to home care or a care facility). Until the law is changed, Republicans must take advantage of these provisions legally. In the last election, I won the in-person voting by 20 points, but Titus won the ballot harvested/mail-in vote by 30 points. The Clark County Republican Party must organize the effort to get out the vote, including early voting and helping voters fill out and turn in their ballots.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Joe Biden's a mockery of democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9475b4672f0cafeb40142eaaef3533aa7d20c9b92244e21659a66e10f6bc3bcb3ab0f1533f45833ea2b87f52ab618b940391aa0de00bcae580082157d8a1be2ecabf8110ae71c196ba2ac10bf5bc38f4

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=250a692d26443c008db37cdd9f6f7460139b48d8f1ba7df95d216972a267a9e0fd99afdc7b8fbd8620be6ed25cbfc2b0bff899b8257b5d7a5e9ca89a0e974cad

Friend,

The lies coming from the Left at the Red vs. Blue debate last week were ludicrous. While Ron DeSantis showcased a blueprint for freedom, Gavin Newsom stood on that stage making a mockery of our democracy.

Newsom really tried to convince you that Joe Biden is at the top of his game... You and I BOTH know that is an outrageous lie.

Here’s the truth: Joe Biden is well past his prime. He’s asleep at the wheel while our nation faces crisis after crisis. You saw it firsthand when Hamas attacked Israel, you're seeing it in your wallet with Bidenomics, and you’re seeing it at our border.

We need a President who is going to fight for you, win for all of us, and lead our American comeback. The only one capable of that is Ron DeSantis. He’s done it as Governor. Under his blueprint for freedom, we can trust that he WILL get the job done... if he earns your support.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=250a692d26443c008db37cdd9f6f7460139b48d8f1ba7df95d216972a267a9e0fd99afdc7b8fbd8620be6ed25cbfc2b0bff899b8257b5d7a5e9ca89a0e974cad
Rush in $5, $10, $15, or any amount you can afford today to support Governor DeSantis!

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=250a692d26443c008db37cdd9f6f7460139b48d8f1ba7df95d216972a267a9e0fd99afdc7b8fbd8620be6ed25cbfc2b0bff899b8257b5d7a5e9ca89a0e974cad

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=250a692d26443c00ccd2a6bc214f9c7b213599951413e372fc230b6a5f0373f41bbc161818dae7a4ae1be3b2ae4043e6399c8f2ca07c49ce720dd1f109757c23
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=250a692d26443c008db37cdd9f6f7460139b48d8f1ba7df95d216972a267a9e0fd99afdc7b8fbd8620be6ed25cbfc2b0bff899b8257b5d7a5e9ca89a0e974cad

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=250a692d26443c008db37cdd9f6f7460139b48d8f1ba7df95d216972a267a9e0fd99afdc7b8fbd8620be6ed25cbfc2b0bff899b8257b5d7a5e9ca89a0e974cad

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, The lies coming from the Left at the Red vs. Blue debate last week were ludicrous. While Ron DeSantis showcased a blueprint for freedom, Gavin Newsom stood on that stage making a mockery of our democracy. Newsom really tried to convince you that Joe Biden is at the top of his game... You and I BOTH know that is an outrageous lie. Here’s the truth: Joe Biden is well past his prime. He’s asleep at the wheel while our nation faces crisis after crisis. You saw it firsthand when Hamas attacked Israel, you're seeing it in your wallet with Bidenomics, and you’re seeing it at our border. We need a President who is going to fight for you, win for all of us, and lead our American comeback. The only one capable of that is Ron DeSantis. He’s done it as Governor. Under his blueprint for freedom, we can trust that he WILL get the job done... if he earns your support. Rush in $5, $10, $15, or any amount you can afford today to support Governor DeSantis! In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead. If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win. Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. ---
Friend, pesticide corporations want you to ignore their devastating impact on our planet. **But nearly 50% of U.S. honeybee colonies PERISHED last year, and neonics are largely to blame. Frantic beekeepers worked tirelessly to help their colonies survive, but the massive bee DIE-OFFS won’t stop unless we take action.**
Here’s the problem: Neonics are the most widely used insecticides in the entire world. They’re **NEUROTOXIC to our precious bees and wreak havoc on our ecosystems** – contaminating our soil and water for miles around. **But our farming system still uses MILLIONS of pounds of these chemicals every single year! The pesticide industry’s chokehold on our farming system is so strong that even the seeds of our major crops are coated with neonics.**
It’s worse than you think, friend. **Studies show little to no benefit to farmers of coating seeds with neonics.** Instead, it’s putting the future of our food system at risk! Communities worldwide could pay the price by losing access to nutritious, pollinator-dependent foods like fruits, nuts and vegetables as bee populations continue to decline. And to make matters worse, neonics have also been linked to developmental defects in babies.
**But chemical companies have a powerful lobby fighting to hide the truth and allow them to keep control. They’re spending MILLIONS on targeted misinformation campaigns to deceive farmers and consumers and downplay the fact that their toxic products, like neonics, POISON our bees and harm our health!** Even more, ecological farming solutions already exist that could protect pollinators and our planet. But the pesticide lobby is **suppressing the urgent bee-saving solutions we need!**
**We MUST fight back to get neonics OUT of our farm fields and to protect our pollinators, our communities and our planet before it’s too late. We urgently need 22 more activists from your area to speak out before 11:59 p.m. tonight – but we're still missing your response! Tell us now:**
| | **Should pesticide corporations be held accountable for DEVASTATING bee die-offs?**

([See Photo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAQhp8Gd45gwGAXFNFF6XLSSSdtaREYB1bYeDHJbpp99lVwu9X8o1_fJ828XcaLCTEst79mRl2mNBpbwgNHBq1ogY-icXpCBOQNaqYok0OvetF4TaW9UtsrRiUyIRyKTkkKchiGfrIGmqCBAmdABaPdILqDU5NxtuecqU6yHomg6EJJ-fCewlI8TvGZHpgPNs1N1L6UdSP8SOBM4Lzdl4w2Zbe9agLnOcQY0tK6FKPJ7cfd5IKldWhb0bKhk5XjhB-_CT8W_CqEn_57JNABvexwzacqqPHfLqk5bAT-ePPYAW_WFRd0dbk-61jveS-tN4vFJmu3fr7Em1RE0NtsQqy3lF8_-xMAAP__EGV1NA)) If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can take care of that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQANCvgS3WwWEgA0OlyFPdtaOFzWFfi-3Ioan691XVMdnf9N77oY9ceJvf4kqh5n2IU-U7DUqfzEnjYGQKmUgTSgrKgbJn77yRSxhjO9rJUUYAN0afMiq0KbdGAY7JSw4aNCoNRkF7Nm2TXI5p8ojKtVZ5EgYocd2P5mPnrS6Uy89-p6OZ9lWWsNR6vQl8EboTunskQnd9nHl65e3zz2BHAi_p-s2l8M06YWBeI5d_a7_qKvBiQB7huZH1acBvAAAA__8-gFte). ## House Plans Vote on Biden Impeachment
House Speaker Mike Johnson said the House could vote as early as this week to launch a [formal impeachment inquiry](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQAL8Gd0R4wQYXFK9xl9deaRFYwkYYcoYkyt-fLvV1I00x0nydt7OjTOX63-1oe6yb852euI3AFQe5qSHYiAgoB7SjFuO8GG3UkOyk9UUZtUTj9WWGKLyefQQj5QRGmmkgCwLkCEKNYlrUdAo6uuCNlKOe5tEgUwID9XqcbpVKTxjzuz7xOPm6D9mm3u-NyX8MVgZrT5go51_HYE11x4Kv9sFHQwarknIRs-S3mkqrhV8oYOG039H5tGPpnMr3g443f9aO3NdyPbA1qsVlHh79zWAdDhvuL8qZ2qyZEtfd0Sc59D_n_AQAAP__lmxmlQ) into President Joe Biden over financial improprieties. Johnson said the formal inquiry is necessary because "_we 're being stonewalled by the White House._" He says he believes he has [enough Republican votes ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAUAL8Gd1jmgQ0pXFzjLtdeaRF4hJdg8BkuVu7rV7vacuvRSKP5c12vlhLl-2-74dxCWa1r9MJVAFcc5Ko6PwdEQNnhLPQgpovRRnVxhuAmGG7CenFxxkglg_GjDsJKr4U3Hc0wgBQwKDGMFzX2XgfrnZFS6HESBpka0FMrR_8olFvEkN7lhUfvytalOba2VyZ_MVgYLOd59vnmMp71kzNY9pKokasMlkdBfiOPmcFSd7RPPPhGT-SPEnMtmVf7rrxFys_KX6Vh5fZfi-Wg_98ip21H6-KGuXHKf_nhshWg9QjdMfv9pJSoTpqp4b5ZSl-N7cdjHwEAAP__tRtvoQ)to pass the measure and doesn't expect to get any votes from Democrats. The White House denies Biden did anything wrong and has called the investigation illegitimate because a full House vote hasn't [formalized it.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOhCAURb8GOww8ULSg2MZutt3SMPAY3wTBCBkzf7-Zrbe51U3Oyfm5rTdHifLj2-1oWyyr841euErgmoNadRdsRARUHVpphBznyUy626y7x0nMEcUwuhAnBdKPPs5muHsJysWOLAhQEoSWYpj10AcTXfCTUtIMo5yQaYGBWjn7Z6HcNozpXV549r7sXbJba0dl6ovBwmC5rqs_SqJGvnwODJaMV2WwfCgMFgkMFvGZZ9lyLZnTfqDz24658VdpyKlyxzN6rNWdb14bHlwICbMZdHfacFyUEtXRMC0eu6P0Z9L-7fIbAAD__7YVYtc)
## U.S. Warship Opens Fire in Self-Defense
The warship USS _Carney_ [opened fire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2P4yAUAH-N3RHxaXBBcU26XHul9QyP8G7xh4BNlP31q2y95Wia0fy7LTegQvv9L2zoezoWCJ0euAjJNJNq0WP0CVGiGtELy8U0O-v0mH2alUFYIQW5ojQyKgjRSOuim4Sx80hecqmE5FpwM2tziTZBDE4pYc0kHA6aY6R-1Mv_g_aeMZXX8cB6Ccc2Fp97P9ug_gzyOsgrnDs-21u9oXYKBQd5rRhZQ2D5-OyZ2As33FnLdDYGvUP4YNQqYGEZNmjsCZXd4QtY65VOZsVkLU8crONi4jjDinF2UQXt0hpxrD6eTyqF2mQHze8bUPnJ67_O-g4AAP__FuZreQ) at Houthi drones in the Red Sea as nearby commercial ships came under attack in an hours-long assault by Yemeni rebels. Several drones also approached the _Carney _and were shot down. The attack marked an escalation in the maritime attacks related to the war in Gaza as multiple vessels found themselves targets of a single rebel assault for the first time in the conflict. The U.S. military's Central Command said that the attacks "[are fully enabled by Iran](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1urDAQRp_GdEb-A0xBcRu6vW1KNGuPl0kMtmzvorx9tKnTfcUnnaPzcdtuQJHOx384cGkhbeAavXCTihuu9GY6vwREhbrDRU5CjrOdrOn2JaAJYnReG-0tChXA4jzLux8FeCuHjhYllJZKGCmG2Qy9nwJ4Z7WW0zBKi8wI9NRS6T8TnW3HEL_TC0vv0tHFZW8tV6b_MbUytV7X1ecUqZFL7wNT64lXZWp9U5hapWJqFe_15JW3vSA0PCuHnEvKhaAhL1hzOitWDqFh4VTg5HdwX-g51ArP2Hg6uUvHgcURRF53ypULIdVs5dyVxeeLYqQ6TsyIxwEUf3Xbn_F-AgAA__961nDy)." No U.S. injuries were reported on the Carney, a guided-missile destroyer ([see photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu6yAUANCvwRsILhjwwJDFW56e2qGjReES02ATGRorf9-lY7_gSOfjulx9Lnm__fMbup7q4kPPT1wEUEVBLmqILiECygGdMFzoyRqrhtUh59OnQKM4jkKrZLTmdlI6TTaqmGDIDjhIAVwJPk5qZNEkH4OVUphRC4tEcYy514N91bz3FVN51SceLNRtKG7t_dGIvBCYCcznebLoc3ltPhcWKvu-E5h3PBuB2R89h4JUgAUOWhKY_-Pe_a3u9LLhkYPf6emPtuYHfWJrWBr1vftwp28Y6Tt6tvatDIeLjzOXkps2RPHbL7YN_c-cnwAAAP__YqxluA)). The Yemeni rebels, backed by Iran, have been targeting Israel as well as tankers and other vessels in the Red Sea.
## College Playoff Teams Set, FSU Left Out
The final four college football championship contenders have been chosen, but not without controversy. The teams are [Michigan, Washington, Texas and Alabama](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGunDAQRb_GdIPMGAxbUKSh27Qp0WCPwdGAEXaW7N9Hm_Lp1fdK5-j8es5PihKP9SftPJaQZnIlvnhuEFpAM7eVHwMzsql4bHrd2MfQD221jT373rBFWozV3lp02iNb7zo9WG-piiNqNA3qttHdo-1q3wfybjCm6TvbDKxazT6WdNW_UzzKxkHe6cVX7dJeybiVcmZlfiicFE73fdduyflMV8mfh8LJJRFeGUJKZSERhdPBd1Y4fcjwdYZT6J1CgCXdAivtnGGPbosrHXBT3uKxlnRA4b-UgYQW2glCFIGQ_lxQmHYIkcUrnKpr9OcdRWK2vWr1ulOU_-bl247_AgAA___KB3ek), who will begin the playoffs on Jan 1. Alabama, 12-1, is in by virtue of its upset victory over No. 1-ranked Georgia, which hadn't lost a game in two years. Texas, also 12-1, made the cut because it defeated Alabama earlier in the year. Left out is Florida State, 13-0, passed over because their starting quarterback is injured. It's the first time in modern college playoff history that an undefeated Power 5 champion failed to make the playoff. You can see the [FSU team's reaction here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2L4zAQQH-N3CVIM_qwCxUHwU1I4CDk4BqjSKNEh20Fey4m_37Z3XbLx2se789pOIUylvl-DhN5znUIkcuLBgU7vQMcdJN8JgLChrxyUtmuda1uHj6afJPZ3AJKMpYUkIkhqpRctCpH1xQPElCB1EqaTpt9cjmk2CIqZ6xqSWhJqXBd9v9qmflBeXzXFy37WKdm9A_m5yrwl4BeQM9bYf52Avr1WRdeI81Myydy4P-rgF45VGhb6JSWnZFgLQrsV4EHbQVYFniY4Hq-HKeN39d6sdvfo42H-Xez-PTcyjiW1Tqh5X0KZfwK4R-3fAQAAP__Hztg-A)

clean_body: House Speaker Mike Johnson said the House could vote as early as this week to launch a formal impeachment inquiry into President Joe Biden over financial improprieties. | | | | | | MONDAY, DECEMBER 4, 2023 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1956, the "million-dollar quartet" of Elvis Presley, Johnny Cash, Jerry Lee Lewis, and Carl Perkins met by chance at Sun Records and taped their impromptu jam session. () If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . Today's edition is brought to you by The Wand, a brilliant invention that reduces allergic reactions (including headaches) to drinking wine. | House Plans Vote on Biden Impeachment House Speaker Mike Johnson said the House could vote as early as this week to launch a into President Joe Biden over financial improprieties. Johnson said the formal inquiry is necessary because "we 're being stonewalled by the White House." He says he believes he has pass the measure and doesn't expect to get any votes from Democrats. The White House denies Biden did anything wrong and has called the investigation illegitimate because a full House vote hasn't U.S. Warship Opens Fire in Self-Defense The warship USS Carney at Houthi drones in the Red Sea as nearby commercial ships came under attack in an hours-long assault by Yemeni rebels. Several drones also approached the Carney and were shot down. The attack marked an escalation in the maritime attacks related to the war in Gaza as multiple vessels found themselves targets of a single rebel assault for the first time in the conflict. The U.S. military's Central Command said that the attacks "." No U.S. injuries were reported on the Carney, a guided-missile destroyer (). The Yemeni rebels, backed by Iran, have been targeting Israel as well as tankers and other vessels in the Red Sea. College Playoff Teams Set, FSU Left Out The final four college football championship contenders have been chosen, but not without controversy. The teams are , who will begin the playoffs on Jan 1. Alabama, 12-1, is in by virtue of its upset victory over No. 1-ranked Georgia, which hadn't lost a game in two years. Texas, also 12-1, made the cut because it defeated Alabama earlier in the year. Left out is Florida State, 13-0, passed over because their starting quarterback is injured. It's the first time in modern college playoff history that an undefeated Power 5 champion failed to make the playoff. () ➤ The annual Country Music Awards, the biggest night for country music artists, will be telecast on ABC this Wednesday night and streamed on Hulu on Thursday. () | ➤A Venezuelan zoo saw the birth of the country's first three white lion cubs, which look like adorable balls of fluff, to be born in captivity. There are only a dozen white lions left in their native South Africa. () ➤ Simon Beck, a former mapmaker, now builds enormously intricate geometric snow drawings worldwide using a compass and his snowshoes. () ➤An analysis of TripAdvisor reviews produced a list of the luckiest casinos in Las Vegas based on slot machine payouts. The Mirage ranked as the casino most likely to produce a jackpot. | | | Progressive hero Rachel Maddow has a new book out, and the subject couldn't be more timely: "**[Prequel: An American Fight against Fascism](https://default.salsalabs.org/T05179eaf-8edc-4cf2-8ad1-868562a34a88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**." Show your support, and get a copy today! (any get copies for all the activists and history buffs on your holiday gift list as well) _[#1 NEW YORK TIMES BESTSELLER](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda9ad9fc-6402-40cf-a16f-845f7ba67b34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) • Rachel Maddow traces the fight to preserve American democracy back to World War II, when a handful of committed public servants and brave private citizens thwarted far-right plotters trying to steer our nation toward an alliance with the Nazis._

_“A ripping read—well rendered, fast-paced and delivered with the same punch and assurance that she brings to a broadcast. . . . subject: Debunking the Democrat Lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here It’s Congresswoman Jen Kiggans, and I wanted to take a few minutes to set the record straight. It’s a little longer than usual, but I hope you will read every word of this email…. First a quick reminder about my background. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=1929b841660253006a204ddbe24023681b910acbb432aa64e3e5d9888fcd0758683e758b6847cc3689d8f1355fe6db53c9abc2136f184e3c I grew up in a home where we flew the flag above the garage door every day. My Dad, who served as a United States Army Green Beret in Vietnam and later served in the Army Reserves, would salute the flag when he came home from a drill weekend in his uniform. His service inspired me to join the Navy, where I flew H-46 and H-3 helicopters. It was at flight school where I met my husband. He is now a retired F-18 pilot. Now, I’m proud to say that we are parents to future veterans…keeping the lifetime of service alive! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=1929b841660253006a204ddbe24023681b910acbb432aa64e3e5d9888fcd0758683e758b6847cc3689d8f1355fe6db53c9abc2136f184e3c After getting out of the Navy, I used my GI Bill benefits to become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner. I was able to serve my country again by taking care of so many members of our Greatest Generation who were veterans. I tell you all of this to make sure you understand just how personal supporting our veterans is to me. It’s one of the main reasons I decided to run for Congress back in 2022. I refused to just sit back and watch as Joe Biden’s economy made life so much harder for my fellow veterans. After winning one of the closest elections last year, I’ve hit the ground running in the House of Representatives supporting our veterans! Here are just a few of the highlights of my work supporting our veterans! - Voted to FULLY FUND veterans’ benefits, health care, and other programs, including the electronic health record modernization initiative. - Hosted Veterans’ Listening Sessions to hear directly from our veterans about what issues matter most to them. - Introduced legislation to support service-disabled veteran-owned small businesses and expand economic opportunities available. - Authored legislation to improve the VA Caregivers Program by allowing Veterans Service Organizations (VSOs) to advocate for disabled veterans. - Championed legislation to improve transparency and provide more resources for veterans looking to use GI Bill benefits.Those are just a few examples of my work supporting our veterans! I tell you all of this because I was incredibly frustrated to learn that a dark-money Democrat PAC just launched an ad campaign falsely claiming that I don’t support our veterans…. I have never - and will never - vote to cut veteran benefits. I will always vote to support our veterans. This attack ad shows just how desperate the Democrats are to retake power…they will attack a Navy veteran over veteran issues! So, I’m going to need YOUR help to get the truth out! It’s critical that my campaign have the resources necessary to combat the Democrat attacks, so https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=1929b841660253006a204ddbe24023681b910acbb432aa64e3e5d9888fcd0758683e758b6847cc3689d8f1355fe6db53c9abc2136f184e3c I’m personally asking if you can chip in ANY AMOUNT today to help us set the record straight. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=1929b841660253006a204ddbe24023681b910acbb432aa64e3e5d9888fcd0758683e758b6847cc3689d8f1355fe6db53c9abc2136f184e3c RUSH SUPPORT Look - time is of the essence here. We cannot and will not sit back and allow the Democrats to spread these lies, but I need your help to make sure we have a forceful response. It’s a little longer than usual, but I hope you will read every word of this email…. First a quick reminder about my background. I grew up in a home where we flew the flag above the garage door every day. My Dad, who served as a United States Army Green Beret in Vietnam and later served in the Army Reserves, would salute the flag when he came home from a drill weekend in his uniform. His service inspired me to join the Navy, where I flew H-46 and H-3 helicopters. It was at flight school where I met my husband. He is now a retired F-18 pilot. Now, I’m proud to say that we are parents to future veterans…keeping the lifetime of service alive! After getting out of the Navy, I used my GI Bill benefits to become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner. I was able to serve my country again by taking care of so many members of our Greatest Generation who were veterans. I tell you all of this to make sure you understand just how personal supporting our veterans is to me. It’s one of the main reasons I decided to run for Congress back in 2022. I refused to just sit back and watch as Joe Biden’s economy made life so much harder for my fellow veterans. After winning one of the closest elections last year, I’ve hit the ground running in the House of Representatives supporting our veterans! Here are just a few of the highlights of my work supporting our veterans! - Voted to FULLY FUND veterans’ benefits, health care, and other programs, including the electronic health record modernization initiative. - Hosted Veterans’ Listening Sessions to hear directly from our veterans about what issues matter most to them. - Introduced legislation to support service-disabled veteran-owned small businesses and expand economic opportunities available. - Authored legislation to improve the VA Caregivers Program by allowing Veterans Service Organizations (VSOs) to advocate for disabled veterans. - Championed legislation to improve transparency and provide more resources for veterans looking to use GI Bill benefits.Those are just a few examples of my work supporting our veterans! I tell you all of this because I was incredibly frustrated to learn that a dark-money Democrat PAC just launched an ad campaign falsely claiming that I don’t support our veterans…. I have never - and will never - vote to cut veteran benefits. I will always vote to support our veterans. This attack ad shows just how desperate the Democrats are to retake power…they will attack a Navy veteran over veteran issues! So, I’m going to need YOUR help to get the truth out! It’s critical that my campaign have the resources necessary to combat the Democrat attacks, so I’m personally asking if you can chip in ANY AMOUNT today to help us set the record straight. RUSH SUPPORT Look - time is of the essence here. We cannot and will not sit back and allow the Democrats to spread these lies, but I need your help to make sure we have a forceful response. My race very well could decide whether Republicans or Democrats control the House of Representatives, so please pledge your support as soon as you can. Together, we can debunk these liberal lies and protect our GOP Majority! -Jen PS: Please forward this email to any of your friends and other contacts to help us get the truth out! We cannot allow the Democrats to get away with these lies!!! JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. Can you spare just $5 or $10 today to protect her vulnerable seat? If we are going to defeat the Democrats and keep the Republican Majority, then we MUST support tough conservatives like Jen Kiggans right now. name: Trump News HQ
subject: “Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol” – Our newest free online course Bah! Humbug!
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens’ most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8qn4f6o07keii960249m2qpdifjuau3u400m13o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cti60o32c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvvm9amgtd5begrr759kfoj83ne0med08p8r7s3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cti60o32c1h2bs)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Trump Train News

He has accused school shooting survivors of being “crisis actors.” He referred to the Holocaust as “hogwash.” He agreed with claims that Jewish bankers are working with China, Islamic leaders, and the CIA to “control the world.” My opponent’s lies aren’t just outrageous, Peter . **They’re dangerous.**

subject: The Consequences: Reversal of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress
body:
Across the nation, we are witnessing the unintended consequences of the reversal of Roe v. Wade. Even here in Texas, women are suing the state aft... | | | | | [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=3b08f15ced&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
# The Consequences

Peter:
Across the nation, we are witnessing the unintended consequences of the reversal of Roe v. Wade. Even here in Texas, women are suing the state after being denied medical care despite having severe medical complications. Those complications, which are supposed to be a part of the exceptions for these bills, still were not enough to help these women.

**Broad abortion laws affect more than just those seeking “choice.”** They affect those that want to expand their families and those that receive the devastating news of an unviable pregnancy or a fatal birth defect. They affect victims of sexual assault and incest. The nuanced nature of reproductive healthcare has no room for strict, black-and-white legislation.

Doctors now fear receiving jail time and even the death penalty for providing care even when women are in life-or-death situations. Some extremist politicians have gone so far as to introduce legislation that would propose the death penalty for those seeking abortion care.

[**Peter - We can fight back. Sending me to Congress will mean one more vote to protect healthcare and a voice for the complex nature of this issue. Chip in today and help us make an impact.**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=b7c6960e6a&e=a2a46ff12c)

name: Your America
subject: "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol" – Our newest free online course Bah! Humbug!
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens’ most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36332%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bYCJOVTb0lHyY2P7AMNUng&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens’ most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge’s conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36333%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aHbTE%2fxHTSRj6nz0zUi8QQ&sysid=1)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

subject: ‘Enabled By Iran’: Pentagon Sheds Light On Drone Attacks Against Ships In Red Sea
body:
And Largest University System In US Launches Strike For More Pay, ‘Gender-Inclusive’ Restrooms

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686540%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=phE5H640%2fAt%2bCXUxlyYlIQ&sysid=1 ‘Enabled By Iran’: Pentagon Sheds Light On Drone Attacks Against Ships In Red Sea

The U.S. military confirmed efforts to defend against three drone attacks while responding to distress calls from three separate commercial ships transiting the southern Red Sea on Sunday, but said it was too early to determine whether a U.S. Navy vessel was also a target.

California State University (CSU) faculty launched a series of strikes on Monday, according to the Associated Press. The strikes will include four single-day events taking place at CSU campuses in Pomona, San Francisco, Los Angeles and Sacramento, and are part of an effort for faculty to receive higher pay and more benefits, according to the AP.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686541%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6YopMCwt8zem1nLqsQFWQQ&sysid=1

Pro-Palestinian protesters gathered outside an Israeli-American’s falafel shop in Philadelphia on Sunday and charged the owners with “genocide” for their support of Israel after Hamas’ terror attacks on Oct. 7, according to CBS News.

name: American Briefing
subject: John Kerry Spins UN Climate Summit President’sComments That ‘No Science’ Backs Fossil Fuel Elimination Push
body:
American BriefingAnd Dem Rep’s Mayoral Campaign Drops TV Ad With One
Glaring Error Ahead Of Contentious Runoff Election

And Dem Rep’s Mayoral Campaign Drops TV Ad With One Glaring Error
Ahead Of Contentious Runoff Election

John Kerry Spins UN Climate Summit President’s Comments That ‘No
Science’ Backs Fossil Fuel Elimination Push

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6l9gku7icbtt28mf6a1aq4tua8p3sv32k47qo6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cti64o76cph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cti69qbacpkmerj79hnmmrq5dtgmeqqdd9ie9qfb9jgeiprctd5eeqqccdkmmq32t9lkpqnbddkm5qq0sjl6pqb2d9jm5r7b9hnmmqracthepqq2s5k65qq7dtlkpr39d9jmoqjb8hk6orbctd36ur7ct5hmmhjat9hmmij3d5lmipr8cbkmuprb83lepobf8h5u

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za7sll31gu2keennfv0ft5hcjhnhba483hnvkac0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr4cjkmkpj9ctn6ej3fddnkarr1ctlkqqj4sjkumj70t5jmpqqastlkoor9ddk65qjb9jlemqr9cblk1p7adjkm4qj7cbmemj3fddlmkpr2tjlk5ob8cblkerrb9jm6iqj7dhl6mh38dhmmpqq6dtmepqb3dd36lqj3dd566qbbd5jmgon9dtjmmg7atjgmuh238h1e8he4937c1i6ep32c3j6coh5u

Special Presidential Envoy for Climate John Kerry is playing defense
for the president of this year’s United Nations (UN) climate confab
after he contended that there is “no science” behind calls for a
fossil fuel phase-out, Politico reported Monday. Sultan Ahmed Al

Friend,

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=758ef53f99e7bf4f2c1349cc116c919c6d3d4bd879f188e4b353fdb26ae4241af2e295f6930eb26817b1041eeae4049be7158bbf2c64ad73393ed35f6381f10a

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=758ef53f99e7bf4fb638e7570c99e5ea89331e268b4a71edbaa25647d3eddb60c3d4005368c2d523a8bd2bf90c51cd43cfbf35fb8e87002035dee7f3ff958602
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=758ef53f99e7bf4f2c1349cc116c919c6d3d4bd879f188e4b353fdb26ae4241af2e295f6930eb26817b1041eeae4049be7158bbf2c64ad73393ed35f6381f10a

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=758ef53f99e7bf4f2c1349cc116c919c6d3d4bd879f188e4b353fdb26ae4241af2e295f6930eb26817b1041eeae4049be7158bbf2c64ad73393ed35f6381f10a

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.
