**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
Slavery is alive and well in America. I took these pictures _Saturday_ in an area known as “smuggler’s highway.” (see bottom of email)
**Women** and **children** are being _trafficked_ in record numbers and it didn’t take long to find evidence of it.
At this particular site, children were brought here by a coyote where they forced these kids to wait for pick up - during which time they’re fed cat food and were raped.
**The photos at the bottom of this email** contain a coyote backpack, a young girl’s pink bra, children’s backpacks that were left behind, and a rape kit.
This is _**heinous**_ and is **_unacceptable_** to be happening on our watch.
I was also honored to be mentioned in [this article by the Uvalde Hesperian](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ1dmFsZGVoZXNwZXJpYW4uY29tJTJGMjAyMyUyRjEyJTJGMDMlMkZ0aGUtYm9yZGVyLXVuZG9jdW1lbnRlZC1taWdyYW50cy1zY2FsZS1ib3gtY2FyLWJhcnJpZXJzLXVzaW5nLWxhZGRlcnMtbWlncmFudHMtc2Vlbi13YWxraW5nLWFsb25nLXVzLWhpZ2h3YXktOTAtbmVhci11dmFsZGUlMkY=&sig=5MdC3tR1ixgPkUCg6ya9maz5NidSYg3pFEGJ84qTNZTM&iat=1701718077&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=bc42Pxxwer%2BdQ0IgZv12jxIcYD0Wy9PXuOvBFwv9XWY9MTcp%3ADjblmmXnvQsMsgysX%2Bt5Zn1bD1rFVZbA&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=213A240A1A1880) for the work we were doing this weekend.
For the last year, Dan Crenshaw has been calling for the impeachment of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas for violating his oath of office by failing to secure the U.S.-Mexico border.
But just a few short weeks ago, when the House voted to do just that, Crenshaw was nowhere to be found.
To this day, Crenshaw has not made a public statement (that I’m aware of) answering for why he missed the opportunity to act on his rhetoric.
Texas deserves better.
**You deserve better!**
And that’s why I’m asking for your support... to be _**YOUR**_ voice in Washington and unseat Dan Crenshaw.

How do I believe we fix the border crisis?
* Moratorium on immigration
* Lock down the ports of entry
* Deport illegals
* Put boots on the ground actively REPELLING the invasion

But I must have your financial support in order to beat Crenshaw.

name: The Exodus Effect
subject: Trump’s Secret: “FoodRations Start Friday”
body:
Beijing's long anticipated assault on America isn't an EMP...

It isn't a nuclear attack.

It isn't a chemical attack.

And it isn't another virus.

According to war hero, white house insider, and purple heart recipient Teddy Daniels - this attack is a "new kind of warfare" that will "starve America into submission".

Listen up... Teddy Daniels is not only a man that I trust - he's a man I have tremendous admiration for.

And Mr. Daniels has just released an [EMERGENCY DOCUMENTARY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbhttbp3152730ijcjmb0dbnl5decrt2880mad2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cti64o72cth2bs) that not only proves America is on the cusp of the greatest food shortage in recorded history...

But reveals rock solid evidence that this "Final Famine" could start on Friday.

Plus, in Mr. Daniels' shocking documentary, you'll also discover:
*Why Every Patriot MUST HAVE 3 Feet of Copper Wire In Their Home, To Be Properly Prepared For This "Final Famine"
*How An Accused Spy In Our Government (Codenamed: "The Red Dragon") Has Paved The Way For This Food Shortage. Plus Her Secret Identity Exposed!
*What President Trump whispered to Teddy in their secret meeting - and why it means that Stockpiling Food Won't Save You or Your Family...
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdsv7kmeauggvq3rasb806519qm2d42pohef5vfg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cti64o72cth2bs)
Watch Teddy Daniels' EXPLOSIVE documentary right now - because folks, this is NOT a drill.
As you might know, I consider myself to be a man who can survive almost anything.

But the deadly evidence Mr. Daniels presents, and the incredibly unique nature of this threat... even has ME afraid.

Afraid for my family. Afraid for my friends. And afraid for YOU.

More urgently, when you [watch Teddy's EMERGENCY documentary right now](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5jdf015hcuv788gjnuar6kcvu2brlhsbh4nmq98_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cti64o72cth2bs) - you'll immediately realize that his report will be deleted by the powers that be as soon as they become aware of it.

Watch it now please.

Paul Grabowski

1600 Daily

On January 20, 2025, I will place my hand upon the Bible and take the Oath of Office as I am inaugurated as your 47th President of the United States.
---
I will thank God for granting us the strength to prevail against the most vicious witch hunts ever conceived.
---
But I will also remember to thank a very special group of patriots...
---
...You see, as I make my way through the crowd and wave to our many, many supporters, I will quickly be able to identify who has been with me _since this_ __pivotal__ ____moment__ _right now_ when they show me their 2024 Campaign Membership Card __specially printed with an early renewal of 2023__.

clean_body: Upon placing my hand upon the Bible... | | | | | Patriot, On January 20, 2025, I will place my hand upon the Bible and take the Oath of Office as I am inaugurated as your 47th President of the United States. I will thank God for granting us the strength to prevail against the most vicious witch hunts ever conceived. But I will also remember to thank a very special group of patriots... ...You see, as I make my way through the crowd and wave to our many, many supporters, I will quickly be able to identify who has been with me since this pivotal __moment right now when they show me their 2024 Campaign Membership Card specially printed with an early renewal of 2023. | | I’ll know that YOU peacefully defended our movement as Democrats tried to remove my name from the ballot and disenfranchise a majority of American voters before the 2024 election even began. Our victory will be thanks to YOU. In fact, it will be thanks to you that my name could even appear on the ballot. With you peacefully standing by my side, we will cast off the political ruling class that hates our country, we will DISMANTLE the Deep State, we will rout the warmongers and globalists from our government, and above all else, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN by firing the most corrupt and incompetent president to ever occupy the White House – Crooked Joe Biden! | | Peter, Every day, this administration makes a mockery of what should be the most robust national security system in the world.

**Just last month, the Pentagon asked for $114 MILLION to spend on diversity, equity, and inclusion.**

That’s money we could be spending to maintain our ships, aircraft and submarines so they can keep Americans safe and track down the terrorists who want to destroy us.

_But instead, the Biden Administration wants to spend it on appeasing the woke mob._

**It’s more clear than ever: far Left woke socialism puts us directly in danger.**

**[I’m running for the U.S. Senate to put a STOP to this madness, and I need your help. Will you pitch in today to help us WIN and STOP the woke mob from putting YOU in danger?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=5e3f80dd49b643968d52b277a7495dac&_e=BwyznNGC8NMj-vAYXQ5mBpGY_OJawfB5gBMA5I9W5jh8RFNhOnx1ggF9lc4V2_L9-LEP0oPrP26Gs19chH-CFFrunHUxJzapJKwj2eDxxl83IZwDtOePGrk7jUweFcKH2RdBAaAxWHClYo0ul9-hk10o0cgjPH0tc6S-BYcIp_ENCpdrFvODo-KOzX4WV5jLdwifprBkSxHnPB9DST26jDwA2OwWBRsWMbl8bQqEiSyVNkhKN7pb668hMYF_GGIo50Vg0jaxzLCSMbgLormnDDut2aPXLSG7HXKb-1rE2rgSDwXjJ6Lhr4aNTUyqEmIBj8IPi1i8xijO-dZ62uexqqdBL48s0oeq17kkB3Ftk643z7TqW5arOQX9RmJM5BXc)**
I know firsthand what it takes to defend our country, Peter.

I served on the front lines in the Navy for 25 years as a Captain.

I served in Special Operations and fought in the most dangerous war zones in the world from Iraq to Afghanistan to Somalia.

What we need to keep America safe is training our troops, gathering intelligence, and making sure we have the most cutting-edge technology possible to help us win on the battlefield.

**I’ll tell you what doesn’t matter: what our troops look like, what their skin color is, or how “inclusive” we are.**

Our military needs to focus on strength and lethality, period.

**[It’s time to get our priorities back in check. Join me today so we can TAKE BACK THE U.S. SENATE and stop this ridiculous wasteful spending.](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=5e3f80dd49b643968d52b277a7495dac&_e=BwyznNGC8NMj-vAYXQ5mBpGY_OJawfB5gBMA5I9W5jh8RFNhOnx1ggF9lc4V2_L9-LEP0oPrP26Gs19chH-CFFrunHUxJzapJKwj2eDxxl83IZwDtOePGrk7jUweFcKH2RdBAaAxWHClYo0ul9-hk10o0cgjPH0tc6S-BYcIp_ENCpdrFvODo-KOzX4WV5jLdwifprBkSxHnPB9DST26jDwA2OwWBRsWMbl8bQqEiSwsoDMNJtIi42S7kQNjO36dp9igpmmMcY4rQELga-RXo2ryLqfZZLrfoI-fK_9Ib081PZnYJjbmn5h_zxhKVT5eOzC2cej0PbYeo7qjurweoxV_DWwJMAI7JlwgnVPs9qxGVYB6-n2_V7sdi1dboCSC)**

I know firsthand what it takes to defend our country, Peter. I served on the front lines in the Navy for 25 years as a Captain. I served in Special Operations and fought in the most dangerous war zones in the world from Iraq to Afghanistan to Somalia. What we need to keep America safe is training our troops, gathering intelligence, and making sure we have the most cutting-edge technology possible to help us win on the battlefield. I’ll tell you what doesn’t matter: what our troops look like, what their skin color is, or how “inclusive” we are. Our military needs to focus on strength and lethality, period. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| Update from Your Candidate for Minnesota 4th Congressional District: Mike Casey
---
| Happy Monday, this is Mike Casey, and I wanted to provide you with a brief update on my campaign. This week, I have several events lined up that I'll be attending. Here's the schedule:
1\. BPOU 41 Meeting Date: Tuesday, December 5th Time: 6:30 PM Location: Lighthouse Baptist Church Address: 9979 80th St S, Cottage Grove, MN
2\. Liberty Tea Party Patriots Date: Thursday, December 7th Location: Willy McCoy's Champlin Address: 15450 Business Park Blvd N
3\. MNGOP State Central Meeting Date: Saturday, December 9th Location: Minnehaha Academy Address: 3100 W River Pkwy, Minneapolis, MN 55406
We'll also have a table set up at the MNGOP State Central meeting, so I encourage you to stop by and meet me in person. Your support and engagement are greatly appreciated. Thank you, and I look forward to seeing you at these events.

name: Debbie
subject: re: falling short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I wanted to get a note out to you about where things stand right now. It’s important.
| | |
---
Hi, friend, it's Debbie. I just had a meeting with my campaign team, and I wanted to get a note out to you about where things stand right now. It’s important.
Unfortunately, we’re pacing about $10,493 short of where we should be at this point in the month. **[_Will you donate $5 to help get us back on track so we can defeat Rick Scott?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74533131/441895331/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk384-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZmZjM0NjctYjQ5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jJYOute4oaI7C13O7vAehUafQHLcor37HQXHRRAfwhw=)**
We cannot afford to fall behind so early on in the election cycle. My opponent, Rick Scott, is one of the richest senators in the country, so he's more than capable of self-funding his campaign. In fact, he’s already poured millions into his current campaign, and last time around, he spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat.
Look, friend, I’ve already fought opponents like Rick Scott and _beat_ them. I’m not afraid to face him or anybody who doesn’t put Florida first — especially as he continues to get rich while taking away our rights, abusing our government, and raising costs for families. No más. We’re going to do something about it. We’re going to win.
But winning will take staying ahead of our grassroots goals, especially when Rick Scott can cut himself a massive check at any moment. **[_That’s why I’m asking, friend: Please, help me make up this gap by donating $5, or whatever you can, to fight back against Rick Scott, win in Florida, and expand our Senate majority._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74533133/441895333/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk384-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZmZjM0NjctYjQ5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jJYOute4oaI7C13O7vAehUafQHLcor37HQXHRRAfwhw=)**

subject: firing on all cylinders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8446?t=1009&amount=25&akid=716%2E52803%2ENZovbm ][IMG]

It might be a Monday morning,
Peter, but I’m absolutely jazzed
to get this day started!

I’m still riding the high from yesterday’s “Together We Thrive” Senate
Candidate Forum, and I’m feeling more confident than ever that we’ve got
what it takes to win this thing.

This campaign is firing on all cylinders, and we need to keep up our
momentum as we head into 2024. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8446?t=1010&amount=25&akid=716%2E52803%2ENZovbm ]Will you consider chipping in $25 to get
the week started on the right foot and give this grassroots team another
big boost?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8446?t=1011&amount=25&akid=716%2E52803%2ENZovbm ]Donate

Yesterday was huge,
Peter, and I truly feel great
about the case we made for why I’m the right candidate to represent
Maryland in the U.S. Senate.

But we cannot afford to forget that my opponent is a self-funded
multi-millionaire who has already committed to spending tens of millions
of his own money to drown out our Maryland-first message.

That’s why events like yesterday’s forum are so important: Talking
directly with voters lets us cut through the noise and have real
conversations.

And if we do enough of that, we’ll win — plain and simple.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8446?t=1012&amount=25&akid=716%2E52803%2ENZovbm ]So I want to harness this momentum and ramp up our on-the-ground
outreach, which means we need resources. Can I count on you to pitch in a
grassroots donation to help me reach more voters?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

—Angela

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: The dangers of isolation
body:
A podcast for you | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/podcast-isolation?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Isolation has become a way of life for so many now. There’s been a nefarious conditioning to make you feel like you’re alone. Our kids, our elders, and our friends were forced into isolation. We still deal with those ramifications today and will for a generation. What have we done? How can we reverse this? How do we get back to a place of connectedness? I try to answer some of these questions in my most recent podcast. [Click here](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=5e6616d33c&e=9828080a05) or the thumbnail below to listen to this critical session on isolation:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=248d1649e3&e=9828080a05 "The Dr. Scott Jensen Podcast Ep 33 | Isolation")
---
| This new-found agenda to isolate us leaves us all disconnected from one another, relying on impersonal ways to learn, work, and empathize. If we don't say "never again" in a unified voice, Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Big Government will try it again. That's why I wrote [my book](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=8237cb47f2&e=9828080a05), "_We've Been Played: Exposing the Triad of Tyranny_." [I hope you'll consider reading it.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=e49162fdfe&e=9828080a05)

In the meantime, [please listen to this most recent podcast](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c9e1719ddb&e=9828080a05). I think you'll be able to grab on to some practical ways to talk to your kids, your parents, and your co-workers about what happened and how to never let it happen again.

We have to keep fighting; we have no choice.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
---

clean_body: A podcast for you | | | | | | | Peter, Isolation has become a way of life for so many now. There’s been a nefarious conditioning to make you feel like you’re alone. Our kids, our elders, and our friends were forced into isolation. We still deal with those ramifications today and will for a generation. What have we done? How can we reverse this? How do we get back to a place of connectedness? I try to answer some of these questions in my most recent podcast. or the thumbnail below to listen to this critical session on isolation: | "The Dr. Scott Jensen Podcast Ep 33 | Isolation" | This new-found agenda to isolate us leaves us all disconnected from one another, relying on impersonal ways to learn, work, and empathize. If we don't say "never again" in a unified voice, Big Tech, Big Pharma, and Big Government will try it again. That's why I wrote , "We've Been Played: Exposing the Triad of Tyranny." In the meantime, . I think you'll be able to grab on to some practical ways to talk to your kids, your parents, and your co-workers about what happened and how to never let it happen again. We have to keep fighting; we have no choice. In Freedom, Dr. Scott Jensen Minnesota Family Doctor | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Fractured Times Media LLC, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: "The Economy is Great" ...wink wink
body:
New for dpwillis67@gmail.com - this is what's really going on with Bidenomics | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0b57aee18a&e=567664f14c)
We hope you are ready for another killer episode from the No Doubt About It Podcast with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c07ef2f510&e=567664f14c)
In our latest installment, we dive into a topic that resonates with many New Mexicans - the reluctance to speak one's mind. **Mark sheds light on the reasons behind this fear, exploring why some people in our state are hesitant to express their true feelings.** Here’s a hint: retribution and money. It’s a candid discussion, especially in a world where voices like Elon Musk and Dana White refuse to be silenced, speaking out against conforming to the demands of wealthy advertisers.
| [STREAM EPISODE 57 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2421cc235c&e=567664f14c)
---
As we navigate the podcast, Mark unveils an intriguing discovery related to Electric Vehicle (EV) mandates in New Mexico. Despite the poor state policy, he may have stumbled upon the perfect EV solution for Albuquerque residents – a must-hear revelation!
The border issues are front and center once again, this time in Arizona. Both Democrats and Republicans are uniting in criticism of the weak federal response led by Joe Biden. It's a complex and evolving situation that demands attention and understanding.
| [STREAM EPISODE 57 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5fe722e803&e=567664f14c)
---
On a lighter note, we welcome a special guest back to the show – our daughter Ava. Prepare for laughter as she hilariously recounts her struggles as the "worst member" of her high school swim team. It's a delightful moment that adds a touch of humor to the episode.
|
---
If you find this episode as engaging as we do, please consider supporting us by liking, subscribing, and leaving a review on your preferred podcast platform. Also, don't forget to subscribe to our YouTube channel for additional content.
For those interested in supporting us financially or snagging some cool podcast gear, visit [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=8a29550dac&e=567664f14c).
Thank you for being an essential part of the No Doubt About It Podcast community. We can't wait for you to tune in and share your thoughts!
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4b37ab97f0&e=567664f14c)
|

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Dec. 4: Senate GOP must stand up to Democrats
body:
| | |
---
| | **This week, we need to call Senate Republicans and tell them to stand up to Democrats who are trying (yet again) to pass amnesty.** Use the sample script below when you call both of your senators.
---
| | _“Hello, my name is**[YOUR NAME]** and I’m calling from **[YOUR CITY, STATE]**. I’m calling today to thank my Republican senator for standing up against the Democrats’ efforts to cement our open borders into law and pass amnesty. I’m also calling to urge my senator to continue standing strong against the Democrats, and to fully support nothing less than the House’s border security bill, H.R. 2, in the senate. The open border is a catastrophe for many reasons and Republicans must keep fighting to truly secure it. Thank you.”_
---
[FIND MY SENATORS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
| | Also, keep an eye out for a survey we will be sending soon. We want your feedback for 2024! Thank you! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---
| | |
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-A)

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: Survey enclosed for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
As a top GIFFORDS supporter, we’re hoping we can count on your response
#

Friends -
As we finish out 2023, all of us at GIFFORDS have been reflecting on the progress we’ve made this year in our movement to end gun violence. We’ve made many strides this year towards a safer future—including a federal office of gun violence prevention, tightening background check loopholes, and landmark progress in states nationwide.
But we’re still in the midst of a gun violence crisis. The United States has more guns, weaker gun laws, and higher rates of gun violence than any other developed country in the world. Gun violence is the **_number one**_ cause of death for our nation’s children. It doesn’t have to be this way.
Today, we’re releasing our final Gun Safety Priorities Survey of 2023. This is our most important survey of the year, because your responses will help us shape our work in 2024. As a top GIFFORDS supporter, we’re hoping we can count on your response.
[**So will you please share your top gun safety priorities with us by taking our End of Year Gun Safety Priorities Survey?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/dec23-priorities-sv-em/?source=em231204-1-30&refcode2=6995.3935704.fwoAqg&akid=6995%2E3935704%2EfwoAqg)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/dec23-priorities-sv-em/?source=em231204-1-30&refcode2=6995.3935704.fwoAqg&akid=6995%2E3935704%2EfwoAqg)**
Your thoughts are so important to us. Thanks for taking the time to share them with us.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=6995%2E3935704%2EfwoAqg) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: I’m checking in with you one more time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I was blown away by how many people had more to say.

Hey, it’s Steve Scalise again.

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Last email I’ll ever send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=56ad32b50eec4f2d829075fcf4245c1e&_e=yCdB83kCTl0f8ocMx4dwwBLz4oVy-K1uE42wM2dAl7hNbqGBuRy8CVnevMFS1i31BEyOcYiMfMz0lsN9r6kcHqTdESnILd5-8djbrXy8LrqfvBLxH-mIGq4elMFiVSd7Sz2MQPjomfr3DKjDXs9PmKOQ2_ze4r5soJGtdzHJUcagVyPp-tGxZJXb0UKW0NL4IKW3eQD2mu1yXzMdEdB9iSOso34H9Ptj6sPCksXBYbj06UKnuL74T0cda1r0GMGh1zxmHLt_K0gC-H7FnkkU7dpHf_CzaBlCRe4Wm-jloWox2SdRDWs8ugtLG1_4ByO55mLLM0Oe_qDashFIm52ocYk5EjHAH8TGjKN37of9s7mwICqOzdvf561Qb06vL4MN)
---
Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC, a district that WILL decide who controls Washington. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America’s future. | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=e963db6e2ad14382931a153680df58d1&_t=CF3ufoHzxAB6tk2Hdx4xoUt8jM_k77fhYCyb6x_2SDGcN9429yWRvo9RRNZHrtZHh9pnyZ157F6rAXM7lbYHv6VquLv_26ATdu-gT7NQCCc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=e963db6e2ad14382931a153680df58d1&_t=CF3ufoHzxAB6tk2Hdx4xoUt8jM_k77fhYCyb6x_2SDGcN9429yWRvo9RRNZHrtZHh9pnyZ157F6rAXM7lbYHv6VquLv_26ATdu-gT7NQCCc%3D)

Friend,

I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=e963db6e2ad14382931a153680df58d1&_e=gIRf6nXM0JobkGjvS_RKJ1BqSxRwf1dnv9-v4GW-_SZtTGYQnIQDhpRNVyEsa_aqVN41NZnEVkrNJQP7dtYYfhbj1d6MELiikxoiO3I24-WA-1F8cEg310Y0QqquUulD5n29o86P2BQo3VkGdBGrfUFw21e1aWKdXGrHs2eX0ZdsNts-P1xT4XDB3sIs8ZzSwCnCPfzeIkT558VBOJ7h3ffjjyFXcdAwg18-Rby7fRPfKnVy0g0d5n9rWEgxN9eHLdFWmzpgwcMUqL7E_W3JHgi8TZcLr3qfTg9s7iMPKhxYHwY87daoo5adVxmCgD7r9Jof-PbXmXpH-vPuSyYWCyWmvZyxnezEbadsQGewRyoP3ckeft5OhS2pCqWgrfJKAbX2rrSoiTmKcqaHBY46Jw%3D%3D)**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=e963db6e2ad14382931a153680df58d1&_e=gIRf6nXM0JobkGjvS_RKJ1BqSxRwf1dnv9-v4GW-_SZtTGYQnIQDhpRNVyEsa_aqVN41NZnEVkrNJQP7dtYYfhbj1d6MELiikxoiO3I24-WA-1F8cEg310Y0QqquUulD5n29o86P2BQo3VkGdBGrfUFw21e1aWKdXGrHs2eX0ZdsNts-P1xT4XDB3sIs8ZzSwCnCPfzeIkT558VBOJ7h3ffjjyFXcdAwg18-Rby7fRN9fN43UHdRACSajl2Bjyqi_mYvPnIg_grWdl55XHc567lAYiKsJFK9NOYqurtYiPgdkok7Pcb3GbUKa2Ss8V_vmrez6c6dsfPAsIVIFC5jiEwBG3vLKE-qxv4BMC1D5q4PBtY98GkemAdoqOaKlBXo7AhvA4zSH_J7_7x60Q8WTg%3D%3D)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.

---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

---
| | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=e963db6e2ad14382931a153680df58d1&_e=gIRf6nXM0JobkGjvS_RKJ1BqSxRwf1dnv9-v4GW-_SZtTGYQnIQDhpRNVyEsa_aqVN41NZnEVkrNJQP7dtYYfhbj1d6MELiikxoiO3I24-WA-1F8cEg310Y0QqquUulD5n29o86P2BQo3VkGdBGrfUFw21e1aWKdXGrHs2eX0ZdsNts-P1xT4XDB3sIs8ZzSwCnCPfzeIkT558VBOJ7h3ffjjyFXcdAwg18-Rby7fROGQznQCbYtzLGeSWRuAGhmcq6AJhbRLlazzeNdi6II9LerC0zQedAy2mfFty9SS1I8pj7O7WvZpRc76Nsdj78zPSasUlsj2JJyfzF13zlAJXvrhqp90D50dgwCftIj8d0xyCZ_8_5mrVyujJs7Gj2WrkdEZJqG5024WQMp_wozLg%3D%3D)
---
When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=e963db6e2ad14382931a153680df58d1&_e=gIRf6nXM0JobkGjvS_RKJ1BqSxRwf1dnv9-v4GW-_SZtTGYQnIQDhpRNVyEsa_aqVN41NZnEVkrNJQP7dtYYfhbj1d6MELiikxoiO3I24-WA-1F8cEg310Y0QqquUulD5n29o86P2BQo3VkGdBGrfUFw21e1aWKdXGrHs2eX0ZdsNts-P1xT4XDB3sIs8ZzSwCnCPfzeIkT558VBOJ7h3ffjjyFXcdAwg18-Rby7fRON1Q1SREKaGWcVRSRHoO8ikRC6smog_-Pb9y_-_eLcPR7jqTgttrnRBFEjwCTzruEEGmlPiyVrTmQiBLSxl-LQlmA2-FBjQjnGW-CgScT2iUTBfK2NRrGSO15cTEcaaiMZViMf7t2SRndfmeWtczK2OD4-VaxLeHyGioiazCI13w%3D%3D)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if _every single person reading this today_ could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=e963db6e2ad14382931a153680df58d1&_e=gIRf6nXM0JobkGjvS_RKJ1BqSxRwf1dnv9-v4GW-_SZtTGYQnIQDhpRNVyEsa_aqVN41NZnEVkrNJQP7dtYYfhbj1d6MELiikxoiO3I24-WA-1F8cEg310Y0QqquUulD5n29o86P2BQo3VkGdBGrfUFw21e1aWKdXGrHs2eX0ZdsNts-P1xT4XDB3sIs8ZzSwCnCPfzeIkT558VBOJ7h3ffjjyFXcdAwg18-Rby7fROxn6fmmg2ygvdFEXDWNnffEvTYT-8-hLr5ajugOxBGD4kiPsfGdS3mjeBvQd1IE323OFAh-HMO2vD4P0rPQPcSjDONWbnW70l-nNvvO0dhbFL6k3BshpR7eQ33w-V9yVCBMoXxc-yJ9gsFojARGHj-cy1WAASUUzfkpTBdtqrp4Q%3D%3D)**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=e963db6e2ad14382931a153680df58d1&_e=gIRf6nXM0JobkGjvS_RKJ1BqSxRwf1dnv9-v4GW-_SZtTGYQnIQDhpRNVyEsa_aqVN41NZnEVkrNJQP7dtYYfhbj1d6MELiikxoiO3I24-WA-1F8cEg310Y0QqquUulD5n29o86P2BQo3VkGdBGrfUFw21e1aWKdXGrHs2eX0ZdsNts-P1xT4XDB3sIs8ZzSwCnCPfzeIkT558VBOJ7h3ffjjyFXcdAwg18-Rby7fRO0TJUNWAP9YbsRr6aSxctTfkgrZ69REdst9_tTVlZP0OAZ0VK9EC93ChZ20-8glkC21oa9ZWM1-x4g65cErPGRLpgQgx0C6CNO42rmWZZu2tzUWPyOLpIewrBxtpZua3-EpYp72-tix-u5TCvXLOypE2MiWW6zFQs3J3j6XwLmKQ%3D%3D)**

---

But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=e963db6e2ad14382931a153680df58d1&_e=gIRf6nXM0JobkGjvS_RKJ1BqSxRwf1dnv9-v4GW-_SZtTGYQnIQDhpRNVyEsa_aqVN41NZnEVkrNJQP7dtYYfhbj1d6MELiikxoiO3I24-WA-1F8cEg310Y0QqquUulD5n29o86P2BQo3VkGdBGrfUFw21e1aWKdXGrHs2eX0ZdsNts-P1xT4XDB3sIs8ZzSwCnCPfzeIkT558VBOJ7h3ffjjyFXcdAwg18-Rby7fRM-Epgdj40UQD0oICjkzkNfnDnFGYKQcYLETDsQIuTFZcAJbczsQ0Urc1q9lKSEDhNEm9iFDsjD3OBLONCCF7Eme-j_zIIZIN0zkqBHy2DxAPO-212IBQG-mlWCKDDU6sUYX7-QczSJET2gZ0mwK-Zu3nfVBcpDNPKiti_Edgzjxw%3D%3D)**

Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. | | When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: ☀️To all Joe Biden supporters, please don't click away from this important message! ☀️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
As you read this, Republicans and outside spending groups are attacking Joe Biden relentlessly with negative campaign ads in key states across the country. | | |
---

☀️ Peter -- ☀️ To all Joe Biden and Kamala Harris supporters, please don't click away from this important message.

Think for a second about all the times you've been thankful Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in the last election. Now think for a second about how winning this next election is far from guaranteed.

As you read this, Republicans and outside spending groups are attacking Joe Biden relentlessly with negative campaign ads in key states across the country. We need your help to fight back.

If everyone reading this donated even just $5 to President Biden's reelection campaign, we'd have the resources we needed to win this election. But not everyone gives, that's why we people who understand that this race can be won or lost in the early stages chip in today.

Most of the donations we receive come from people giving smaller amounts of money. We're passionate about this model of fundraising because at its core it means this campaign is powered by people like you. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. If you can give $5, we're asking you to give $5. If you can give $25 or more, we're asking you to give that.

If reelecting Joe Biden and keeping Trump or any other Republican out of the White House seems worth $5, $25, or whatever you can afford, we're asking you to act today:
[Please use this link to contribute directly to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's reelection campaign today. Some people give $5, others give $25 or more. clean_body: As you read this, Republicans and outside spending groups are attacking Joe Biden relentlessly with negative campaign ads in key states across the country. | | | ☀️ Peter -- ☀️ To all Joe Biden and Kamala Harris supporters, please don't click away from this important message. Think for a second about all the times you've been thankful Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in the last election. Now think for a second about how winning this next election is far from guaranteed. As you read this, Republicans and outside spending groups are attacking Joe Biden relentlessly with negative campaign ads in key states across the country. We need your help to fight back. If everyone reading this donated even just $5 to President Biden's reelection campaign, we'd have the resources we needed to win this election. But not everyone gives, that's why we people who understand that this race can be won or lost in the early stages chip in today. Most of the donations we receive come from people giving smaller amounts of money. We're passionate about this model of fundraising because at its core it means this campaign is powered by people like you. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. If you can give $5, we're asking you to give $5. If you can give $25 or more, we're asking you to give that. If reelecting Joe Biden and keeping Trump or any other Republican out of the White House seems worth $5, $25, or whatever you can afford, we're asking you to act today: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | 🙏🙏 Thank you in advance for chipping in. December is always a tough fundraising month. Your donation today gives us tremendous peace of mind that we'll have the resources to win. \-- Team Joe

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: This week in Texas - December 4
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Here are the issues that Powered by People is working on this week:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Overcoming the extremists driving Texas policy

Over the weekend, the [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60357?source=ema20231204-235848&t=1001&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT ]Texas GOP rejected a proposal to ban the party
from associating with Nazi sympathizers and Holocaust deniers. It’s clear
that Texas Republicans have no interest in changing course after their
leading PACs were caught meeting with prominent white supremacists like
political commentator [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60358?source=ema20231204-235848&t=1002&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT ]Nick Fuentes.

Recent [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60359?source=ema20231204-235848&t=1003&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT ]investigative reports revealed how extremists and their dark
money PACs have purchased a stranglehold on the Texas GOP, buying off
lawmakers to enact policy that reflects their fringe views — like that
immigrants are coming to “replace” white people, that homosexuality is on
par with bestiality, and that women must be controlled.

That’s why Texas now has a total abortion ban, extreme attacks on LGBTQ+
families, and a southern border transformed into a death trap for
migrants. And it’s why we’re working so hard to register and mobilize the
voters we need to fire the lawmakers doing the bidding of these
extremists. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231204.15QqkQ&refcode=ema20231204-235848&t=1004&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT ]Please consider chipping in to Powered by People today to
help support this work.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231204.15QqkQ&refcode=ema20231204-235848&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT ]DONATE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Replacing failed border stunts with policy that works

On Friday, a federal appeals court [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60360?source=ema20231204-235848&t=1024&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT ]ordered Governor Abbott to remove
the floating wall of buoys he installed in the Rio Grande to ensnare and
drown migrants. The ruling comes nearly four months after the Department
of Justice filed a lawsuit against the buoys in July.

I want to thank the more than [ https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/em-202307-petition?source=ema20231204-235848&t=1025&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT ]60,000 people who signed our letter to
President Biden this summer encouraging his administration to stand up to
Abbott and remove these death traps. Friday’s ruling is proof that when we
work together, we can make a difference.

As migrant deaths at the border reach [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60361?source=ema20231204-235848&t=1026&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT ]an all-time high — including
here in El Paso, where a record 149 bodies have been recovered this year —
this is a critical moment to replace cruelty and political posturing with
border policy that actually works.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/58638?source=ema20231204-235848&t=1027&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT ]This is a great piece by FWD.us that lays out executive action that
can be taken to humanely address the challenges at our border in the
absence of congressional leadership.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Looking forward to seeing you tomorrow

Over 12,000 people have signed up for our 2024 Volunteer Kickoff tomorrow,
leaving me confident that we’re on track to launch the largest voter
mobilization effort in Texas history this coming year. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/volunteer-kickoff-webinar/?source=ema20231204-235848&t=1028&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT ]If you haven’t
yet, please RSVP to join us tomorrow.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/volunteer-kickoff-webinar/?source=ema20231204-235848&t=1029&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT ]Volunteer Kickoff Webinar

Tuesday, December 5, 2023
6:00 PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/volunteer-kickoff-webinar/?source=ema20231204-235848&t=1030&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT ]RSVP →

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I hope it’s a great week for you.

— Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1031&akid=235848%2E444211%2EN2gYZT

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Carole King
subject: Join my exclusive focus group:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, it's Carole King.

**In the face of extreme Republicans' chaos and cruelty, I'm so proud that our U.S. Senate Democrats have been able to deliver effective legislation to lift our families and communities.**

Democrats expanded access to affordable health care and defended our sacred right to vote. And when Republicans came for our personal rights and freedoms, Democrats stood up for us.

Senate Democrats have accomplished a lot, but the Republican onslaught against our shared values is relentless. Democrats need our active support so they can continue to fight for us and the values we share.

**With the 2024 election less than a year away, Democrats need to WIN a supercharged U.S. Senate majority - and here's something you can do right now:**

[**As 2024 approaches, our Senate Democrats want to know what matters most to you. That's why I'm asking you to join my exclusive focus group by taking a quick survey. Your input will be incredibly helpful in informing and supercharging our Democratic majority.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/16632?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231204-CaroleKing-CaroleKingSurvey2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231204-CaroleKing-CaroleKingSurvey2-Pros-sl1&akid=12796%2E9716520%2EcL-_7I)

I so appreciate everyone who has participated in these focus groups so far. Your responses were inspiring and heartening to our Democratic senators and our friends at the DSCC - and, also, to me. I can't wait to hear what you have to say next!

Whatever you do, don't lose hope. _You_ are the hope, and _we_ are a movement. Thank you for staying involved in whatever ways you can.

I wish you and everyone you love a joyful holiday season.
- Carole

| [](https://go.dscc.org/go/16632?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231204-CaroleKing-CaroleKingSurvey2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231204-CaroleKing-CaroleKingSurvey2-Pros-sl1&akid=12796%2E9716520%2EcL-_7I)Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center Honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority. And yes, Carole really did write this email.

clean_body: | | | Hi, it's Carole King. In the face of extreme Republicans' chaos and cruelty, I'm so proud that our U.S. Senate Democrats have been able to deliver effective legislation to lift our families and communities. Democrats expanded access to affordable health care and defended our sacred right to vote. And when Republicans came for our personal rights and freedoms, Democrats stood up for us. Senate Democrats have accomplished a lot, but the Republican onslaught against our shared values is relentless. Democrats need our active support so they can continue to fight for us and the values we share. With the 2024 election less than a year away, Democrats need to WIN a supercharged U.S. Senate majority - and here's something you can do right now: I so appreciate everyone who has participated in these focus groups so far. Your responses were inspiring and heartening to our Democratic senators and our friends at the DSCC - and, also, to me. I can't wait to hear what you have to say next! Whatever you do, don't lose hope. You are the hope, and we are a movement. Thank you for staying involved in whatever ways you can. I wish you and everyone you love a joyful holiday season. - Carole | King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center Honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority. And yes, Carole really did write this email. | | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. body:
We're both facing challengers this election year, who will have millions of dollars in support from pro-war interests that want to take us down. | |

On top of all of that, **both of us are facing challengers this election year, who will have millions of dollars in support from pro-war interests that want to take us down.** We won’t let that happen. clean_body: | | | a message from Our border is wide open. Crime is devouring cities. Our justice system is a joke. We don’t even know what a woman is. This is America under Joe Biden and a Democrat Senate, and if we don’t take back the Senate next year, things are going to get even worse. I’m not taking chances, and that’s why I’m working now to build a war chest that can get us through Election Day. My Democrat opponents have already raised over a million dollars to try and take me down. And if we lose this seat, we have no hope of taking back our Senate majority. Democrats are angry at me because they know I’m not afraid to stand up to their grotesque, woke social agenda. I’m not the kind who caves for one-sided “compromises.” I’m standing in the radical Left’s way - and now, they’re determined to get payback. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

Will you rush $14 before midnight? | **= = = = = = Thank you, Raja = =** | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | = | | Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: A View From The Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
I hope this message finds you in good spirits as we dive into the holiday season! I wanted to take a moment to share some exciting updates with you!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

I hope this message finds you in good spirits as we dive into the holiday season. I'm taking a brief pause from the campaign trail to share some exciting updates from the past week.

Read on for last week's highlights!

** In The News: Americans need an extra $11,400 today just to afford the basics (https://www.cbsnews.com/news/inflation-households-need-extra-11400-these-states-its-even-higher/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
Inflation and Bidenomics are squeezing Hoosier households. On average, they need an extra $11K just to keep up with rising costs. It's inexcusable.

This is why we need to #AxeTheTax. Hoosiers need relief and I'm willing to fight for it.
https://www.cbsnews.com/news/inflation-households-need-extra-11400-these-states-its-even-higher/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
ARTICLE (https://www.cbsnews.com/news/inflation-households-need-extra-11400-these-states-its-even-higher/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** In The News: IMPD officers save life of woman being held hostage (https://www.wishtv.com/news/crime-watch-8/impd-on-fatal-police-shooting-inside-semitruck-this-officer-saved-a-womans-life/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
Faced with a life-threatening situation, our IMPD officers risked everything to rescue a woman being held hostage.

Their swift and decisive actions saved a life. Our community is safer because of their heroic efforts.
https://www.wishtv.com/news/crime-watch-8/impd-on-fatal-police-shooting-inside-semitruck-this-officer-saved-a-womans-life/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
ARTICLE (https://www.wishtv.com/news/crime-watch-8/impd-on-fatal-police-shooting-inside-semitruck-this-officer-saved-a-womans-life/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Meeting with Carmel FOP President
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Engaging with Carmel FOP President Blake Lytle was a standout moment last week. Our discussion centered on enhancing support for our dedicated police officers.

As a strong advocate for law enforcement, I take pride in standing firmly behind our officers, offering unwavering support to those who selflessly serve and safeguard our communities.

** Supporting our First Responders
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Grateful for the opportunity to meet with Carmel's brave firefighters and police officers this week.

These brave individuals play a crucial role in ensuring the safety and well-being of our communities. Appreciate their insights into the challenges they face and how we can support their vital work!

** Touring First City Recovery Center
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

First City Recovery Center is a beacon of hope for those battling addiction and mental health challenges.

Their commitment to individualized care and family support is making a real impact in Hoosier’s lives.

Thank you to the First City Recovery Center team for the tour!

** Hamilton County Roundtable
------------------------------------------------------------
Last week, I️ had a fantastic meeting with business leaders in Hamilton County. We discussed my plan to #AxeTheTax and other crucial economic issues.

The path to prosperity lies in putting more money back in your pockets and fostering a business-friendly environment.

** Spreading Christmas Cheer in Madison
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

It was heartwarming to witness the community come together for the Very Merry Madison Christmas Parade!

This annual event is a delightful celebration that welcomes Santa and the holiday season to Madison.

The parade showcased amazing floats, marching bands, and Santa with his live reindeer.

** A Festive Evening with Clark County Republicans
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Closing out the week, I had the honor of speaking at the Clark County Republican Party's Christmas Dinner, hosted by the Clark County Republican Women's Club.

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Together, we celebrated the achievements of the past year and looked ahead to the opportunities that lie on Indiana's horizon.

** Last Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Suzanne Crouch has made public service a priority in her life, and I find that admirable. She is the genuine article. Her dedication to Hoosier values and her work ethic continue to serve Indiana well.”
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I'm 100% for Suzanne Crouch. I've known her for many years. She's one of the few politicians who put our Indiana citizens first. If our voters want the best Governor for Indiana, VOTE FOR SUZANNE CROUCH!"

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Not only is Suzanne paving the way for conservative women everywhere, but she is doing it with grace and dignity. She is approachable and transparent. Her passion for improving the mental health of our citizens is commendable and is sorely needed. Her accolades are many, and her experience is unmatched. I am so excited to see Indiana’s future with Suzanne at the helm."
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I am proud to endorse my mentor and friend, Suzanne Crouch, as Indiana’s next Governor.

Her experience, knowledge, work ethic, and intelligence make her the best choice to run our great state!"

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

As we continue on the campaign trail, your unwavering support continues to drive our success. I am grateful for each one of you who has joined #TeamCrouch. Together, we will bring positive change to the great state of Indiana.

Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful and blessed holiday season.

Onward and upward,

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Twitter (https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Website (https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com)

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.
GET INVOLVED (https://crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers!
------------------------------------------------------------
Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future.

If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events:
For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at:
heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .

** Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise!
------------------------------------------------------------

As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)!
SHOP (https://shop.crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=bd5dec38e7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_11_27_03_55&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bd5dec38e7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

body:

Imagine you and your family sitting back, relaxing and enjoying your evening... Riding out the storm and the power outage in total safety and with total peace of mind. You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2r9duugbjk4kuutfn11hscgsttnru5isjjmfpi8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6cor5cth2bs) **More Raving Reviews From Customers** | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgfucuqdmpokpq2ejc2jqkasrmj3q5ur3q0b5rso_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6cor5cth2bs)

name: Will Rollins
subject: being gay was still considered a crime
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UPLIFT ILLINOIS PAC
body:
| |
---
Hey Peter, Like many, my partner Paolo and I came of age at a time when being gay was still considered a crime in many states. I often reflect back to when I was 17 years old in the wake of 9/11. I had a deep sense of duty to serve the country, but policies like “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” discouraged me from joining the military. Thanks to the brave LGBTQ+ Americans who came before me and had the courage to come out, I eventually got the chance to work openly in law enforcement and counterterrorism. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74542118/441927530/-342662042?refcode=upl-em-231204-split_rollins&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQyYjJkOWItYzE5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=04nKD8v-IinPFztaj9XkAAr94jAdgqrYfapmTIc6maI=) _Paolo and I recently at Palm Springs Pride._ Despite the strides we've taken toward equality, the recent election of Speaker Mike Johnson proves the GOP is hell-bent on turning back the clock on LGBTQ+ rights. Johnson’s record reads like something out of an anti-LGBTQ+ hate group’s wish list. Aside from voting against marriage equality just last year, he:
* Is on record supporting the _criminalization_ of sexual acts between consenting LGBTQ+ adults,
* Previously worked with an organization that pushed so-called conversion therapy,
* Claimed that a ‘homosexual agenda’ will destroy society and likened being LGBTQ+ to pedophilia and bestiality. _Really_.

The fact that the Speaker of the House doesn’t respect Paolo's and my right to love is shocking -- especially in 2023. And the fact that Ken Calvert and the _entire_ Republican Party handed him the Speaker’s gavel is even more horrifying. We can send a clear message that rejects Johnson’s hateful agenda by turning the House blue next year. That starts by flipping CA-41. **[Can you please split whatever you can afford between Uplift Illinois and our campaign to help us flip CA-41, defeat Ken Calvert, and restore decency to Peter,
Our friend and dedicated public servant, Congresswoman Lori Chavez-DeRemer of Oregon, has officially declared her re-election campaign. I was among the first to endorse Lori in 2022 when she first ran, and I am excited to throw my support behind her again in 2024.

Lori has been a tireless advocate for the people of Oregon, working diligently to address the unique challenges facing her constituents. From championing small businesses to promoting education and healthcare initiatives, Lori has consistently demonstrated her commitment to positively impacting the lives of those she serves.

As someone who understands the importance of strong, principled leadership in Congress, I believe that Lori is the right person to continue representing the people of Oregon. Her dedication to common-sense solutions and bipartisan collaboration sets her apart as a true leader in these divisive times.

Now, more than ever, we need representatives like Lori Chavez-DeRemer, who are committed to putting the needs of their constituents first and working towards a better, more prosperous future for all Americans.
