clean_body: | | | | Peter, Our friend and dedicated public servant, Congresswoman Lori Chavez-DeRemer of Oregon, has officially declared her re-election campaign. I was among the first to endorse Lori in 2022 when she first ran, and I am excited to throw my support behind her again in 2024. Lori has been a tireless advocate for the people of Oregon, working diligently to address the unique challenges facing her constituents. From championing small businesses to promoting education and healthcare initiatives, Lori has consistently demonstrated her commitment to positively impacting the lives of those she serves. As someone who understands the importance of strong, principled leadership in Congress, I believe that Lori is the right person to continue representing the people of Oregon. Her dedication to common-sense solutions and bipartisan collaboration sets her apart as a true leader in these divisive times. Now, more than ever, we need representatives like Lori Chavez-DeRemer, who are committed to putting the needs of their constituents first and working towards a better, more prosperous future for all Americans. Join me and support Lori's re-election campaign: Thank you for your continued support of principled leaders like Lori Chavez-DeRemer. Together, we can ensure that she continues to represent the values and aspirations of the people of Oregon and America. | Elise Stefanik | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Elise Stefanik 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08671cc6895b4d35a7109e3d2c31769f&_e=_yKFmkjDt8pkYW3DHHXmDOwyRi1YwF2pG2wyG4mZCv4dhc7l7okpirmkhkVqySJapOefsXN7E77nJvJCej3YsZiCzZOXjHX8BG5hAmQBnjk9whTfGCtzdRDB9pcOkvUtuqV-6FS_6Owge48JLJHm962R1058s1tKsOncv_F2OZuouFF7tGKLKJ-17mJXwIhBBW42nAKTdolQOwDOZGtS_1kD9f0f5Suh7ybj79AGYassCXle2yoT7SpJ1GxiQWL9l6hS30EnbdBG3fycrbEnoyomfB0DYkxbvSreXT0OKvJxWOLcZJgAsgMTtTxVPgygdk8qr2nVvdCBmRpWKCdDznwvvd7IlsSDuI_j7OwmAbs%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08671cc6895b4d35a7109e3d2c31769f&_e=_yKFmkjDt8pkYW3DHHXmDOwyRi1YwF2pG2wyG4mZCv4dhc7l7okpirmkhkVqySJapOefsXN7E77nJvJCej3YsZiCzZOXjHX8BG5hAmQBnjk9whTfGCtzdRDB9pcOkvUtuqV-6FS_6Owge48JLJHm962R1058s1tKsOncv_F2OZuouFF7tGKLKJ-17mJXwIhBBW42nAKTdolQOwDOZGtS_xq1HHrLYtUwrRPueDYa7VJR6XnLq0fZB9zOltrKIJNiOnPrIFZBDmE9wzZEMx80GCjp9XB3bMP88AQfFHKCqK2fhzg9ydc0nUnznHlEM2n-h_Fk36IHW71XoPKcBAK_w4syWcdmdHEL4sM88BMFv0Q%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08671cc6895b4d35a7109e3d2c31769f&_e=_yKFmkjDt8pkYW3DHHXmDOwyRi1YwF2pG2wyG4mZCv4dhc7l7okpirmkhkVqySJapOefsXN7E77nJvJCej3YsZiCzZOXjHX8BG5hAmQBnjk9whTfGCtzdRDB9pcOkvUtuqV-6FS_6Owge48JLJHm962R1058s1tKsOncv_F2OZuouFF7tGKLKJ-17mJXwIhBBW42nAKTdolQOwDOZGtS_6YGQvUejsly1YMVkRIsTLIdxoUrLYsUbSAGK0-atzJlCJUb8vEn7Um0PfCMsXoakEIGCyxLNSBHhyuDpYu_B0z8MEq1yQBhjCOykmBwnxPEMfvj0Rar-r3ah5ydOJJnHBm68QXt0ElL_kJGxowurgg%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08671cc6895b4d35a7109e3d2c31769f&_e=_yKFmkjDt8pkYW3DHHXmDOwyRi1YwF2pG2wyG4mZCv4dhc7l7okpirmkhkVqySJapOefsXN7E77nJvJCej3YsZiCzZOXjHX8BG5hAmQBnjk9whTfGCtzdRDB9pcOkvUtuqV-6FS_6Owge48JLJHm962R1058s1tKsOncv_F2OZuouFF7tGKLKJ-17mJXwIhBBW42nAKTdolQOwDOZGtS_1poEeaAMfUuTEejVz1M8pAHvDU0KriEVbjGT4rnZH5sHQT4KVUQg8p_47Zp4C_SukRYxgE1U1VmdU8LQbjuYEfdayeQr0YP0-144JUCBYvMbkgNossHfGe8TiAz_-X1R5qSzUj8bjCwt97EmWXsGpg%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=08671cc6895b4d35a7109e3d2c31769f&_t=Hewou_gEl3RsoJPsGkWNcrjBq7w4MO8uWdw_kfIwVNTMoPEDXmKC1GW6BcZ_1bIEiLcPTgaTon7oixS5z79Cae54DuinY70Ani-vmFBsprPC7B3f8le7uB6feetWl2QT9FJBaLb4s-9tMwNiBOC7vnLFoQwm0hlXXqC3jdHr51E%3D)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsjqoml4p1t5m5gd9bf5euvaejf9067skjpeibf8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6aob2c9h2bs)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---

---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpovb69l610vi03leerv0ajiabmlr0iaa4ltbr28_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6aob2c9h2bs).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress

subject: Thank you for joining my team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've taken my battle-ready position on the front lines, and I'm holding Washington accountable. We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_s=7832f101793f4555847a1ec9239f87a8&_t=QkS-9Y1D_O3jVqecBfCZ1v1JHtVS5SSlEOtuTKUbUIsGBHsTygTdOwkm5P83OvfHmRWRDNIe93nXMr16EZ9-zC5jpErWVT23JW5LKSiVA58%3D)

| [](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=7832f101793f4555847a1ec9239f87a8&_e=HYoDp5-3aE5WHHF_cT_MkrGGcPkV8AlxmNUCmLdHMlWVazFLakSNndkkDjhrfuCyjlGkH4fjVfIMu0HsAzfpD0le9di3vJ2cdpM0TbuI1z7UTBKxz2vnf0TCS6prKN2DQuk0E4SCTtz2AkmEPq9kr0FPmioIsT2vf4T186-IbMAzHkBxyVngtnUA9BX8HY5DRE_i9cZ6oppp-gu9vTJPgPufZyKCXcLrjxjFS7_KakXaME-5MwDMd-5y5iG21-vcFHYqIXoNDjRtRIOwNrOaJjdATqupGxMcyMJmu5r-BD2C_UGOqwJ6z7VgT0PpbJPKwfgQajbks0TuwDHMt1p9va08kZ2KIwsk5NMvPuPY0Dw%3D)
---

Fellow American,

Thank you for joining my team. I’m so grateful you’ve taken an interest in our movement.

I've taken my battle-ready position on the front lines, and I'm holding Washington accountable.

I fight to stop the out of control borrowing and spending that is bankrupting our country. I go to work every day to ensure hard-working Americans that someone is providing aggressive oversight to both the bureaucrats and politicians in D.C.

And because I've been such an effective voice, I'm a major target of the Left and most Washington special interests.

Thank you for standing with me and helping to keep up the fight.

For freedom,

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol" – Our newest free online course
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=287fb11a38464bdda3be10daf9c0c60e&_e=AEPZFauRbtRgsiz-fFFidskNyWE2tf38Y0wQRs2CvlEN8Cq76cE4t0Ht1oUDdN4RIkFyD6RQR-WOKAhv9DKlOgb53v-FnIsxYFKOQG2R5PfVsfALU9pV9QnLljTIr7b8tsUd38SSfoWPC7eyDtfFPjt1bpfDzQpCuKIeqpKGC4DVXxXJrz3CimpvHp5Y2P72IftXM434h76v6j73ASe1Mlbx5WTxEqa_6LJLqCKrwsj3auJ2Eor6_TWyVrHSOgmyJ1Wn9HLN-MvLDC1HkY6wqQeYFqeEaCI0c2M-8egR8-UEVO4Km8gwMB74INVjQzTsrifFCK4lkt7lMiSIstaKQje-ID-bUn5MIcct-dX0j1Vff2w20FKc3XU2DnA9I1Yv65zH0fFhWcyxd_hjlir7rA%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=287fb11a38464bdda3be10daf9c0c60e&_e=AEPZFauRbtRgsiz-fFFidskNyWE2tf38Y0wQRs2CvlEN8Cq76cE4t0Ht1oUDdN4RIkFyD6RQR-WOKAhv9DKlOgb53v-FnIsxYFKOQG2R5PfVsfALU9pV9QnLljTIr7b8tsUd38SSfoWPC7eyDtfFPjt1bpfDzQpCuKIeqpKGC4DVXxXJrz3CimpvHp5Y2P72IftXM434h76v6j73ASe1Mlbx5WTxEqa_6LJLqCKrwsj3auJ2Eor6_TWyVrHSOgmyXHxcUR-Y6pR4GTwso7Qk8hk8bTKcCEmSbi1KUO4uzdsv7BIEcRQcXg4Kr1oPwMgMPiB3gRFGrBhF_sfte3wZ1dx3xQmKVTlynuvdYa9JgdN9FesRU7DJnJkzO8J-9BviPICF3IESxMQ9iFnad49blA%3D%3D)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhvt98s595fa99pdc43kj0a5sa5r9ak1lbqa0ar8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj2c9h2bs)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztjpoedhgl5l5b354jc4uirmq2antlkvfupv84c0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj2c9h2bs)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z85jdbpqj35jru7a6m6lot1kkbamkb41so76l3qo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj2c9h2bs).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfrb9fg27j687pq3lag7gerfthc2qmhrnv4tn8v0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj2c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp32c1iecp72c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi2r68885vu5h223uuskikg9pgm2qjfffr5c5e6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj2c9h2bs)_

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8R7USfdg7UI0A3ldUppAxtkKDwQ45yCKbA8TM1Uqhy9MB6SWADb4YImpfkihmGvELLHKBr1KcLW_VrKR44dKk_O1XSS-ZwlFUGyoamtM_ML6jNF9vyCLy-Ox1cp3sN6TSn4J6Lxl5YAAQSntyynWPpAVqaU5zX4oPB_OSGIQ3AgVqJXw0JOdo2jqee79CuL5Z4gsIBFd8FmS_KsuqmLj-3A82suZIeI0viHeGSfh8kGDtbx717HPmWRplPCKs8m0dNeL1QkT-Oo_uq1ZJdnw0JlbGlNmdtCsGAwhno8FvSg4HaeNmRV57e26UqdZBmIfSsMvdbFmn_y6ppofL-YOupfCH1KhVzQWzkh6RezS6dgH/41u/zCdC2NVFT5qghuZoSE5R9w/h0/3qRQmfVzcpFWoYuw-jH7iMLfg_wNAtAKMPHSHp3pJx8)
| | Peter,

On Election Day just a few weeks back, TCP-endorsed candidates fought for their respective seats nationwide. **The results called for a runoff in three crucial races in Houston, TX, on December 9th.**

We need to get more Black representation into office, and this runoff is the perfect opportunity. But we can’t do it alone. We need help from our grassroots supporters like you, Peter. [Will you help us put more TCP-endorsed Black leaders into critical seats by donating $10 to our Houston runoff fund today?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRct0wTpiBV2DY6Oz846aOQs-lIfMwx8B1QQg8OiXp8g-4LIxKKSZvm-jwbyki4xj-0hwd3UtSw5t6kbe0kpnnJ6tajvcBBzWvmtyAe2tynlSVVDTWmAfdqA0zebCenR42OW-RAEyRH-OdGQDREktTteZzBwikHe8h659dgUnchaempSiX16j9_5Cdj-luhm-hAqeTRhzVS2GbposwIgu8JzdGFQH8wDLK6244aedpSc-xWGZqRbkvjk9ltJxM6AffizeUdzXrOIK4s_saFNxbWMFclXSzYDfvURoFQdejyilbFtx9F6WjhpuQVMYJejybFwkkJcpuydq4TU3ssmB9ecBUTtXohIF1zIFycMaACG7foV0kQmQDMxCXZzbwvDkjU-M0hMrqtWI_-mXt5bMGCg/41u/zCdC2NVFT5qghuZoSE5R9w/h1/oqnAIj2NK90Pwy_XgWbhHxiQ_Gpm513Y7ydicu1mqfY) | | [I'M IN!](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRo1_VQFLGg3Go52Wf05MtdGv8d_YW39BLFVaxyRaZVixu_McIcVIEUeEol6lhLWHIkhREdMisMCM5bMcOaYA6ugrbP1gAiWkDeRx_imqLqsojUw5858CzPMzCI66PGBvfocpX5qxvEuInoSC4d3WCKAMvdhJz-1XImzinPHCtBuyQqqYdesjXKE4ybrP36jNv1UqTQUG2ikNRHrw6JB0ALoNS0JJVnohFDpnT_gWe6t3BjXxfrhD7CQcKdC8ISdu3jaOb_rT3S2kCgeWNGWaU0GOXKpLBhPtvG4PMU-Y4CxmowhJZGnB72gAD6kX-qQ5bXMevcxAbO3pYo6AYGs3Ns4FImIXRTvdkfSDljYFr9pv8s6fKMSRQggNxG6GQfpgTiHfiEo-0PGU-3Cb7_hpIwg/41u/zCdC2NVFT5qghuZoSE5R9w/h2/KwuW0M3UJLstxnYSUu1SnOkNuJ1AHrqZCC78FlDxZMA)
---
_Who are we fighting for?_ you may ask. Well, let us introduce you: **Letitia Plummer for City Council, Sheila Jackson Lee for Mayor, and Chris Hollins for Controller.**

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRct0wTpiBV2DY6Oz846aOQs-lIfMwx8B1QQg8OiXp8g-4LIxKKSZvm-jwbyki4xj-0hwd3UtSw5t6kbe0kpnnJ6tajvcBBzWvmtyAe2tynlSVVDTWmAfdqA0zebCenR42Dc6Svh6nOmf1wUTgywYvDTnOGIjmCU7HnSEKcRdbtgzWTb5KKlN5mOYuncisryUzn01Jdloeun_9qzeOUqrfT46WdJHTLSYixs71UzLSyGpe1cMMG_raBeVGwy8LT3W8ZHwie06R8oyP7PU38NoeU_N4f2KnK3O_d7GLZ0rGyuUmBvYYZWx3syxmSMoSSk9j_o8t7WIJyo_kAK1T9HYlEIDwgM-ISxa_GoAWwjmE2jZIu1Z3MDJLH5KRXPuEeghtf33qNP3BNyqXZbW5Efp1xw/41u/zCdC2NVFT5qghuZoSE5R9w/h3/yPX8PQZNnvp6Hv0IkfvybA92h_eUMvzmBPwQNtZMDtQ)
**We _need_ to keep our candidates’ opponents _out_ of office,** with their conservative stances such as putting more police on our streets and implementing harsher sentences–neither of which make our communities safer.

[Peter, will you help us keep harmful leaders out of Houston’s government by chipping in $10 today?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRct0wTpiBV2DY6Oz846aOQs-lIfMwx8B1QQg8OiXp8g-4LIxKKSZvm-jwbyki4xj-0hwd3UtSw5t6kbe0kpnnJ6tajvcBBzWvmtyAe2tynlSVVDTWmAfdqA0zebCenR429RxCtNCdhfFKzfQZAmf4KTODR--B4hJaXKsAtESRWxebh2xP2w5KT3WStW45L_Cwx7YgHZ4SYgtUd3unxQg_c8vcVqgqaflUU7o0aYzr6jZWHrbLy5Z1leBVVUeFiXF9PO2ZofDY4nqew6-_TFbSuiFV9q-y7xMWeoF4_TxTvkUUKeYZRjiqjKnNU1GD1LL65ByCqGh-D5fyzwpqxTSkrbIlSDrHm05dSM6HhbKvNUoPeVw2dGFc_QjEzIgsgIZTjZpIhTRI1CskKUtJ-V-KcA/41u/zCdC2NVFT5qghuZoSE5R9w/h4/Njf4Btl-1iwGwnNrR3KPYm5ZTY1qrfqHPDxq3Qh0cR8)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, On Election Day just a few weeks back, TCP-endorsed candidates fought for their respective seats nationwide. The results called for a runoff in three crucial races in Houston, TX, on December 9th. We need to get more Black representation into office, and this runoff is the perfect opportunity. But we can’t do it alone. We need help from our grassroots supporters like you, Peter. | | Who are we fighting for? you may ask. Well, let us introduce you: Letitia Plummer for City Council, Sheila Jackson Lee for Mayor, and Chris Hollins for Controller. We need to keep our candidates’ opponents out of office, with their conservative stances such as putting more police on our streets and implementing harsher sentences–neither of which make our communities safer. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you for your support, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: GOP Presidential
subject: Never Fear Blackouts Again: Discover the 8-Pound Solar Generator that Defies Blackouts and Toxic Fumes!
body:
these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA...

_**The Future of Solar Energy Is Here**_
# Breakthrough 8-Pound Solar Generator Is The Ultimate Protection Against Dangerous Blackouts And Toxic Fumes
A dangerous storm strikes... And in a flash... Supplies vanish in your city. Grocery stores... EMPTY. Water... SOLD OUT. Batteries... SOLD OUT. Gas stations... SOLD OUT. And without gas, that means no gas generators to keep your lights on, and no way to protect yourself and your family during a dangerous black out. Entire neighborhoods in darkness... **But picture this...** Instead of panicking and fumbling around in the dark, fearful and without supplies like everyone else... Imagine you and your family sitting back, relaxing and enjoying your evening... Riding out the storm and the power outage in total safety and with total peace of mind. All because you have the [**Patriot Power Sidekick**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb6uplh9pq1km5f9o7vavm7fg87rj6cj77chu75g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj4cjh2bs), a revolutionary, mini solar generator that powers all your important devices, keeps lights on, **never needs gas, and costs less than an iPhone!** Well you can! For the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get this breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about... **The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmgbcu261etpssqs1fhf56tgn1dj67kdb9r3cua8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj4cjh2bs)
[**Order Today and Get $243 of FREE Gifts!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv0rvreet45cges03kt7949ltdu961ufk6g24mv8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj4cjh2bs) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpl283j4ir521brpoujndm90ihkc31e04gqagoig_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj4cjh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zav6u6eb1813ml1uo46gkinkmlcch4mpakcmgd80_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj4cjh2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2patnt5i8b82qr413verc3e0c7soks9j5cbkt4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj4cjh2bs) **More Raving Reviews From Customers** | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsrkqng6jf7sce3deids5ec1frtl2d9p5kaucts8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj4cjh2bs)

name: The Exodus Effect
subject: One of my favorite announcements yet
body:
You need to see this ->

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zot5lm60th7pa5o7t3mcs39p21s91ab9orlv41l0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs)
---

Friend, I have exciting news to share with you...

**Our FIRST television ad of my presidential campaign is now LIVE on the airwaves in Iowa and New Hampshire!**

_Do you know what this means?_

**Our hard work is paying off Friend! **

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our ad is live and we now have the opportunity to reach **MILLIONS** of Americans with my message, gain ground with voters who may still be undecided going into this election, and take one step closer to **VICTORY! **

**[Will you rush a donation to help us keep our ad on the airwaves?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2i72c331sp0micu5kuo53cfab6sdoupvibf1fto_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs "Will you rush a donation to help us keep our ad on the airwaves?")**

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmmlh61ssacgmmccd61ndc3op7b0u4rs4hm01keo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs)
---
| | [WATCH THE AD & CHIP IN TO KEEP IT LIVE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1kgcbl4gfl1222j2l7of1ggb6r5k13jjkts1jc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs)
---

Launching our first ad is a **HUGE** milestone for our campaign, and it will play a **KEY** role in strengthening our movement ahead of the first votes in just 6 weeks.

_But it also costs a lot of money to keep television ads up and running! _

That's why I would really appreciate your help in keeping our _**FIRST**_ ad on air. I want to reach every American with our message, and I know I can't do it without you.

**[Will you send in $10, $25, $47, or whatever you can today?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk3gre9d9ae8uuqf968h47gn1qk762om9j1l7p08_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs "Will you send in $10, $25, $47, or whatever you can today?")**

At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. It costs a lot of money to run a winning presidential campaign, but you can rest assured that every single dollar you give is put to good use and stretched as far as it can go.

**[Please consider chipping in to keep our ads LIVE so we can finish the race STRONG and WIN on Election Day!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4878gc9tco4iq2l0q6v0e46id195jglh1905ev8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs "Please consider chipping in to keep our ads LIVE so we can finish the race STRONG and WIN on Election Day!")**

---
| | [CHIP IN TO KEEP OUR AD ON THE AIR](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zft4aao81nkgj5cjm2hng7i7bbkljph8vt6f84j0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs)
---

Thank you for believing in my fight for our future. You are an essential part of this journey, Friend.

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg84fcrrp66llj191s1jht2bkserpqmmdf81f9n8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkp3j4t6oqd8ba3vsloesn4ta41sth6op5mk3ta0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv8o0bop51p1jfvsk7rg70uj0igk7pq3msu641o0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR WRAPPING PAPER](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqmcg3vqv3q6uam5a91dg85583mcfm7e2vv61nkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5ek6r5his9vcu2m0k04s607793kgi7nitupr5gg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| |
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs13163aehr9g5kro747h28s5u2l1imteeviidsg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk2a2f53cf5464d1irlidb20jhp0g2pvo6k99hto_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv66gd0u9oo6rfuke7p9md0h82o5hdc8n5553e28_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth6eoj6clh2bs "DONATE")
---

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Two more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
There was a lot of excitement post-debate, and also a lot going on in the world at the same time.

Friends —
There was a lot of excitement post-debate, and also a lot going on in the world at the same time. So I wanted to share two important clips and questions that, to me, do a good job of highlighting the stakes of the next election.
First, are we going to continue to move our country's economic future forward under Joe Biden, or are we going to let Republicans take us backward again?
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3040?t=1&akid=1702%2E4767699%2EGg8aXx)
Then, are we going to reverse the attack on women's rights under Republican rule, or are we going to move our country forward again and ensure women have the care and rights they deserve?
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3041?t=2&akid=1702%2E4767699%2EGg8aXx)
Thank you for reading, watching, sharing, and supporting my work to help re-elect Joe Biden and Democrats everywhere.
\- Gavin
* * *
👉🏻 **Hi.** Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans like Ron DeSantis and Donald Trump with a zest for demonization.
We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If it sounds worth it that Democrats fight back everywhere rights are under attack – even in Red States – we are asking you to contribute $20 to Gavin Newsom’s Campaign for Democracy today. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in.
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-dec23?express_lane=true&amount20&refcode=em231204-1-15&refcode2=1702_4767699_Gg8aXx&akid=1702%2E4767699%2EGg8aXx)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-dec23?express_lane=true&refcode=em231204-1-15&refcode2=1702_4767699_Gg8aXx&akid=1702%2E4767699%2EGg8aXx)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1702%2E4767699%2EGg8aXx).

1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

| | Dear fellow Patriots,

I wanted to ask you to join me on Tuesday, December 5 from 7:00 p.m. to 8:30 p.m. (doors open at 6:30) for a special conservative event at the Beck Event Space, 210 S. Independence Street in Harrisonville.

That evening, I will be joining my good friends Sen. Rick Brattin, Aaron Dorr of the Missouri Firearms Coalition, and Rev. Matt Goodsell of Capitol Ministries for a gathering with local conservatives who are interested in protecting our faith, our families, and our freedoms.

You can RSVP to join me by clicking [here](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=a24f614219&e=c00a6982d2).

It's going to be a great time! See you soon!

Bill

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: 5 for $5
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=877%2E135344%2EiQuM4B)

Team,
**Today, we have five reasons why we're asking you to contribute $5 to Elissa's campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan. Here it goes:**
1\. The path to defending the Senate and keeping the White House blue runs right through Michigan. Last month, CNN said Michigan is one of the top ten states that could flip red in 2024 – which would essentially guarantee a Republican-held Senate.
2\. Betsy DeVos and her billionaire family are contributing huge amounts of money to tip the scales in favor of one of our GOP opponents, Mike Rogers.
3\. The holidays typically slow down our fundraising, which means we need to double down on our efforts to reach the very real internal goals we've set for our campaign, early in December.
4\. A brand new poll shows both the Michigan Senate race and the Presidential race are neck-and-neck, which means National Republicans will be throwing everything they can at this notorious swing state to flip it red. We are preparing to fight back against millions of dollars in outside spending across the state.
5\. We have four Republican opponents in this race who are tripping over themselves to prove who can appeal to the extreme far-right base the most. They are willing to do and say anything to get elected — even at the expense of average Michiganders.
[**With those reasons in mind, can you contribute $5 to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate today? She needs your help to put our campaign in the strongest position possible to defend this seat for Democrats.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231204-1-tt&t=2&akid=877%2E135344%2EiQuM4B)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/564?c0=ebs-em-dec23.3ydF7F&refcode=em231204-1-tt&t=3&akid=877%2E135344%2EiQuM4B)**
---
****

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-dec23.XsjWsV&refcode=em231204-1-tt&t=5&akid=877%2E135344%2EiQuM4B)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-dec23.BggGbr&refcode=em231204-1-tt&t=6&akid=877%2E135344%2EiQuM4B)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-dec23.-ustVI&refcode=em231204-1-tt&t=7&akid=877%2E135344%2EiQuM4B)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-dec23.qFDyf8&refcode=em231204-1-tt&t=8&akid=877%2E135344%2EiQuM4B)**
---
****
Thank you for all you've done — and will do — to help send Elissa Slotkin to the Senate.
\- Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN

East Lansing, MI 48826

name: John James
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
Can I count on you to join me in this fight, Friend?

---
| | | | | | | |

** Friend**, I wanted to take a minute to introduce myself.

I'm John James. I'm a Combat Veteran, a successful businessman, a man of faith, a Congressman, and most importantly a father.

Like you, ** ** Friend, I'm sick and tired of weak leaders running our country into the ground. Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are FAILING Americans- we deserve better.

When I served in combat, I looked evil dead in the face. I witnessed the destruction that can occur when evil is in charge and I fought every damn day to ENSURE freedom would be protected at home.

I've never backed down from a fight, ** ** Friend. I might've volunteered for a new kind of fight when I was elected to Congress, but I will not rest until we have defeated the tyrannical Left and taken our country back.

That starts by winning TOP TIER House seats and keeping the House from Nancy Pelosi and her woke mob. **[Will you step up today?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9a01467888df430bae226a81a14fe09d&_e=Q9pVHh6ZQSF4umdQ_8HgVuH_3h2WlYk-FlI2Wi3eB6annOj2xysD58qIWy48zdMmqrmucqI-r0qhmvfOrw9VPFW4-RtxY0KfJ590-QWIMf5CnXjQjl2qzNXY1yInXsSa5gGHhqTTeCmtRudAvlP1gzIGded4rzZGDL0Y6p5SAo9G_huGHZTc_k5i4IK2gSLyKhzXpzkrQyTa_wOS8L1jCPPSAZG6Hq5QdaYxJ3lN_bj_1GnfryhGdPVFxLjEDuYkgtOUXZNI1RkgQl8cCBjEPWSFc5HU43ZzM54j94UTX3jUW9F9O05mjxFygmMmhlQWa_QmHVgxNoRwlKYnowAG1mjHe7MdPrx2njCPIS2nxDytZOaY0BrkiZZIkzEM3EE_g0a4REKMMg6--VDnAlQdHX7Cq9WP7I4RoVLP6qlFzbFDtuvCYKaLJUfDwWKnrpUpd1ComuFYFjOKP5NDTzh65w%3D%3D "Will you step up today?")**

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89d0c0078627422fb05da30e20efc391&_e=hgiXfre72pm7kly7hOEPoKrMSgt8am-5jGNvEHyOGMRfWEoWHCP2nlNR-p5Ct510Uy9mPyz2dTbTW_2DgcNQAPdgi9ASgIJAR8Zz3YtnLf9swl3G0NV3qhESUK4gdBwM8sSSjRgFWxLImktaR8J0qS03zGaI8T1D4mY4p0BpgW9-vC0ynqVishc990UiYWjNrHoheMLeciz5rHofNY3uzOYtqVsyXgP69OQenkhVzri09kvPVH3mSQUw-vRnWGQgG9Aa-K00ByKOP7aVvzfuBod_2JmNqv-pLqdFWEGKXtbOLs_1seo_y5PzhA0boGjM8EpxJ9JLVW0NFHSKfcjP3-5zJpPAkjyoNhs1JEnANIw%3D)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89d0c0078627422fb05da30e20efc391&_e=hgiXfre72pm7kly7hOEPoKrMSgt8am-5jGNvEHyOGMRfWEoWHCP2nlNR-p5Ct510Uy9mPyz2dTbTW_2DgcNQAPdgi9ASgIJAR8Zz3YtnLf9swl3G0NV3qhESUK4gdBwM8sSSjRgFWxLImktaR8J0qS03zGaI8T1D4mY4p0BpgW9-vC0ynqVishc990UiYWjNrHoheMLeciz5rHofNY3uzLp7SAKLps3lcakC5Dz76ZOWo3Vukuv9khAi6ZHpjsvP0sb-eWwgwFChcamiZW8_l7BHhEn1NpkIQyEmESs4AjXCEQGU4vsrJcq_zDtWpS5fKWxGPNYxMI4RxMuwMy_xHN0NladGLML1-E2ICuUzlPA%3D)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89d0c0078627422fb05da30e20efc391&_e=hgiXfre72pm7kly7hOEPoKrMSgt8am-5jGNvEHyOGMRfWEoWHCP2nlNR-p5Ct510Uy9mPyz2dTbTW_2DgcNQAPdgi9ASgIJAR8Zz3YtnLf9swl3G0NV3qhESUK4gdBwM8sSSjRgFWxLImktaR8J0qS03zGaI8T1D4mY4p0BpgW9-vC0ynqVishc990UiYWjNrHoheMLeciz5rHofNY3uzLgJhQLgIuhE_LE5A5zpc1K5qB-iar_E7kBWGt0uMzoc1gpn_i9-6AdocV9UElkOmHdMvrPOUwPVq_TzFPg6XqfoQn2l5t1SUqk1lF4ooRVmKnguLuEoKr3Pi-jZBn8YjxtJp9_KWB1yna6TDgq16is%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89d0c0078627422fb05da30e20efc391&_e=hgiXfre72pm7kly7hOEPoKrMSgt8am-5jGNvEHyOGMRfWEoWHCP2nlNR-p5Ct510Uy9mPyz2dTbTW_2DgcNQAPdgi9ASgIJAR8Zz3YtnLf9swl3G0NV3qhESUK4gdBwM8sSSjRgFWxLImktaR8J0qS03zGaI8T1D4mY4p0BpgW9-vC0ynqVishc990UiYWjNrHoheMLeciz5rHofNY3uzA6qhLPhoTfFWG9G8M0ZqqadMavAwCKVIFLnz6cetT77rmyD3Qku-fVZRaLM5Voxud6dFG-jZ525DeGX8BfwofJMFjGKx7-JV9YN54bhHDmT9ZsuptZUK3g7rE3JC7uk-EmwS-cTXXq5ddH6soACuUo%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9ee0fb859064572b92a8cb389a271bd&_e=eli4edSJakcw_sEwc4ogbxGYae5Uk0CDrLqbGEzekc7W-2-wpKHPyuDH7pkr3Q0QmRJPWe6mT7B4VfEbp9-37PTh8hLQeSD2gnkkYEpU0F8eQ0ZU9GXgaaZ9KCPKIPYKm6wZRyN9fT9k2LQCoVVQm9vIHF43zIgvDgjRhP_mKP7PUyeVHZhc9p0_q56KOEa3N28PhesB6n95c7Lp5C2xE2qTx7atc3_HTZxc20f-8BIWJOdTxuMBGyeqZIYFDhpVhcVxj5mDnS7vuYAXqSA0SVQFeouONNfOh8JfpOiyztcSL21qlNNULbM_wX4NxbJuTyuRsFGOEq4z5Yjt0_MwYGFKiGKG4IgJoxlBTyQSw4Sq9JBK7DDQjd3EAfdMIHeMr7pLEUop7v45zoGoWdy6ng%3D%3D)

| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f9ee0fb859064572b92a8cb389a271bd&_e=eli4edSJakcw_sEwc4ogbxGYae5Uk0CDrLqbGEzekc7W-2-wpKHPyuDH7pkr3Q0QmRJPWe6mT7B4VfEbp9-37PTh8hLQeSD2gnkkYEpU0F8eQ0ZU9GXgaaZ9KCPKIPYKm6wZRyN9fT9k2LQCoVVQm9vIHF43zIgvDgjRhP_mKP7PUyeVHZhc9p0_q56KOEa3N28PhesB6n95c7Lp5C2xE2qTx7atc3_HTZxc20f-8BIWJOdTxuMBGyeqZIYFDhpVLhgrXWVz6K8X0RbQ38gfL7m1k0bDuceh7PpF-rHZEkIW-FKfo5ad4ZCF5BXJ5wrWDtkwZ0md1v84yt4AVEJmVYSG1rOl25KOdtRRerQnlBCuN8PLCcBfOx_c-8rH8rcmUTHRa1jhKvPPZiBb_wqtQA%3D%3D)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Chrissy
subject: Another busy month
body:
A NOTE FROM CHRISSY

After a record 10 straight weeks in Washington, DC, I finally got to go home. While it’s lovely being able to sleep in my own bed and walk my dog Libby in my own neighborhood, it’s also been really great to get back out to meet with local businesses, community groups, and students.

Why was I in DC for 10 straight weeks? Great question! The House schedule is a mix of DC weeks for legislative work and district work periods when we’re able to be back home. When a government shutdown was averted at the end of September, the district work period was canceled so we could stay in DC to work on individual spending bills (that took one week; we got zero spending bills through). When Kevin McCarthy lost his Speakership, the district work period was canceled so we could stay in DC to elect the next Speaker (that took almost three weeks; my vote was Hakeem Jeffries who emphasized the importance of a bipartisan path). And when the GOP finally chose Mike Johnson as Speaker, the district work period was again canceled so we could stay in DC one more to work on individual spending bills (that was another two weeks; three got voted through the House which have no chance in the Senate). And here we are.

There is still so, so much work to be done. But, while all that was going on, my team and I were still busy making the best of it. Here are some highlights:

chrissyhoulahanforcongress.com

Empowering Our Small Businesses

My office hosted a standing room only grant workshop at the Kennett Library for the owners of small businesses. We focused on navigating the complexities that too many small businesses experience when trying to contract with the federal government. I’m grateful to the Small Business Administration and the Pennsylvania Department of Community and Economic Development Business One-Stop Shop for providing their expertise. I’m grateful to everyone who came! With inflation and the rising cost of living, it’s imperative that we lift up the entrepreneurs who enrich our communities and our local economy.

Reaching a Milestone for Paid Family Leave

At the start of the year, I co-founded the bipartisan Paid Family Leave Working Group, the first of its kind in Congress. Americans have been forced to choose between caring for their families - a newborn, a parent, themselves or another loved one - and taking home a paycheck. Sadly, the US is one of only six countries in the world without a federal paid leave program. Eleven states and the District of Columbia have passed their own laws, leading to a growing patchwork of regulations that can be hard for companies and their employees to navigate. Now, after a year of meetings discussing state-level policy successes and hearing from business leaders, we’re moving on to the next phase – policy recommendations in the coming months. We’re closer than ever to seeing progress on this incredibly important issue. Stay tuned.

Hosting My 80th Town Hall

I recently hosted my 80th (80th!) town hall since starting this job. Although our town halls often have a focus, this one did not. I answered questions about Russia’s war against Ukraine (I support additional funding), the war in Israel and Gaza (I support Israel’s right to defend itself, the release of hostages, and a stop in the fighting so people can get out and humanitarian supplies can get in), the state of civility and bipartisanship in Congress (it’s hard but we have to keep trying), and more. Thanks to everyone in our community who joined!

Securing Federal Funding for Alvernia University

I recently visited Alvernia’s John & Karen Arnold School of Nursing where a new state-of-the-art center will attract students from across the region, improve health services in our own community, and help grow the local economy. Last year, we submitted a Community Project Funding request for $2 million for Alvernia and I am thrilled for our community to see it come through. We owe it to our students to set them up for success, and I will always fight for vital investments in our schools and universities.

Although the year is coming to a close, I know that December will be full of its own challenges, victories, and milestones. Thank you, today and every day, for supporting my fight for progress.

There is work to be done,

Chrissy

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/houlahan-digital?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk913-fr-text

Chrissy is a former Captain in the United States Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or Department of the Air Force.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: One of my favorite announcements yet
body:
You need to see this ->

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2fobuabaic08ge0hae0s73tbmkbk5hcj1it8s5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs)
---

Friend, I have exciting news to share with you...

**Our FIRST television ad of my presidential campaign is now LIVE on the airwaves in Iowa and New Hampshire!**

_Do you know what this means?_

**Our hard work is paying off Friend! **

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our ad is live and we now have the opportunity to reach **MILLIONS** of Americans with my message, gain ground with voters who may still be undecided going into this election, and take one step closer to **VICTORY! **

**[Will you rush a donation to help us keep our ad on the airwaves?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrgid0f2ckmbsf9f6msnhob80jofl2fki49lqfu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs "Will you rush a donation to help us keep our ad on the airwaves?")**

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf8u21gn83274o393cmt32222jam0h6bbr333ft8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs)
---
| | [WATCH THE AD & CHIP IN TO KEEP IT LIVE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh31e1ltjepvl4hodua2061nlvlg5euvllo3ro7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs)
---

Launching our first ad is a **HUGE** milestone for our campaign, and it will play a **KEY** role in strengthening our movement ahead of the first votes in just 6 weeks.

_But it also costs a lot of money to keep television ads up and running! _

That's why I would really appreciate your help in keeping our _**FIRST**_ ad on air. I want to reach every American with our message, and I know I can't do it without you.

**[Will you send in $10, $25, $47, or whatever you can today?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztl5db3k93meos32b0qjhknuntj7bb8ekb1nen2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs "Will you send in $10, $25, $47, or whatever you can today?")**

At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. It costs a lot of money to run a winning presidential campaign, but you can rest assured that every single dollar you give is put to good use and stretched as far as it can go.

**[Please consider chipping in to keep our ads LIVE so we can finish the race STRONG and WIN on Election Day!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5k3e0dnv8l9eqe8mt8424c9qgchh55ooqdo4id8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs "Please consider chipping in to keep our ads LIVE so we can finish the race STRONG and WIN on Election Day!")**

---
| | [CHIP IN TO KEEP OUR AD ON THE AIR](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2g13vh47bh2h7rroa85rslvm5eai621nfspq74o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs)
---

Thank you for believing in my fight for our future. You are an essential part of this journey, Friend.

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc0ehnkjt573iuut7lat6r7fhtf7b7qrjtgj1a1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs)

Nikki Haley

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0tufb5n4qqqg6qe9kav85m2tvfa06bsfvhb2hr0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs)
---
| | | | |

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgdk7a3bq15fnholklbog3u7qeq499109mjm9spg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")

| | [GET YOUR WRAPPING PAPER](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmp0a2svg11jp8nicei4giuau81msslds2n4kaf8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6sv4j4k9bn7cd8qumif800d39ltcptqc0ninau0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| |
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc43j1elb4evo194rtai3km780goivj4293epo20_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc9tratu1v40cer7tb3gq4i0dog2f3t19f7377v8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbi6va8u3en1opt8plhb30h5csdh2qemggalj0q8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34cth69o36c1h2bs "DONATE")
---

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20For=20Congress?=
subject: California’s Largest Police Union Endorses Dave Min for Congress
body:
Mo-MIN-tum Continues To Build As Peace Officers Research Association Of California (PORAC) Is Latest Major Organization To Back Min | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/da432b04a14b/californias-largest-police-union-endorses-dave-min-for-congress-15666628?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** December 3, 2023
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**California’s Largest Police Union Endorses Dave Min for Congress**
_Mo-MIN-tum Continues To Build As Peace Officers Research Association Of California (PORAC) Is Latest Major Organization To Back Min_
**IRVINE, CA** — Today, Dave Min announced the endorsement of the Peace Officers Research Association of California (PORAC), the state’s largest police union and the largest statewide association of police officers in the country, representing 80,000 public safety professionals and 950 associations across California and Orange County. This is the third major law enforcement group that has endorsed Dave Min for Congress, following recent endorsements by the [Los Angeles Police Protective League (LAPPL)](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=521e10ab3f&e=7017cc100e) and the [Association of Los Angeles Deputy Sheriffs (ALADS)](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=41c763f089&e=7017cc100e). Min, who also recently [earned the endorsement of the California Democratic Party](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=0646df38e5&e=7017cc100e), is the only candidate for CA-47 with the backing of law enforcement, and he is the unanimous choice for Labor, Teachers, and current CA-47 incumbent Representative Katie Porter.

**“I’m honored to be public safety’s candidate in California’s 47th District,”** said State Senator Dave Min.**“I’m grateful to our first responders for all they do, and I look forward to continuing to work closely with them to ensure that we are doing all we can to keep our families and local businesses safe.”**

In addition to his strong record of supporting public safety and first responders, Dave Min has also been a strong advocate for police budget priorities. In recent weeks, the City of Irvine announced major new investments in its police department by the State of California, including [$2 million for a Real Time Crime Center](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=b7838dca28&e=7017cc100e) and [nearly $1 million for new electric police cruisers](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=9d676ed90a&e=7017cc100e), thanks to budget requests made by State Senator Min.

PORAC was incorporated in 1953 as a professional federation of local, state and federal law enforcement agencies, and represents over 80,000 public safety members and over 950 associations, making it the largest law enforcement organization in California and the largest statewide association in the nation. Their stated mission is to provide Californians with the safety and security they need to feel protected in their homes and on our streets, and to identify the public safety needs in our communities and provide programs that adequately meet those changing needs.

PORAC’s endorsement adds to the clear momentum of the Dave Min for Congress campaign. In recent weeks, Dave Min’s campaign has announced a slew of massive new endorsements, including from the California Democratic Party, Equality CA, the Southern California Armenian Democrats, NeverAgain CA, and over a dozen major labor organizations. These add to early endorsements from the Service Employees International Union (SEIU) and the California Federation of Teachers, as well as from over 150 local, state, and federal officials. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=952a2c5c14&e=7017cc100e). ###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/about?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=b7448e801d) [unsubscribe from this list](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=b7448e801d) [update subscription preferences](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=b7448e801d)
Dave Min For Senate * PO Box 5959 * Irvine, CA 92616-5959 * USA

On the following day, the very first 2024 sham trial against me will begin... This is Election Interference – and there’s not a single reasonable person on the planet who can say otherwise. Crooked Joe and the Radical Left are hoping that this sham trial will distract from our victory in Iowa. But I have a solution to that... ... Make our victory in Iowa so unbelievably MASSIVE that it cements our status as the PRESUMPTIVE NOMINEE FOR PRESIDENT AS EARLY AS JANUARY 15, 2024. And that’s where you come in, Patriot. name: TN House Democrats
subject: Before we head back into session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Dear Peter,
As we gear up for the upcoming legislative session on January 9th, we are fueled with determination to champion the needs of Tennessee families. To make progress towards breaking the Republican supermajority, we must hold four vulnerable Democratic seats and flip as many Republican seats across the state as possible – and that's where your support becomes indispensable.
The more resources we have, the more seats we’re able to target. This is because every dollar we raise is directly, strategically invested in our campaign efforts.
Before we’re prohibited from fundraising during the legislative session, we invite you to be a part of our final pre-session fundraiser on Thursday, January 4th [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashvillejan4] . There are no individual contribution limits!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashvillejan4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashvillejan4]
Consider joining our host committee, with levels ranging from $250 to $5,000. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashvillejan4]
Please join us on January 4th! Your presence and support is greatly appreciated. Together, we can pave the path to progress for the next generation.
With sincere appreciation,
Your Tennessee House Democrats
RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashvillejan4]
Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219

subject: Trump’s Secret: “Food Rations Start Friday”

It isn't a nuclear attack.

It isn't a chemical attack.

And it isn't another virus.

According to war hero, white house insider, and purple heart recipient Teddy Daniels - this attack is a "new kind of warfare" that will "starve America into submission".

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol" – Our newest free online course
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.

| | | This sponsored message from Defending the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f47c2963cbc645a7b354240cdb00d631&_e=g7Dbywoyy8L2DC5h5XXJkmwAaQg8q3HRS7vTNwVPq8LNQmWbmT16xPKM-TPsW3CckCrp0exSMfa0Jz7L4w-G2-ST4cLcSeYPw2OD6-jFLSiUKnnH3RWNgTJ4yn7CcG4GSUOro5u2i8-qq63RfJCC0Oppw9eJf-pMWA-JFatzJxJLT5cBvBmBElY1ilLR4oZOFfHQz52BuyXjfOGbJP5L8heWpI1O5JsHMhR7XoI_sxdWQAjn9-ssxsT2X5wCIBjqI48TFmaNall-sEC8imdOvisE0gHpXFn-YQpFZIlAf-MWLWa-ngogP25Bdenjpr75L7R-YgWFEWnVR-Ch5YYV0MuiXkKTkjw5eO5rNTF2xRZ2YLTiaXlZQzE_RuR9BCfLXYz5ysYfWa_WEU2dadB0eg%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f47c2963cbc645a7b354240cdb00d631&_e=g7Dbywoyy8L2DC5h5XXJkmwAaQg8q3HRS7vTNwVPq8LNQmWbmT16xPKM-TPsW3CckCrp0exSMfa0Jz7L4w-G2-ST4cLcSeYPw2OD6-jFLSiUKnnH3RWNgTJ4yn7CcG4GSUOro5u2i8-qq63RfJCC0Oppw9eJf-pMWA-JFatzJxJLT5cBvBmBElY1ilLR4oZOFfHQz52BuyXjfOGbJP5L8heWpI1O5JsHMhR7XoI_sxdWQAjn9-ssxsT2X5wCIBjqKslG-W37viU8pPYTmaK3mmyWLl64UtZ2BUi_13Ot_5qaEmu7n8eeCY43fhp-Ew-ZNocdsJ37MWsom90Xc_sOsa2dlOYIVH7SHSVS2DdXUb9Iv5F1BKdPRfCyqH8789QCdI4T8AB2sJU1iRYeT-sOvA%3D%3D)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=f47c2963cbc645a7b354240cdb00d631&_t=WWW-lCqZRlAiiihz2e5BUfy-FrOaqONAiFyljtSaOxif2Qvx196pYL_BNsoGRLm1QgqSi1p_fIaiTkC6t7EQ3k8hq0qaQBLPHbEWVLAxTskN8dql3gGxd-qTa3ppz9YR5U33J8CamJ4E6wS2rM4GKbtJe-c4jikLBZW-cn6ytyc%3D)

body:

https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=186c629b37f1c5e1759661b9a84eef9da77802bd037b23f8d63865cdd863d252772af3f9d1bd5de8ec8a814942bfd7d8c2cc4ed57438995a014c7ff2cd1a9b723cc2ec8cfd9afc951405e5e42505023d

Friend,

We've seen the debates. We've seen the media. We've seen it all. Everybody on the Left and everybody at the top are terrified of Ron DeSantis.

The truth is, everybody fears Ron DeSantis because he's the one man who's actually going to put the American people first, rock the world of the establishment elites, and defeat the radical Left for good.

This race is DeSantis Vs Everybody.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=39885c2f513810127470f9cc6afa583e007e4a891f3c80a40c7363f59c5d96b33de77c72795a0ba8cfa6ddcb518a5db94198b57e4e520126571ff2356ed6ed72
