CHIP IN $44

We have just what you need to show whose side you're on. Chip in $44 and we'll send one your way!

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=39885c2f513810127470f9cc6afa583e007e4a891f3c80a40c7363f59c5d96b33de77c72795a0ba8cfa6ddcb518a5db94198b57e4e520126571ff2356ed6ed72

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=39885c2f51381012f65b48fd2b6722e147c8d3aa85f07729fdf82c962ad952505057fbb49a463d457cf53cfdc56b5948d1ee48d9082eb21671ab189d131b1561
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=39885c2f513810127470f9cc6afa583e007e4a891f3c80a40c7363f59c5d96b33de77c72795a0ba8cfa6ddcb518a5db94198b57e4e520126571ff2356ed6ed72

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=39885c2f513810127470f9cc6afa583e007e4a891f3c80a40c7363f59c5d96b33de77c72795a0ba8cfa6ddcb518a5db94198b57e4e520126571ff2356ed6ed72

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Mark Warner
subject: A fundraising boost for the Senate GOP?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Democrats hold a razor-thin majority in the Senate

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74564263/441953773/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDI5YWY1OC1jZjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WBt2X4FMnjOdLMZFG1n1JnB7-EUSO5Tg_4-Zt5wACs0=&emci=7011b3c1-bf92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=fd29af58-cf92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=4568237)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74564266/441953776/840569807?refcode=mw_em_231204_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDI5YWY1OC1jZjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WBt2X4FMnjOdLMZFG1n1JnB7-EUSO5Tg_4-Zt5wACs0=) _\- Politico, 11/28/23_ __[**Rush $5 now to help protect our Democratic Senate majority >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74564269/441953779/840569807?refcode=mw_em_231204_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDI5YWY1OC1jZjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WBt2X4FMnjOdLMZFG1n1JnB7-EUSO5Tg_4-Zt5wACs0=)__ Derek, It looks like all the chaos in the House – an ousted speaker, potential government shutdowns, and never-ending political stalemates – has strangely given the Senate GOP a fundraising boost. Republican donors have shifted their strategy and are prioritizing investing in Senate races instead. Considering we currently have a 51-49 majority in the Senate, this GOP campaign shift is less than ideal. Many of these Senate Republicans that are reaping the rewards of this fundraising edge are those who are eager to strip away reproductive health care at the federal level, eliminate Social Security, and attack voting rights. And that’s just the beginning. name: Former Border Patrol Chief Ron Vitiello
subject: How many times do I have to say it, you idiot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief Vitiello for Senate
body:
Mr. Biden, SHUT DOWN THE BORDER.

| |
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcdf74ldpuqo1hi7kcrjfknbtvi7ven4bpnqbnig_)
---
**How many times do I have to say it, you idiot?** Mr. Biden, SHUT DOWN THE BORDER.
In the last 24 **HOURS** alone, Joe Biden has allowed over 10,000 migrants to cross our wide-open southern border.
This is one of the **LARGEST** illegal alien crossings in United States history.
And it’s not slowing down anytime soon thanks to Biden’s **PATHETIC** border policies.
Mr. President, if you don’t **STOP THE INVASION** , I will drag you to the border so you can see the **CARNAGE** you’ve caused with your own eyes.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zusfkrne383b7dghqdhdo7t7b7cugikfkmsdrq00_)
---
**My name is Ron Vitiello.**
I proudly wore my uniform in the United States Border Patrol as the National Chief under President Trump.
I’ve never been a politician, but I couldn’t sit on the sidelines as Biden destroyed our border.
That’s why I’m running for US Senate in the MOST IMPORTANT race in the entire country.
But without your help, I might as well wrap up my campaign now and surrender to Joe Biden and his corrupt cartel.
But if there’s one thing I learned at the border, it’s to NEVER SURRENDER.
[**I never thought I’d have to ask, but will you help me out?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn79gbm0ggt4s78qe9en8dbcp6cqnn8kct7j5klg_)

Thank you in advance & God Bless,
Ron

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: “Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol” – Our newest free online course Bah! Humbug!
body:
Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens’ most beloved novel: A Christmas Carol.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sAb_5JVt76PK_7oej9lSPw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable characters.

To mark this holiday season, Hillsdale College is releasing a new online course on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: _A Christmas Carol_.

The course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and teaching Dickens.

In this six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and fun of _A Christmas Carol_ today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/christmas-carol](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sAb_5JVt76PK_7oej9lSPw~~/AARclAA~~~)**

Let your family and friends know of this free online course as well. We hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Enough petty squabbles. We can be so much more:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Why the next year on the campaign trail matters
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74564918/441956450/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWJjZDRjMC1kMTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M90UipTamENTxbThadlU7ZdzuZdHhSQcjCy2XCxBils=&emci=5e45ae73-cb92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=9abcd4c0-d192-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **There is a remarkable difference between Democratic governance and what happens when Republicans are in charge.** Just think about the last month. It could not be any clearer. Here are two, polar opposite legislative priorities:
* Two years ago, Democrats passed our**historic infrastructure law**. This landmark investment (which every day proves its value in new jobs, clean energy modernization, and critical community improvements) will be looked back on in a generation as a big turning point for so many families and communities across Washington state and America.
* House Republicans, well... They recently voted near-unanimously to deny funding for the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention to do _research_ on gun violence death prevention. _Just_ research on a uniquely American problem.

[**We could do this all day on a variety of issues, and this is the heart of why I am asking for your support. Because, in 2024, I want Team Larsen to play a big role in Democrats taking back the House.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74564919/441956451/1596212816?refcode=2023-12-04-squabbles&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9abcd4c0-d192-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWJjZDRjMC1kMTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M90UipTamENTxbThadlU7ZdzuZdHhSQcjCy2XCxBils=) Petty squabbles that literally brought our entire government to a standstill. Attacks on Social Security, Medicare, and reproductive health care. Unending devotion to a former President that is currently on trial for massive financial fraud. **It is embarrassing to say, but it must be said: this extremism and chaos is what Washington D.C. Republicans are offering America.** I have always been candid with you about why I first ran for office. Bright lights and national media coverage are not what matters when we have the opportunity to come together as a people to do right by struggling families and hard-hit communities. **But this chaotic Republican media circus where every act is in service to the most extreme and unrepresentative part of their base — it is no way to lead a nation. ** We have a tremendous opportunity in 2024. By electing leaders across this country who are going to put people over politics and who will get things done. [**Please chip in $3 right now to make a critical grassroots investment in that effort, which will go towards mobilizing voters and efforts to win back the House next year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74564920/441956452/1596212816?refcode=2023-12-04-squabbles&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9abcd4c0-d192-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWJjZDRjMC1kMTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M90UipTamENTxbThadlU7ZdzuZdHhSQcjCy2XCxBils=) Thank you for coming with us on this journey. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74564921/441956453/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2023-12-04-squabbles&refcode2=9abcd4c0-d192-ee11-8925-002248223f36&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWJjZDRjMC1kMTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M90UipTamENTxbThadlU7ZdzuZdHhSQcjCy2XCxBils=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74564922/441956454/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2023-12-04-squabbles&refcode2=9abcd4c0-d192-ee11-8925-002248223f36&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWJjZDRjMC1kMTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M90UipTamENTxbThadlU7ZdzuZdHhSQcjCy2XCxBils=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74564923/441956455/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2023-12-04-squabbles&refcode2=9abcd4c0-d192-ee11-8925-002248223f36&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWJjZDRjMC1kMTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M90UipTamENTxbThadlU7ZdzuZdHhSQcjCy2XCxBils=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74564924/441956456/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2023-12-04-squabbles&refcode2=9abcd4c0-d192-ee11-8925-002248223f36&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWJjZDRjMC1kMTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M90UipTamENTxbThadlU7ZdzuZdHhSQcjCy2XCxBils=)

clean_body: Why the next year on the campaign trail matters | | | | There is a remarkable difference between Democratic governance and what happens when Republicans are in charge. Just think about the last month. It could not be any clearer. Here are two, polar opposite legislative priorities: Two years ago, Democrats passed ourhistoric infrastructure law. This landmark investment (which every day proves its value in new jobs, clean energy modernization, and critical community improvements) will be looked back on in a generation as a big turning point for so many families and communities across Washington state and America. House Republicans, well... They recently voted near-unanimously to deny funding for the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention to do research on gun violence death prevention. Just research on a uniquely American problem. = Petty squabbles that literally brought our entire government to a standstill. Attacks on Social Security, Medicare, and reproductive health care. Unending devotion to a former President that is currently on trial for massive financial fraud. It is embarrassing to say, but it must be said: this extremism and chaos is what Washington D.C. Republicans are offering America. I have always been candid with you about why I first ran for office. Bright lights and national media coverage are not what matters when we have the opportunity to come together as a people to do right by struggling families and hard-hit communities. But this chaotic Republican media circus where every act is in service to the most extreme and unrepresentative part of their base — it is no way to lead a nation. We have a tremendous opportunity in 2024. By electing leaders across this country who are going to put people over politics and who will get things done. = Thank you for coming with us on this journey. Peter, let’s not forget that last cycle, Trump endorsed Monica when she ran on a platform of “finishing what Trump started.”
Monica De La Cruz and Donald Trump have been arm in arm promoting their hateful MAGA agenda from the start — and since getting into office, Monica’s policies have been everything we warned you that they would be.
I can’t stand by and allow another 2 years of Monica’s dangerous leadership in South Texas — I’m running against her to flip this seat not just so we can take back the House from an extremist GOP, but so that the working families of TX-15 can have a real champion in Congress.

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Teichert on the Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/39d7ee0dce21/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6683954?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
# In The News....
This week, John Teichert joined News Nation on several occasions to discuss the hostage deal between Israel and Hamas, the military strategy of the IDF, and the attacks on U.S. military bases by Iranian-aligned groups in recent news.
Watch his interview below:
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=2acdf16865&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
General Teichert joined [News Nation](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=92283dff85&e=1b1fb1ad9f) on Sunday discussing Hamas’ intentions with regard to the hostage deal between Hamas and Israel, and the likely continuation of the Israel/Hamas war, explaining, “We’re going to continue to see them [Israel] neutralizing and isolating Hamas especially there in the northern part of Gaza, and they're going to continue to take the fight to Hamas in a way that forces Hamas to realize that they must capitulate and/or start to release more hostages and it’s in their best interest to do so once they see the continued attacks by the IDF.”
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ff5816696a&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=f29f147af0&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
On Monday, November 27th, General Teichert joined [News Nation](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=23ac2762c4&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to discuss Israel’s extended pause, Israeli hostage release, and the U.S. role in the Israel/Hamas war, stating in part, “Clearly our deterrent posture is not working. 73 attacks, 70 Americans injured, one American killed; the only way that Iran recognizes that they should stop doing what they're doing is when they see resolve, capability, strength and will from the United States and these pin-prick attacks that we've been undertaking in response to these attacks against U.S. forces have certainly not been enough to stop the Iranian-supported groups.”
General Teichert also joined [News Nation ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=2a9cdcd1bf&e=1b1fb1ad9f)on Thursday to discuss the latest on the hostage release news in Israel, stating, “A week ago israel came to the conclusion that they had sufficiently neutralized and isolated Hamas such that they wouldn't gain a substantial military advantage by having a pause and thus for the last 7 days we’ve rejoiced in seeing some of those hostages released.”
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=fbcec5c678&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
Last week, John joined [Fox News](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=8215ca4585&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to discuss the latest on the Israel/Hamas war, focusing on the ground objectives of the IDF and the claim by Iranian proxies that Hamas’s October 7th massacre was a solo attack, saying in part, “That is so disingenuous, and I hope that our president doesn’t believe it. They, Iran, have been the largest state sponsors of terrorism for the last several decades, we heard the attack, or the ship seizure from the Houthis in Yemen. We talked about Shia militia groups in Iraq and in Syria. We talk about Hezbollah in Iran and Hamas in Gaza; and all of those groups have been supported, equipped, trained, and financed by Iran and we must not believe that they have nothing to do with it.”
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=53482e3a2c&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John joined Fox 5’s [On The Hill](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ebdcd22d31&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to discuss his bid for U.S. Senate in Maryland, addressing key issues facing Marylanders today and how he’ll lead America in the right direction in the U.S. Senate. Teichert shared his message of leadership, not politics, by saying, “I’m a John Teichert wing. I’m a “we the people” wing. I’m an unalienable rights wing. I’m defining myself by getting out to where the people are in places like Baltimore City, Montgomery County, Prince George’s County, and helping them understand that conservative principles can meet the needs that they really care about.”
|
---
# Thoughts...
On Saturday, November 25th, John celebrated Small Business Saturday by visiting Kozy Beans Coffee, his campaign coffeehouse, to discuss the importance of small business entrepreneurship in America. Watch the full video [here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=073c3400d4&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e455bca6ce&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
Celebrating Thanksgiving, John shared what he is most thankful for in this season. Watch the full video [here.](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=d1cc8cba91&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=b80394bdb2&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
Thank you for joining John on the trail as he looks to become the next U.S. Senator for the State of Maryland. Make sure to check out [teichertformaryland.com](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ddc48d3eec&e=1b1fb1ad9f) and see how you can donate, get involved, and join the mailing list!
|
---
| [DONATE](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=12093f389a&e=1b1fb1ad9f)

Hey teammates — If you look up MINO in the dictionary, you’ll find a picture of Brian Fitzpatrick: Moderate in Name Only. **When it comes to Fitzpatrick’s voting record, the fact is, Fitzpatrick sides with his party’s MAGA extremists, rich donors, and corporate lobbyists.** Just look:
* **M ike Johnson:** is the guy Fitzpatrick voted for House Speaker despite his record of being anti-choice, anti-LGBTQ+, an election denier, and all-around MAGA extremist.
* **I nflation Reduction Act:** Fitzpatrick voted AGAINST this massively popular law that created 1.5 million jobs, capped insulin at $35 per month for seniors, and cut the cost of electricity bills for Pennsylvanians.
* **N o support for vets:** Fitzpatrick voted to cut the VA budget by 22% – which would essentially gut health care for everyone who has served our country.
* **O pposes reproductive freedom:** Fitzpatrick voted to ban abortion and voted against the Women's Health Protection Act, which would restore national abortion rights. He also voted against reproductive care for our troops – people like Ashley who literally risk their lives to keep us safe.

The working families, veterans, women, really everyone in PA-01 deserves better than spineless, MINO Fitzpatrick. And we can make sure we get it by electing a strong, pro-choice combat veteran to replace him – that's Ashley! clean_body: | = Hey teammates — If you look up MINO in the dictionary, you’ll find a picture of Brian Fitzpatrick: Moderate in Name Only. When it comes to Fitzpatrick’s voting record, the fact is, Fitzpatrick sides with his party’s MAGA extremists, rich donors, and corporate lobbyists. Just look: M ike Johnson: is the guy Fitzpatrick voted for House Speaker despite his record of being anti-choice, anti-LGBTQ+, an election denier, and all-around MAGA extremist. I nflation Reduction Act: Fitzpatrick voted AGAINST this massively popular law that created 1.5 million jobs, capped insulin at $35 per month for seniors, and cut the cost of electricity bills for Pennsylvanians. N o support for vets: Fitzpatrick voted to cut the VA budget by 22% – which would essentially gut health care for everyone who has served our country. O pposes reproductive freedom: Fitzpatrick voted to ban abortion and voted against the Women's Health Protection Act, which would restore national abortion rights. He also voted against reproductive care for our troops – people like Ashley who literally risk their lives to keep us safe. The working families, veterans, women, really everyone in PA-01 deserves better than spineless, MINO Fitzpatrick. And we can make sure we get it by electing a strong, pro-choice combat veteran to replace him – that's Ashley! = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being in this fight, Team Ehasz 🚁 | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I am thankful for this grassroots movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, I want to take a moment to say thank you. The outpouring of support my campaign has received since I filed for reelection last week has been incredibly humbling. I am so thankful to have so many folks like you who are invested in improving the lives of working families across Illinois’ 13th Congressional District standing with me. **However, our work is not done.** 2024 is around the corner, which means we’ll soon be in a competitive election year with two Republican challengers looking to flip this seat and further their extremist agenda. And as we speak, they’re calling their mega-donors to bring in millions to target this district. But I know whatever challenge comes our way, I can count on you to power my efforts to continue delivering commonsense solutions for families, farmers, and veterans in Congress. Thank you for being an important part of this team. I look forward to working together to defend my seat in November. All the best, Nikki P.S. If you didn’t get a chance to donate last month, you can chip in to help us meet our final goal of the year **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74565292/441958199/-1721453028?refcode=AU_NJB_CL_LAU_GEN_AC_20231204_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzdhMjExZi1kMzkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YB5_uyXMxgVSayvtzADOSjmDBw5CsT-PpsZvMY7V6SU=)**.

| | Peter, When I pictured my husband running for public office, I never considered myself a politician’s wife. And honestly, despite my husband’s Senate campaign, I still don’t. You see, Hung is more than a politician. He’s a leader. He spent 25 years fighting for our country as a Navy Captain in some of the most dangerous war zones in the world. He performed dives up to 300 feet, dismantled bombs, and came face-to-face with terrorists. Hung’s service meant time away from our family, tons of sacrifices, and pushing his mind and body to the limit. But it was worth it for us because he was defending the country we love for the sake of our children. Now, that country is at risk again - but not just from foreign enemies. The Left is attacking us from the inside out with their radical economic and social agendas. Our freedom is on the line, our children’s future is on the line, and the country we love as we know is it on the line. That’s where you and I come in, Peter. **[Hung is the leader we need in the Senate to take on the radical Left, but he can’t get there without our help. Let’s do this together.](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=3cb9de2a0bb94564847766c28de17353&_e=NErxWavLKoolYvbDzkcBdplGhj-uo15Ohc1WwAKa4zjZPTzONnLMN3b7myMK88VNjwQOjSbwLM_itfLKIvgHmj4hU_p1fZARUnfz3LZ3zRL7pJ49GYaUh7NV1Zp3E7LmmOX9YiJA40FNOAOll__QdtBf5-nBQjpp0Lcf-InhgURhLX2btjDcDbcp_-dxiwQb_A0fkTmxc5ENlcUv42ncd6vQf5hiqCTKX9mAsjXEPayrKivsbVoinIXWoLZIqS2ppd0Z4YXrQdfYQSmwGGMd2hJwd5KdCy_05LbLrX2kfd9WuFoPtUrTTViJ2Wys7VqIR3MssLf_c8nmepoxXOuOEcr38QNbMz1Y23Hijkd3X6j9BgyWMVb7pPaFxYwKNyoW)**

body:
Can I count on you to join me in this fight, Friend?

---
| | | | | | | |

** Friend**, I wanted to take a minute to introduce myself.

I'm John James. I'm a Combat Veteran, a successful businessman, a man of faith, a Congressman, and most importantly a father.

Like you, ** ** Friend, I'm sick and tired of weak leaders running our country into the ground. Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are FAILING Americans- we deserve better.

When I served in combat, I looked evil dead in the face. I witnessed the destruction that can occur when evil is in charge and I fought every damn day to ENSURE freedom would be protected at home.

I've never backed down from a fight, ** ** Friend. I might've volunteered for a new kind of fight when I was elected to Congress, but I will not rest until we have defeated the tyrannical Left and taken our country back.

That starts by winning TOP TIER House seats and keeping the House from Nancy Pelosi and her woke mob. **[Will you step up today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77fd79f9ae954f499ee8c4de0d06502d&_e=kZYFM0YEYl47h_A0l8LMGKaKlY3KSMUo_m9a8AdychMFsaZbTO2Q77a555lp7CAtvtMC0HWDuaSkAxjae1FGcMJpNE7N3wj-MZke7fVOmx-L68Ly2vMLyXTfAYHrXFdDAlA9hCwZ90ORiZE6tfzFtzp3BGQ1EQZz0pOXPftJHhx8c_m1-qI5SDWBpo91YoidKTbq2Dj6MO0DzudvTAmlh8YWVy5Eeehg5Fco6TluhsdEbRwR6659E6oJXblMH3xgl42_rv1Wup2xj38YmM8vIupBGn4ZzgNtASmzShDKlVsMwub-P52jF_N1ZftYYTPAK4jHryIDtqQUyNT50vFaqXCqegdpCLRvAQjVpvVL5rPISITcGbzR7iBbmMxJ0q4DsEKLzosO71Lp7E1PbSEhKtWPGPooixtOPNlMCIyaYA48NLX432lEWyjazVFAzzjyx2CEgEODEylrptHjBtmPgw%3D%3D "Will you step up today?")**

name: Robert P.
subject: Debbie has a backbone of steel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I know that she's the senator our state deserves.
| | |
---
Hi there, friend. It's Robert, Debbie's husband.
It's been a busy couple of months here in the Mucarsel-Powell household. But I want to take a moment to step back from it all to tell you a little bit about my wife — and why I know that she's the senator our state deserves.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74566155/441961397/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk385-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWE3ZjVmZWMtZDU5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7njyXgR_K0D77ShSHRgRl4Iz0XhKlyDPXqMUXFW9X3Q=)
Debbie has always been a rock for her family and her community. As a young immigrant in America, she worked her way through high school to help her mom pay the bills. After graduating college, she dedicated her life to giving back, a path that led her all the way to Congress. On top of all that, she's a dedicated caretaker for her mother, a devoted mom to our children, and my best friend.
Debbie is the kindest, most generous person I've ever met, and a true public servant. But don't let that fool you: _She's a fierce fighter when it comes to protecting Florida and Floridians._ From expanding health care access at Florida International University to flipping a U.S. House seat blue, she's a fearless leader who does not back down.
**In short, Debbie represents everything that our leaders should be.** Meanwhile, Rick Scott represents everything wrong with Washington — and everything that Debbie has spent her life fighting against.
Rick Scott oversaw the largest Medicare fraud in HISTORY. He wants to raise taxes on working families, ban abortions nationwide, and end Social Security and Medicare. He's pushed some of the most harmful, anti-democratic, and divisive rhetoric I've ever heard. **It's no wonder that Republicans, Independents, and Democrats all don’t like him.**
Floridians know that they deserve a leader who understands the real problems facing families; a leader who will never stop fighting for them; a leader like Debbie.
I know that Debbie has what it takes to win this race and create a better future for Florida — _the latest polling puts her one point ahead!_ **But to defeat Rick Scott and his seemingly endless personal war-chest, she needs people like you to believe in her, too.**[So please, will you show Debbie that you're all in to flip Florida blue by rushing a gift before midnight? Every donation truly makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74566156/441961398/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk385-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWE3ZjVmZWMtZDU5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7njyXgR_K0D77ShSHRgRl4Iz0XhKlyDPXqMUXFW9X3Q=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74566157/441961399/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk385-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWE3ZjVmZWMtZDU5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7njyXgR_K0D77ShSHRgRl4Iz0XhKlyDPXqMUXFW9X3Q=)

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: We'd love you to accept | | | | | | Friend, are you ready to officially join Nikki 's team as we gear up for Nikki's fourth presidential debate? Nikki believes you would be the perfect addition to our team, and we're thrilled to offer you the chance to secure your official Ambassador's Circle membership card right now! | | If you're a patriotic American eager to show your support for Nikki before she steps onto the debate stage, "there's no reason to wait—join her Ambassador's Circle today!" "Our membership drive wraps up on December 6, and we want every freedom-loving American to take this opportunity to join us with a donation of ONLY $15 today." The best part is, by joining us, you'll also enjoy these exclusive benefits: 🔘 Your very own personalized membership card 🔘 Access to exclusive news and updates 🔘 Special discounts on campaign merchandise 🔘 Exclusive behind-the-scenes glimpses from the campaign trail 🔘 AND SO MUCH MORE... | | "With a contribution of just $15 or more, you'll become a valued member of Nikki Haley's exclusive Ambassador’s Circle and play a pivotal role in winning the White House and strengthening our nation." Thank you in advance for joining our team! Team Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | | | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. ---|---

It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---

Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!

Venezuelan voters overwhelmingly approved of dictator Nicolas Maduro’s referendum claiming sovereignty over a neighboring oil-rich region on Sunday. The referendum argues that Venezuela has sole claim to Essequibo, an oil-rich region internationally recognized as part of Guyana. | | | | Dear Peter, This campaign is **_by _**Alaskans and **_for _**Alaskans, not special interests or corporations. I want to make sure that my priorities reflect yours, Peter. Just as they have with my work in the Dunleavy administration. We can all agree that Bidenomics is NOT working for Alaskans and all Americans. Taxpayers are spending an extra $11,000/yr just to maintain the same standard of living. That's ridiculous and I pledge to end this assault on our families. My priorities when I get to Congress will also be to fight for American energy independence, support our allies in Israel, support law enforcement, and get our country on the right track for future generations. My husband, children, and grandchildren drive my continued dedication to public service and success for our state and country. [_**If that sounds like an agenda you can get behind, please donate $10 or whatever you can to help me take Alaska values BACK to Washington, D.C. because they are so desperately needed.**_](https://trk.klclick3.com/ls/click?upn=RaMrku6Jmgp9Enkqgs8Am4bs-2Ffv68-2Fa0XPb99uXknk7GgMeRoXbabyFbhAWeUcqD2LVAqazzrC5YN98ypVYWU3sHqrI9-2BxtV9L1UHPE1Eszh1OoHj8FfrEun4oRlbyGsaG2lQK9VRLD33JnqYdkOQtUfEtHLD8oPNp2Y5apb8kRlfJ5ywLGv9VlZ7e6I8eIT0ttu0ciE1Pypc-2BskxfNzlSysbY7pBEd9792225koHK8-3DWFCz_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhkjYEocgrRJjVsunJqmEU6NPHIceipo5tjqbShhFr-2Fzti-2Fg-2FdrVDicyDkf8puDg9gxs0Lb3C1UR8N1GYqrayH92vw-2BZlBeyzkWGcQyJ6VJDLslOoFGQhxPhIttUzDQKHZ8NFbkTiCQznzZ3XPYc5fRg35KDk427ok3TnZUSAZkI3IRqINpfQx-2FkHvWEQrkwNeoz28s5fh4o5HU0IVQIs7qlI8099mXp10OIzMInTLF4-2FjSch-2B1lVv3KSfHFSVC-2FaiIyFjbN-2BUhWFl5e29cCNOecd4A1FRSIz5UFPESXlLvx0sjCJSjWCJkUFrNc32cPUvDGaTxAKNq-2FAdTrnjdjehdjwzxpBRHx-2Fh8616Qv3OhwMKjfzqtNt6qWxUfm3Cr0dnMclAqctSncaW5JsnKWUawhM9gO-2FcVL2kvUCHIIrV5DA-3D-3D) Are you with me? name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The SCERT, DISCLOSE, and ETHICS Acts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
I’m supporting some key bills to fight the forces that corrupt our democracy.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74567872/441967641/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGY1YWViMS1kOTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NP1U7JF2VM7t-nRBJj3K95MhXHRM0q-Nc0c9sIbIgUQ=&emci=fff4aeb1-d992-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=10f5aeb1-d992-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=7731215)

| | My colleagues and I are supposed to work for 'We the People,' but with right-wing billionaires corrupting the Supreme Court, members of Congress trading stocks giving the appearance of conflicts of interest, and corporate interests funneling dark money into Super PACs to manipulate our elections, the people's voice is being drowned out. We need to end these practices now, and that's why I'm championing some key bills to fight the forces that are corrupting our democracy. **First, The DISCLOSE Act** would end the corrupting influence of dark money, shine a bright light of transparency on political spending, and make government more accountable to voters. Dark money allows donors with special interests to hide their identities, making it impossible for Americans to know who is behind the massive flow of money into our elections and what motivates them. There's no place in our democratic republic for hidden expenditures by untraceable special interests. It's long past time for Congress to pass this bill and stop billionaires with right-wing agendas from secretly buying our elections. **Second, the ETHICS Act** is new, comprehensive legislation that would prohibit members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children from using their positions for personal financial gain by owning or trading securities, commodities, or futures. We are elected to serve the public, and people need to know their representatives are working for them and not their stock portfolios. **Third, The SCERT Act** would create real ethical guardrails for the Supreme Court. Headline after headline makes it clear that the Court needs to adhere to the highest standards of ethics and transparency. The Supreme Court hands down life-altering decisions on everything from our climate to our right to vote. We need an _enforceable_ code of ethics for SCOTUS justices so the public can trust that those decisions are made without undue influence. I know you're with me on the need to clean up our government and restore trust in Washington, D.C. Let's get these bills passed to make sure we have a government by, of, and for the people. clean_body: I’m supporting some key bills to fight the forces that corrupt our democracy. | | | | My colleagues and I are supposed to work for 'We the People,' but with right-wing billionaires corrupting the Supreme Court, members of Congress trading stocks giving the appearance of conflicts of interest, and corporate interests funneling dark money into Super PACs to manipulate our elections, the people's voice is being drowned out. We need to end these practices now, and that's why I'm championing some key bills to fight the forces that are corrupting our democracy. First, The DISCLOSE Act would end the corrupting influence of dark money, shine a bright light of transparency on political spending, and make government more accountable to voters. Dark money allows donors with special interests to hide their identities, making it impossible for Americans to know who is behind the massive flow of money into our elections and what motivates them. There's no place in our democratic republic for hidden expenditures by untraceable special interests. It's long past time for Congress to pass this bill and stop billionaires with right-wing agendas from secretly buying our elections. Second, the ETHICS Act is new, comprehensive legislation that would prohibit members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children from using their positions for personal financial gain by owning or trading securities, commodities, or futures. We are elected to serve the public, and people need to know their representatives are working for them and not their stock portfolios. Third, The SCERT Act would create real ethical guardrails for the Supreme Court. Headline after headline makes it clear that the Court needs to adhere to the highest standards of ethics and transparency. The Supreme Court hands down life-altering decisions on everything from our climate to our right to vote. We need an enforceable code of ethics for SCOTUS justices so the public can trust that those decisions are made without undue influence. I know you're with me on the need to clean up our government and restore trust in Washington, D.C. Let's get these bills passed to make sure we have a government by, of, and for the people. Onward! name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

disclaimer_text: Paid for by WALLACE GILBERRY FOR ALABAMA
body:
I played for Alabama, then made it 9 seasons in the NFL.

| |

I cut my teeth on the gridiron in Tuscaloosa.

I played for Mike Shula & Nick Saban, then made it 9 seasons in the NFL.

_Football - along with my mom and great-grandmother - taught me everything I know, like:_
1) Bring glory to God on and off the field

2) Play through the whistle

3) Always stand to honor those who keep us free
_My name is Wallace Gilberry._ If you've never heard of me, that's OK - here's what you should know:

**I 'm a Black man in America who is familiar with the struggles of our community. But I'm also a Republican who voted for Trump. And I'm running in the single most competitive House race in the entire country.**

I'm running against more than a DOZEN far-left Democrats with an army of mega-donors backing them.

I've never run for office. They have. I've never even sent an email like this before.

But I was raised by a single mom who worked 2 jobs to put food on the table for her 5 kids - being an underdog is nothing new to me or my family.

**[So- with grit and determination in my heart - I'm respectfully asking you to pitch in JUST a few bucks now to fuel my underdog campaign to victory.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cca323b7a61943f39ec1031d150d6ae4&_e=kQ1FGVCg7nSx7Q1RWRMbZGiZBq796sWh65dPExQPP16LSEkwarRqLsbdGyvNIBL97KeSQOn3UxALLUH-YFi_vDHeYJBDFuwgMLUB8u-XRRQqFatIrDqOAI1Ee1QaZXpORDfSqByZCQiMDAdgo7A6AAVBUrck2OI-pntWfpskbuZTkuA10vRw3v0aXCsIBCzWHnkjtSGgeExFW98C3MPX8XL3iEQ5H0L4cXNGoh9ja2M0RPqFUqIxrlH1WJoTPhkTru-S3Agt8qG5nqvnDVDJx0kJ_fNiL2FRaTKtSlHgTPmOTANY-Whdlle0A4ytqouYslGC6YDD55R3Y6eXwRbBGZnMg9L1W1SlUDWdidl0jpE7ls5gSDY3cYWETRUD1fm2e8MA_UZoFyRTa6Pna4vbYoc7PDfwXovgGqIoBXCUZHo%3D "So – with grit and determination in my heart – I’m respectfully asking you to pitch in JUST a few bucks now to fuel my underdog campaign to victory.")**

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: Big News from Mandela and The Long Run!
body:
Mandela and The Long Run are proud to endorse:

Mondaire Jones, NY-17
Mondaire is running to return to Congress to finish the work he started to lower costs for Lower Hudson Valley residents, defend our democracy, raise wages, and stop Republicans from banning abortion.

Tony Vargas, NE-02
Tony Vargas has served Nebraskans for the last decade. He learned the values of community, hard work, and perseverance from his parents who sacrificed everything to give their children an opportunity for a brighter future. Now, Tony is running for Congress to stand up for working families and protect that American dream.

Congresswoman Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, WA-03
A working mom and small business owner, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, is once again running against a MAGA extremist in Washington who aligns himself with white nationalists, supports a national abortion ban, and promotes the “Big Lie” conspiracy about the 2020 presidential election. Marie is the number-one most vulnerable House Democrat for 2024 and is running to protect this seat from extremists.

Congresswoman Emilia Sykes, OH-13
In 2022, Representative Sykes defeated a Fox News commentator in one of the toughest races in the country. Now she is running for reelection to continue her work to connect her community to Congress and fight to lower costs for working families, make healthcare more affordable, protect reproductive freedom, and implement climate solutions.

Mandela and The Long Run are excited to endorse a round of pro-democracy changemakers in critical House races across the country.

These candidates are the key to regaining the Democratic House majority and these endorsements are just the start of the change we can build together in 2024.

If you support our mission, please make a contribution to The Long Run to fuel our movement to elect and support changemaking candidates across the country.

CONTRIBUTE: https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3500?akid=5047%2E196590%2EMmjdg2

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.mandelabarnes.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5047%2E196590%2EMmjdg2

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: You deserve an explanation...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Here's the truth: | | |
---
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make your first contribution to President Biden's reelection campaign. Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially right now -- is so important. Here's the truth: December is a crucial month for our campaign. Everyone will be watching: the press, our opponents, and even supporters will be wanting to see the strength of our movement. We've received a huge number of individual donations so far -- people of all backgrounds and from all communities. It's a big part of how we've been able to withstand millions and millions of Republican attack ads. But today, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you. Because December is the most important fundraising deadline of the presidential election -- the final year-end deadline of the campaign. [Can President Biden count on you to contribute $5, $10, or whatever you can afford today? name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=325a6ba5d8814cd69258ce7298fbee95&_e=1pha6PF1L-Jwy36Y8P6Kkj9zLRaZbqc5VZ-9hVySrPCgptr0hyczT8UPv1cab96OzIgVpq9nb19624DCezQtLY2ymBvX5xiGCtWdxR1UidRCKM52exrAsB69flZkDxv3y3peUtYA3Tzm0q5h2f0XhUw9B3BVRymk881sUerEenjC1hpaIHC9ewFl4Af44P04IKXl0QaKO7rv5ZGKmFlAstd80a4IN3NT5Jr4_xTwGk78kTw5dAUarPNwHj4CE3yquHMpbebSuCQyPMRTsbD2B4BiPQQKnE0piuwZQIv8tv7WdmAdeJMcU8BBr3_yQZNiVwE0BUmQlC_Oo3SlS5cZxvZJkBhNuI3HVycddddVeXi29VpVeD883AgurI9Pq7dC)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=325a6ba5d8814cd69258ce7298fbee95&_e=1pha6PF1L-Jwy36Y8P6Kkj9zLRaZbqc5VZ-9hVySrPCgptr0hyczT8UPv1cab96OzIgVpq9nb19624DCezQtLY2ymBvX5xiGCtWdxR1UidRCKM52exrAsB69flZkDxv3y3peUtYA3Tzm0q5h2f0XhUw9B3BVRymk881sUerEenjC1hpaIHC9ewFl4Af44P04IKXl0QaKO7rv5ZGKmFlAsgqV4Pw3PTIUrR0FqBwVMCS6oH8Le6AX0WpIkGfPayaxY8HTlcUG3sVERWlB_3ayMewAQRgeJHhSbXkTJJtWGXUEZtJ3dkJkcyFCDBMXY7t4MqD03JhWqkhS83LBi-M4u5nL6MYB_yPLX6F0zycUw5VsVh1wpsFXohVSGchPMukQ)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=325a6ba5d8814cd69258ce7298fbee95&_e=1pha6PF1L-Jwy36Y8P6Kkj9zLRaZbqc5VZ-9hVySrPCgptr0hyczT8UPv1cab96OzIgVpq9nb19624DCezQtLY2ymBvX5xiGCtWdxR1UidRCKM52exrAsB69flZkDxv3y3peUtYA3Tzm0q5h2f0XhUw9B3BVRymk881sUerEenjC1hpaIHC9ewFl4Af44P04IKXl0QaKO7rv5ZGKmFlAshEjvlmXRh1LUAVtmtd9YbI0UrZEQPCxaykykVLaEEMwdFpEysjlFnf_CRSTnjLJufvIxF8_HVyDZLiu5kgYjFnvc976B4u_v0xgDuobavwJnC0f4qZsnpQopdYl87EGBj8avkNZry61JjHmDy8U3B7s3mcEWfzLYdXnVclOg5aZ).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=325a6ba5d8814cd69258ce7298fbee95&_t=28gIn8SaUoPSwynmXLL65CMAcX5R5fi7LCvnIDHpDNhaixbCcEvgW0eJTyYM3i9PNuOowTjFYzm4ZO2zWOe5MWaPheT2DyJafL_Tfug9VEBtc1tsz0anio7tFIxTRSngLUHiaND0ogi82hHbgRvRkNWfOb_SqUBf5tM_SQkQgLc%3D)

name: Cassidy Whitaker, Political Director of Ruth's List Florida
subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: Ruth's List Endorses Rachelle Litt for House District 94!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ruth's List Florida Incorporated
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Hi Peter,
Ruth’s List Florida is excited to announce our latest endorsement — Rachelle Litt for Florida House District 94!
Rachelle is an experienced public servant and is no stranger to winning tough races. Her common sense beliefs and Democratic values awarded her votes from both sides of the aisle in 2017 as a member of the Palm Beach Gardens City Council. Soon after, she was appointed Vice Mayor and then Mayor by her City Council colleagues. She has worked to confront issues that spur job creations and support small businesses, protect constituents’ tax dollars, and curate ways to alleviate the local impacts of Florida’s housing crisis. Rachelle’s grassroots experience dates back to President Barack Obama’s re-election campaign, Congressman Patrick Murphy’s U.S. House and Senate races, and both Hillary Clinton and Joe Biden’s Democratic National Conventions. Most recently, she was selected to be a member of President Joe Biden’s Transition Healthcare Equity Policy Team in 2020.
https://secure.anedot.com/rachelle-litt-campaign/donate [https://secure.anedot.com/rachelle-litt-campaign/donate]
Rachelle has firsthand experience navigating the shortcomings of America’s healthcare system, both from being a professional pharmacist and as a mom to children born with genetic medical conditions, which was her initial inspiration to get involved in politics and public policy. She also serves on numerous civic and business organizations, including the Women's Chamber, the Women’s Foundation of Florida, and Executive Women of the Palm Beaches, among many others. She is also actively involved with the Jewish Community Relations Council of the Jewish Federation of Palm Beach County.
Rachelle’s proven local leadership is a major indicator of the success she will bring to the Florida legislature once elected. To ensure that she gets there, please consider donating to her campaign here [https://secure.anedot.com/rachelle-litt-campaign/donate] today or click on the graphic above.
Together,
Cassidy Whitaker, Political Director
Ruth’s List Florida
https://www.facebook.com/RuthsListFlorida [https://www.facebook.com/RuthsListFlorida] https://twitter.com/RuthsListFL [https://twitter.com/RuthsListFL] https://instagram.com/RuthsListFl [https://instagram.com/RuthsListFl]
Paid for by Ruth's List Florida Incorporated. Contributions are not tax deductible.
Ruth's List FL
PO Box 4558
Tampa, FL 33677

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: AIPAC is “expected to unleash a historic deluge of money in 2024 to defeat left-wing incumbents.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, with AIPAC
preparing to spend $100 million in right-wing mega-donor funds and
recruiting credible primary challengers to our Squad of progressive
incumbents, our movement is facing an existential threat in 2024.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231204-1.BZRN3S&refcode=em20231204-32169&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32169%2E1203867%2EE9iV4F ]Daily Beast headline: The Squad is facing an 'existential threat' in
2024

A new article by the Daily Beast points out the challenges we face and our
critical need for grassroots support if we’re going to not only expand our
bloc of progressives in Congress, but protect what we’ve built by
re-electing the Squad.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231204-1.BZRN3S&refcode=em20231204-32169&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32169%2E1203867%2EE9iV4F ]The future of our movement and the Democratic Party is at stake: can
you rush $3 or more today to directly fuel our work to
protect incumbents like Cori Bush, Ilhan Omar, and Jamaal Bowman in their
primaries next spring and summer?

While Justice Democrats has long been the biggest supporter of these
young, working-class, Black and brown progressives, it’s no secret that
we’ve faced financial challenges this year, and we’re not alone.

As the Daily Beast notes, we face “a challenge virtually all liberal
grassroots organizations have this year: a massive drying-up of
contributions across the board.”

We already know Democratic Party leadership is going to be focused on
defending the White House in 2024, and they haven’t yet come out the gate
fully committed to defending the Squad like they did with more moderate
incumbents in previous years.

But here at Justice Democrats, we’re ALL-IN when it comes to protecting
the Squad against the multimillion-dollar attacks from Republican-funded
Super PACs like AIPAC.

The deck may be stacked against us, but we’ve defeated the odds before,
and we can do it again in 2024 as long as we have a groundswell of support
from people like you.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231204-1.BZRN3S&refcode=em20231204-32169&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1003&akid=32169%2E1203867%2EE9iV4F ]Please, if you can, chip in any amount today to fund our fight to
re-elect the Squad and save our movement from this existential threat next
year →

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, with AIPAC preparing to spend $100 million in right-wing mega-donor funds and recruiting credible primary challengers to our Squad of progressive incumbents, our movement is facing an existential threat in 2024. [ ]Daily Beast headline: The Squad is facing an 'existential threat' in 2024 A new article by the Daily Beast points out the challenges we face and our critical need for grassroots support if we’re going to not only expand our bloc of progressives in Congress, but protect what we’ve built by re-electing the Squad. [ ]The future of our movement and the Democratic Party is at stake: can you rush $3 or more today to directly fuel our work to protect incumbents like Cori Bush, Ilhan Omar, and Jamaal Bowman in their primaries next spring and summer? While Justice Democrats has long been the biggest supporter of these young, working-class, Black and brown progressives, it’s no secret that we’ve faced financial challenges this year, and we’re not alone. As the Daily Beast notes, we face “a challenge virtually all liberal grassroots organizations have this year: a massive drying-up of contributions across the board.” We already know Democratic Party leadership is going to be focused on defending the White House in 2024, and they haven’t yet come out the gate fully committed to defending the Squad like they did with more moderate incumbents in previous years. But here at Justice Democrats, we’re ALL-IN when it comes to protecting the Squad against the multimillion-dollar attacks from Republican-funded Super PACs like AIPAC. The deck may be stacked against us, but we’ve defeated the odds before, and we can do it again in 2024 as long as we have a groundswell of support from people like you. name: Lateefah HQ
subject: Heard about this Major Endorsement??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
Campaign work isn’t easy, but we need more Black women in office and that’s what this moment is about >>>

[|
---](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/l5K_ARxGT6tF8vetbXq5Ag~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnULPCP0QeaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF0ZWVmYWhzaW1vbi5jb20vVwNzcGNCCmVrxi5uZaxT90pSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAR)
| | Campaign work isn’t easy, Friend. Being a grassroots campaign means that we’re constantly working to grow our broad, community-first, movement — and to ensure that this movement has the resources to take on our opponents. CA-12 deserves Lateefah’s voice — her drive, her passion — in Congress. And support from people like you, Friend, will help us get her there. That’s part of why we send emails like this one — and we hope you’ll considering giving what you can today — but we also send these emails because you’re an invaluable member of our team and we want to share a huge win with you: **We’ve been endorsed by Higher Heights for America PAC, the only political action committee exclusively dedicated to electing more Black women to public office.** In the hard work of campaigning — this is a moment to celebrate! Will you help us celebrate these endorsements and build on our momentum by making a contribution right now? | | [Donate](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/WLhzeX6SFyqYUUw5twpb-g~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnULPCP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9RGVjMDMtMjNXA3NwY0IKZWvGLm5lrFP3SlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~)
---
We’re proud to have earned support from folks that share our vision for a bold, progressive voice fighting for CA-12 –**and our desire to elect more Black women to Congress!**
Adding **Higher Heights for America** to the community standing with Lateefah is an honor.
Here’s what the incredible team at Higher Heights had to say about Lateefah’s growing campaign:
“In running for office, Black women face a set of unique challenges and yet our voices have never been more important. We need women speaking truth to power on the floor of Congress, in the halls of power, making sure that our voices are heard in the spaces that they have too often been ignored. That has always been Lateefah’s calling and her work,” said Eboni Taylor, VP of Programs at Higher Heights PAC said in a statement yesterday.
“Lateefah’s voice – beautiful, resolute, and forged over three decades of remarkable leadership – will be a voice for CA-12 and for all, embodying the very aspirations of those trailblazers who paved the way for her candidacy. Higher Heights is proud to endorse her and excited to see her get to work as a member of Congress.”

clean_body: Campaign work isn’t easy, but we need more Black women in office and that’s what this moment is about >>> | | Campaign work isn’t easy, Friend. Being a grassroots campaign means that we’re constantly working to grow our broad, community-first, movement — and to ensure that this movement has the resources to take on our opponents. CA-12 deserves Lateefah’s voice — her drive, her passion — in Congress. And support from people like you, Friend, will help us get her there. That’s part of why we send emails like this one — and we hope you’ll considering giving what you can today — but we also send these emails because you’re an invaluable member of our team and we want to share a huge win with you: We’ve been endorsed by Higher Heights for America PAC, the only political action committee exclusively dedicated to electing more Black women to public office. In the hard work of campaigning — this is a moment to celebrate! Will you help us celebrate these endorsements and build on our momentum by making a contribution right now? | | ~ We’re proud to have earned support from folks that share our vision for a bold, progressive voice fighting for CA-12 –and our desire to elect more Black women to Congress! Adding Higher Heights for America to the community standing with Lateefah is an honor. Here’s what the incredible team at Higher Heights had to say about Lateefah’s growing campaign: “In running for office, Black women face a set of unique challenges and yet our voices have never been more important. We need women speaking truth to power on the floor of Congress, in the halls of power, making sure that our voices are heard in the spaces that they have too often been ignored. That has always been Lateefah’s calling and her work,” said Eboni Taylor, VP of Programs at Higher Heights PAC said in a statement yesterday. “Lateefah’s voice – beautiful, resolute, and forged over three decades of remarkable leadership – will be a voice for CA-12 and for all, embodying the very aspirations of those trailblazers who paved the way for her candidacy. Higher Heights is proud to endorse her and excited to see her get to work as a member of Congress.” If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | ~~ ~~ Moments like this are a reminder that our work is resonating, that our momentum is growing, and that Lateefah is theprogressive candidate with the experience and support to win this race. ~ | ~ Thank you for your support, Lateefah Simon HQ | Paid for by Lateefah for Congress. body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74569166/441972283/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjMyYjIyMi1kZjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0m1CSvzsLM2mtyhSOj8hM9yy8h4f7vEI6URsPvs_kWg=&emci=a1a4f354-5e90-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4f32b222-df92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=6787172) Hey team — The Biden Administration released a major report on the state of the climate crisis last month. Here’s the tl;dr: We’re past the point of needing to raise awareness or sound alarms. **We need action, and we need it now.** [This can’t wait anymore. Tell Congress to amp up the fight against the climate crisis today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74569167/441972284/-110673081?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjMyYjIyMi1kZjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0m1CSvzsLM2mtyhSOj8hM9yy8h4f7vEI6URsPvs_kWg=&emci=a1a4f354-5e90-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4f32b222-df92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=6787172) | [Join the fight →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74569168/441972285/-1441486187?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjMyYjIyMi1kZjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0m1CSvzsLM2mtyhSOj8hM9yy8h4f7vEI6URsPvs_kWg=&emci=a1a4f354-5e90-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4f32b222-df92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")
---
We won’t sugarcoat it, the trends in the report are pretty scary:
* **_Every_ region in the United States** is experiencing the damaging effects of climate change.

* Severe droughts and decreasing air quality are putting our health at risk. **And you know Black and Brown communities are bearing the brunt of those health risks.**

* The climate crisis threatens to wipe out critical ecosystems and endangered species, jeopardizing the economy and our food sources.

As scary as these trends are, the report makes it clear that climate doom **does not** have to be our destiny. We can build our own clean energy future, but we need to push harder and demand that Congress choose our planet over politics.
**[Let Congress know: We need action NOW to solve the climate crisis.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74569169/441972286/1287397168?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjMyYjIyMi1kZjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0m1CSvzsLM2mtyhSOj8hM9yy8h4f7vEI6URsPvs_kWg=&emci=a1a4f354-5e90-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4f32b222-df92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=6787172)**
