name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: I’m checking in with you one more time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I was blown away by how many people had more to say.

| |

---
| | | Hey, it's Steve Scalise again.

I contacted thousands of Conservatives from across the country and invited them to take my official _**[Grassroots Check-In](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5d7d8b996054aef9363b77ad8f4a290&_e=jApC4z0olCaOORhbGP0ICVrHDEbn8v9w6q_QeSxBJf1htuk7A3sY6_mFt8X-DGTVRGm-DJRWRSdLFfavSTslTjo2p7q58Vsrrxz4RSs0YnHuSmGXZoGRXDCDoDDgUHa8iiqtli7m_dNqX6Bvo4M8w6pQemjGstDboQ-k1krJrf6W0n4sHOtbWmrIbOTeD7xAX6uA8eRtJ-NBIBU_bHI-N08viNy6gLukmekAcFsqzSc_L-xfaSwVWFFKeK5Mmb7DKGQ10JRo5O-dlMQtnoeTeV7c2ueY_psANsH4fksSdnT9d39k1wCRHd365qjJtFP1VhV6uQ9XTiWKsDeikqNHuXYIlzpkYnBzoNo0yGgurVOZ6wkZDiVdov59xaNR8bS36fsCVKhjvh_jWbXpsG2WAhUugCsK6Sda7M6NxeF_eXsIHqO0RBtQnpUZVOphl161pOQ2-IL_uicZQ0HkShXCew%3D%3D "Grassroots Check-In")**_ - the FIRST of its kind. I have to tell you: The response was OVERWHELMING!

_The vast majority of Conservatives 1) are very concerned about Biden 's weaponization of our government, 2) want to close our southern border immediately, and 3) strongly support federally mandating voter identification laws. _

**Those issues are at the top of my list of concerns too, but I was blown away by how many people had more to say. **

That's why I'm expanding my _**[Grassroots Check-In](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5d7d8b996054aef9363b77ad8f4a290&_e=jApC4z0olCaOORhbGP0ICVrHDEbn8v9w6q_QeSxBJf1htuk7A3sY6_mFt8X-DGTVRGm-DJRWRSdLFfavSTslTjo2p7q58Vsrrxz4RSs0YnHuSmGXZoGRXDCDoDDgUHa8iiqtli7m_dNqX6Bvo4M8w6pQemjGstDboQ-k1krJrf6W0n4sHOtbWmrIbOTeD7xAX6uA8eRtJ-NBIBU_bHI-N08viNy6gLukmekAcFsqzSc_L-xfaSwVWFFKeK5Mmb7DKGQ10JRo5O-dlMQtnoeTeV7c2ueY_psANsH4fksSdnT9d39k1wCRHd365qjJtFP1ove-bQpnpGYJlWaLQClriIYRT8XYiFY59YwcnhwefmxwBMgn_eywAmGKmDqn70dUcehQDEtaHbV6Gl4Uq5HRa7zbLOQwRFEv3lP1SBecdZPiC8mbBx3T3Qgr4qnuBX96vQcOuauVhDUUAXsKWE_igg%3D%3D "Grassroots Check-In")**_ with a few more questions. If you're receiving this email, I want to hear from you. I'm not reaching out to everyone but based on your previous survey responses and feedback, I want you included in my final results.

---
**_*** JUST RELEASED ***_
EXPANDED GRASSROOTS CHECK-IN**

Contact:**_[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5d7d8b996054aef9363b77ad8f4a290&_e=jApC4z0olCaOORhbGP0ICVrHDEbn8v9w6q_QeSxBJf1htuk7A3sY6_mFt8X-DGTVRGm-DJRWRSdLFfavSTslTjo2p7q58Vsrrxz4RSs0YnHuSmGXZoGRXDCDoDDgUHa8iiqtli7m_dNqX6Bvo4M8w6pQemjGstDboQ-k1krJrf6W0n4sHOtbWmrIbOTeD7xAX6uA8eRtJ-NBIBU_bHI-N08viNy6gLukmekAcFsqzSc_L-xfaSwVWFFKeK5Mmb7DKGQ10JRo5O-dlMQtnoeTeV7c2ueY_psANsH4fksSdnT9d39k1wCRHd365qjJtFP1-paJmb4d8jJKwRrWFyhCMyEPFdjhaR-pGFsmkMLaKSaZCilrsSNAwuIA6PKfmP-9bg2SKz1nLlV7tl-ITNG4euFMQoa0GWtuP3zmlUWEjyjW20R8g0y8huXJYMi6VqQTI_3q7nV_46pi-J0YUBlA-A%3D%3D "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_**
Response: **Pending**
Deadline: **9:00 AM Tomorrow**
| | [BEGIN IT HERE -> ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5d7d8b996054aef9363b77ad8f4a290&_e=jApC4z0olCaOORhbGP0ICVrHDEbn8v9w6q_QeSxBJf1htuk7A3sY6_mFt8X-DGTVRGm-DJRWRSdLFfavSTslTjo2p7q58Vsrrxz4RSs0YnHuSmGXZoGRXDCDoDDgUHa8iiqtli7m_dNqX6Bvo4M8w6pQemjGstDboQ-k1krJrf6W0n4sHOtbWmrIbOTeD7xAX6uA8eRtJ-NBIBU_bHI-N08viNy6gLukmekAcFsqzSc_L-xfaSwVWFFKeK5Mmb7DKGQ10JRo5O-dlMQtnoeTeV7c2ueY_psANsH4fksSdnT9d39k1wCRHd365qjJtFP1RQYi0J3LUCcOG7a29ChJqHjsi8lv7V4erQQnzyo81IgBLKY_K8clVUfY86_fj6BUUC-_U7flhZWl_5MM7-y9obB3Y9xg3anyb8e51TQUzj9N2jbq4Fi9-OPE4zwaxKtVxah5A6actprO6gkkd2M3yw%3D%3D "BEGIN IT HERE → ")
---

I value your opinion.

My team and I will review your feedback tomorrow morning. What you say will help guide the direction of our House Majority. With Democrats in control of the Senate and White House, we NEED to be on the same page.

**Consider this your direct line of communication with me and my team.**

I make my best decisions when I know what my best supporters think. Can I tell my team to look out for your response tonight?

_**[Please click any of these secure links to access your check-in>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5d7d8b996054aef9363b77ad8f4a290&_e=jApC4z0olCaOORhbGP0ICVrHDEbn8v9w6q_QeSxBJf1htuk7A3sY6_mFt8X-DGTVRGm-DJRWRSdLFfavSTslTjo2p7q58Vsrrxz4RSs0YnHuSmGXZoGRXDCDoDDgUHa8iiqtli7m_dNqX6Bvo4M8w6pQemjGstDboQ-k1krJrf6W0n4sHOtbWmrIbOTeD7xAX6uA8eRtJ-NBIBU_bHI-N08viNy6gLukmekAcFsqzSc_L-xfaSwVWFFKeK5Mmb7DKGQ10JRo5O-dlMQtnoeTeV7c2ueY_psANsH4fksSdnT9d39k1wCRHd365qjJtFP14_bX6xjuGO8s3XJkKMuei9mr_gCmWNsiQ9UWzblp20v6w2bZiKeBZ5UEJ0SXktHbCKXccfL8iIMTTcSQYam8uxBgFrpMM6td8DteKI8pzzmENi4VKAsvrGAIpresu5OV7oFu03FbI-UwOLS6llCQsg%3D%3D "Please click any of these secure links to access your check-in >>")**_

Thank you and God bless,

Steve Scalise

clean_body: I was blown away by how many people had more to say. | | | | | Hey, it's Steve Scalise again. I contacted thousands of Conservatives from across the country and invited them to take my official "Grassroots Check-In" - the FIRST of its kind. I have to tell you: The response was OVERWHELMING! The vast majority of Conservatives 1) are very concerned about Biden 's weaponization of our government, 2) want to close our southern border immediately, and 3) strongly support federally mandating voter identification laws. Those issues are at the top of my list of concerns too, but I was blown away by how many people had more to say. That's why I'm expanding my "Grassroots Check-In" with a few more questions. If you're receiving this email, I want to hear from you. I'm not reaching out to everyone but based on your previous survey responses and feedback, I want you included in my final results. JUST RELEASED EXPANDED GRASSROOTS CHECK-IN Contact: "dpwillis67@gmail.com" Response: Pending Deadline: 9:00 AM Tomorrow | | "BEGIN IT HERE → " I value your opinion. My team and I will review your feedback tomorrow morning. What you say will help guide the direction of our House Majority. With Democrats in control of the Senate and White House, we NEED to be on the same page. Consider this your direct line of communication with me and my team. I make my best decisions when I know what my best supporters think. Can I tell my team to look out for your response tonight? "Please click any of these secure links to access your check-in >>" Thank you and God bless, Steve Scalise | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY"** at your earliest convenience. It's important. name: Leader James Beverly
subject: An equitable and just future.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Peter,

In 2021, Georgia Republicans drew and passed electoral maps that have been found to violate the Voting Rights Act because they discriminate against Black voters. Today, we resume our Special Legislative Session to pass new maps that equitably and justly represent the people of Georgia.

This historic moment that we find ourselves in is an opportunity to right historical wrongs and to pave the way for a future that honors the diverse voices of our great state. Georgia's history, while rich and multifaceted, bears the scars of a past marred by racial injustice, particularly in the realm of voting rights.

And, faced yet again with the profound responsibility of honoring our voters, our Republican colleagues have proposed new electoral maps that not only fail to comply with the judge’s orders but also continue to illegally diminish Black voting power in Georgia.

Georgia House Democrats are resolute in our opposition to their new unlawful maps. The disenfranchisement of Black voters is not just the denial of rights but a denial of dignity.
The Civil Rights movement, which found fertile ground in the heart of Georgia, was a testament to the unyielding spirit of those who fought for justice. The Voting Rights Act of 1965 emerged from the struggle. It was a beacon of hope.

In the task of redrawing our maps, we must do so with an acute awareness of our past and a resolute commitment to an equitable and just future.

I ask that you stand with us and show Georgia Republicans that all eyes are on the People’s House in this historic moment. You can get involved by supporting our efforts [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=120423_LBMaps_link1], following along for updates [https://twitter.com/GAHouseDems], or tuning into our official proceedings [https://vimeo.com/showcase/8988696?autoplay=1] during Session.

Give Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=120423_LBMaps_button1]

Thank you.

Onwards,

Leader James Beverly
Georgia House Democrats

OUR AGENDA
Every day, we're fighting for a better Georgia for hard-working families like yours. To learn more, visit us here [https://gahousedems.com/agenda/?refcode=email-footer-agenda] .
HEALTHCARE: We must expand Medicaid to keep our hospitals open and ensure every Georgian can see a doctor when they're sick.
GUN VIOLENCE: We can save lives by passing universal background checks, safe storage laws, and waiting periods.
CHOICE: We're fighting to overturn Georgia's six-week abortion ban and restore reproductive freedom to all Georgians.
EQUITY IN EDUCATION: We must invest in Georgia's teachers and fully fund every public school, regardless of zip code.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=email-footer-cta]

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/GAHouseDems?refcode=footer-facebook [https://www.facebook.com/GAHouseDems?refcode=footer-facebook]
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gahousedems/?refcode=footer-instagram [https://www.instagram.com/gahousedems/?refcode=footer-instagram]
Twitter: https://twitter.com/GAHouseDems?refcode=footer-twitterX [https://twitter.com/GAHouseDems?refcode=footer-twitterX]
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@georgiahousedemocraticcauc7318?refcode=footer-youtube [https://www.youtube.com/@georgiahousedemocraticcauc7318?refcode=footer-youtube]

Atlanta, GA 31126

name: VoteVets
subject: No worse enemy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Trump doesn’t understand our Military or our Veterans because he doesn’t understand what it means to serve anyone but himself.
#
Facts are tricky, Derek.
Trump has a TV ad up in Iowa right now, shoring up support before the first caucuses and primary elections of the 2024 GOP presidential primary.
The ad is about how great a supporter of our Military and our Veterans he is. Don’t bother looking it up — it’s the same BS that every Republican trots out in their campaigns after they’ve taken votes to defund the VA, privatize care for Veterans, or take promised benefits away from Active Duty.
But we’ve got receipts, Donald. Your record is clear.
On amputees, Trump said: “No one wants to see that.”
When planning a Military parade, Trump didn’t want to include wounded Veterans. He said: “This doesn’t look good for me.”
About John McCain and countless POWs: “I like people who weren’t captured.”
At the Aisne-Marne American Cemetery in France, the burial site of 1800 Americans who fell at Belleau Wood: “Why should I go to that cemetery? It’s filled with losers.”
This isn’t just hearsay. Many of these are verified by former members of Trump’s administration, including the former chair of the Joint Chiefs and Trump’s former Chief of Staff.
Trump’s got his own facts, but this is the truth: Trump doesn’t understand our Military or our Veterans because he doesn’t understand what it means to serve anyone or anything but himself. He’s no friend.
And VoteVets will go to great lengths to remind everyone — Active Duty, Veterans, Military Families, and anyone in between — of that.
**[So please, rush a donation to VoteVets. $5 or whatever you can afford. We will spend every dollar holding the GOP accountable, every dollar to elect Veterans who share our values, every dollar to beat Trump.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23.L4YfC7&refcode=em231204-1-30&t=1&akid=19900%2E3013755%2EZ0UQad)

name: Team Rashida
subject: Wednesday: Join Rashida and Reps. Cori Bush, Ilhan Omar, and Delia Ramirez in support of State Rep. Angie Nixon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Progressives who have the courage to stand up and demand a ceasefire are under attack. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvzpp9MTPsPWpgF39mR0DFzsqmz4Xfyj-vyNo8CYgkLJz-Z1T5cJodFdaqR8cWV4j2FrULJKBh0XM0GYOsKNiAhZchW4I6h-QcwBZ7Lu6TAQaV0F23-dCsef0CRTKT6wocDQctwuqUo6h9_OqIR1ZRCl2WqHOuFMi2mXOP_huK7r_zpiFBnpx66b4sLpR8GMpmIZwYbutgUp7fTkDp4rwV_6gsjTMy3tYzNadvMV0-m3VYgkGuDBzo-gX_zx0AVK6T821UqmneyscSPIFtcvXESBoKQh6WzKLMRLU5ro1kkF28dJaf9HjDvYIi4Z7U_t-ylSXBWkt9VkFQKufKMde8H0SwYYz7THcCg0_pR46EDkU/41u/_m3bwWS4Rymv-AdapKjo3g/h0/i3IgK5DjO-XdyoTPfutVBpO6BmUqOwdfCEIqRZSq2rw)

Friend, Progressives who have the courage to stand up and demand a ceasefire are under attack. Last month, Florida State Rep. Angie Nixon took a bold stance in the Florida Legislature, introducing a resolution calling for a “de-escalation and cease-fire in the state of Israel and occupied Palestine.” But in response to her resolution, urging her colleagues to recognize the humanity of Israelis and Palestinians alike, **“most of the House members stood up and turned their backs on Nixon as she defended her resolution during her closing remarks.”** 1 And one Republican state representative attempted to shout down Nixon’s remarks, calling for the genocide of all Palestinians.2 **Rep. Nixon responded:**
> _“You can turn your backs on me because I am on the right side of history because I don’t want the babies to die... Caring about thousands of innocent lives does not make anyone antisemitic.”_
**This Wednesday at 8pm ET, Rashida will join Florida State Rep. Angie Nixon for a virtual fundraiser for Nixon’s re-election campaign. And they’ll be joined by U.S. Reps. Cori Bush, Ilhan Omar, and Delia Ramirez.** [**Click here to donate and RSVP to the virtual fundraiser in support of State Rep. Angie Nixon today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wi0QDIfUy4C3hnm6i8opoy9LrnBF4-qy1_K3L2kU61l_SDCXP4PCxnJ2P_JBe-yFWug_sE1PewN8PET5dgQ-BIQBxHNNv-ukEWir4-gOZDbD-x1I2swvoTIR-XvrVM7yCuEzGRrlJftvKtnjgoitgwyaPplxCo4bR4GFGrw1zl1nQvHdvMvDj5fpfsTdwWyfuHsXoW9SXATnbYBlk6qeLXoX88mxZe7rYxiOpOdfiT6TvnQmJnlpX7PIsGVkkD-BaeK0ipLBAk3FXqt2e7ibkZejcVqNOj7ohDtxEVrg4kRP3nMYRU3D7-pP4_FmzooAxl2pd-7RrCw_e02mPrHyfES21ijK2Ntx173iyCO1x7dAnjX7vrDSPi01fgj30266mw7nuRDs0_SCfeSbsrSQSlJInqxH2ZwoP4jKJl77tND72tWfH2mbMUev40jbpe-8MG2xlbM2nZtMFswfKy8YDoHeavVygssVHae-QxLVnd-h5nwsjWsviHOSuQDTwZ928/41u/_m3bwWS4Rymv-AdapKjo3g/h1/0g6oYiRlQiEbFhFAatGfj80w10w8FKTEB1FcgGf5GKw) clean_body: Progressives who have the courage to stand up and demand a ceasefire are under attack. | | | Friend, Progressives who have the courage to stand up and demand a ceasefire are under attack. Last month, Florida State Rep. Angie Nixon took a bold stance in the Florida Legislature, introducing a resolution calling for a “de-escalation and cease-fire in the state of Israel and occupied Palestine.” But in response to her resolution, urging her colleagues to recognize the humanity of Israelis and Palestinians alike, “most of the House members stood up and turned their backs on Nixon as she defended her resolution during her closing remarks.” 1 And one Republican state representative attempted to shout down Nixon’s remarks, calling for the genocide of all Palestinians.2 Rep. Nixon responded: “You can turn your backs on me because I am on the right side of history because I don’t want the babies to die... Caring about thousands of innocent lives does not make anyone antisemitic.” This Wednesday at 8pm ET, Rashida will join Florida State Rep. Angie Nixon for a virtual fundraiser for Nixon’s re-election campaign. And they’ll be joined by U.S. Reps. Cori Bush, Ilhan Omar, and Delia Ramirez. (after you donate, you’ll receive the Zoom link to join the event) | Last month, anti-Palestinian group AIPAC announced that it plans to spend $100 million in the 2024 election in an attempt to defeat Rashida and others who stand with the majority of Americans in demanding a ceasefire. Rashida needs more allies on the state and federal level who are willing to speak out and defend the lives of innocent civilians. Already, more than 14,000 Palestinians have been killed in Gaza―the majority women and children. Together, we’re standing with nearly 70% of Americans and 80% of Democrats who support a ceasefire even as Congress and the White House are calling for billions of dollars in unconditional funding to continue to drop bombs on innocent Palestinian civilians. Thank you, Team Rashida 1 2 Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . subject: friend, thank you

body:
you've stood by me before
| | |

Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74571082/441978731/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4612-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmY1NDc4MS1lMjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UuZI_z0ITcCtgOylFadu57HlQq82fZs3nypRWYHb428=)
Thank you for having my back when we fought for **health care coverage for 9/11 first responders** and **expanded benefits for veterans** exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need.
Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that **empowers survivors of sexual assault** in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members.
Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 13 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York.
Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for **national paid family leave** for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the **Equal Rights Amendment** to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country.
**My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support.**
But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. **Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat.** I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors.
**[_Please, friend, you've stood by me so many times before, and I'm counting on you to have my back again. Will you chip in before midnight tonight to join me in this fight for progress and defend our Senate majority? Your support would mean so much to me._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74571083/441978732/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4612-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmY1NDc4MS1lMjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UuZI_z0ITcCtgOylFadu57HlQq82fZs3nypRWYHb428=)**

clean_body: you've stood by me before | | | Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington. = Thank you for having my back when we fought for health care coverage for 9/11 first responders and expanded benefits for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need. Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that empowers survivors of sexual assault in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members. Thank you for never giving up the fight to make gun trafficking a federal crime. After 13 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York. Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for national paid family leave for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the Equal Rights Amendment to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country. My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support. But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat. I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley’s BS Citizens United bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
It’s just another campaign prop — and you don’t just have to take our word for it...
#
Peter,
Last month, Josh Hawley went around DC telling everyone that his new bill would “reverse” the Supreme Court’s decision in Citizens United — a decision in support of an organization he’s proudly taken endorsements and max-out checks from.
**But let’s be clear: it’s just another one of Hawley’s campaign props.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39596?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv)
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39596?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv)**
Hawley’s fake bill doesn’t actually do anything to limit dark money. It still gives power to the billionaires + corporate elites trying to buy our elections. And you don’t just have to take our word for it. **Experts across the country — and even fellow Republicans — are holding Hawley accountable.**
Here’s what Jane Mayer, the author who literally wrote the book on dark money in American politics _(Dark Money: The Hidden History of the Billionaires Behind the Rise of the Radical Right)_ , had to say about Hawley’s Citizens United bill:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39596?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv)
Everyone agrees: Josh Hawley is a fraud, and this bill is a bunch of BS. **Just read what conservative news outlet _National Review_ published about the legislation:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39596?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv)
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39596?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv)**
**We can’t afford to let this fraud represent Missouri or threaten our democracy in the U.S. Senate for another six years.**
That’s why Lucas Kunce is doing more than just building his campaign to replace Josh Hawley without a cent from corporate PACs — he’s on a mission to abolish corporate PACs altogether and take back power for everyday people.
**It’s time to get big money out of our politics once and for all, and Lucas is the only candidate in this race who’s committed to doing just that.[So if you’re ready to join our grassroots movement, please consider adding your first donation of any amount toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39596?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39597?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39597?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39597?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39597?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39597?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39597?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39596?refcode=em20231204-4318&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=4318%2E614464%2EumYmIv)

Thanks for all your help,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Please, pitch in $5 to support Bob Casey as we take on Mitch McConnell and dark money groups in the fight for our Senate majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231204-1?refcode=em20231204-1&refcode2=1290_552475_f5hshX&akid=1290%2E552475%2Ef5hshX)**

clean_body: Did you see this from Cook Political Report? “Democrats Need Lightning To Strike Again in 2024 To Keep Fragile Senate Majority” "Along with Montana and Ohio, [Pennsylvania] is the third top target of the McConnell-aligned Senate Leadership Fund. " The writing is on the wall, Peter. National Republicans are preparing to spend BIG to defeat Bob Casey, and we must act now to protect Pennsylvania and our Senate majority. GOP groups like the Senate Leadership Fund are ready to dump in hundreds of millions of dollars to flip Pennsylvania red. Pennsylvania is already known for having expensive races, and with a mega-millionaire running against Bob and dark money outside groups waiting in the wings to support him, it’s clear that this could be the most expensive race our Commonwealth has ever seen. We have a lot of work to do to re-elect Bob Casey in what will be his toughest race yet, and you have a part to play. We send emails like this because we rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in to help us fight back. Together, Bob Casey for Senate To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. ******[Sign the petition to Congress: Support aid to parents and children. * * *
Congress has failed to fully fund WIC, which provides nutrition aid for pregnant women and young children.

Now, with groceries more expensive than ever, multiple states are starting to turn needy families away.
**Democrat Derek Marshall is running for Congress for the struggling families, the marginalized communities, and for those who feel left behind by a system that often prioritizes profit over people.**
He'll work to fully fund WIC and raise wages, because no one should face hunger in the world’s wealthiest nation.
**[Stand with Derek’s campaign and sign the petition: fully fund WIC now!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMYRJgq6lEowKKtzNbn-Yh3DfANO96Wr1i51EGSgROTeU-mE0QVPPal9EzNMINtarzo0YGbssW8gK0UiOLI9w6Wyq7PgjGlPHWDlhYgC5OC-zek1cHhON2kOG-xzUUzUcXGufDkFw1u9YEePIMm7JSKkE6O9O_fUdsuXjgavodnsIjlJpY0r_e6e_AfMdhQbTij9o9fVzQvUCijc99JrupwxTiDrZS6RO9i4Fo3rm1u2FTh2wL1dchhqPox2AeoRP_GuoSKmQnsVHHq-5N7Ju_oyR79e5U_oqCRw_-ksjFB5d8VyiBTWOclkqmw4luICGqLtmwFCB19B-yAl0BGk3_tkWK7xmkH81KelZZIe7IqZdlaL7ghFQhUkqIF4L_7Fhqnu85Ag_1EP6icHn9VuwDNsZxS93piDfrNRhUxQK6X7WK3TFhkPGiNVmfowBK-NH9YN7WvYPYZFPdEfoqwTIeluC5HOpAycy8Vn_YdhhrxkIAxSj6BMmHjEGyHdf06slxlnR2qrxHrLBwbt9hhwTn43HKoJIWTirq-rly8pID3UU/41u/NbNtrzUoRd-rqma5uqBCng/h2/tmBtQM5a3fkhmMNySeC4RQ856RJsKgnio-WUI1lcYPk)** [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMYRJgq6lEowKKtzNbn-Yh3DfANO96Wr1i51EGSgROTeU-mE0QVPPal9EzNMINtarzo0YGbssW8gK0UiOLI9w6Wyq7PgjGlPHWDlhYgC5OC-zek1cHhON2kOG-xzUUzUcXGufDkFw1u9YEePIMm7JSKkE6O9O_fUdsuXjgavodnsIjlJpY0r_e6e_AfMdhQbTij9o9fVzQvUCijc99JrupwxTiDrZS6RO9i4Fo3rm1u2FTh2wL1dchhqPox2AeoRP_GuoSKmQnsVHHq-5N7Ju_oyR79e5U_oqCRw_-ksjFB5dyTPywjZgNAfuWW9PdMaOGdri963hB60s5PBt-iJjl_lCkVSKH2F1gbo_9LaoxLhIHVi9bTfJ45jl6qsjJ1e0gFqa8CUJjo0SDnA-LQsUUtUzL99fbYWwD1Uw6OCV6zJBmrZi3mrf-D-vnXE7B-tSI_0OrR1DWhBOVAofHfDlme6O50XVzNk8jlIVd99YboTG-igNDeIRBeA4E_HiUrFlYrdO8lh1H7EuX9t7GMVaibB7hnUZYiH5p2CwSLCA0Wj5/41u/NbNtrzUoRd-rqma5uqBCng/h3/cOenx6JjGRv5NOSJ9GbBLQaHpdcV88VYobmhLajijmI) Republicans in Congress have especially targeted WIC’s fresh fruit and vegetable benefits - a major provider of healthy, nutritious food to low-income families that also benefits American farmers.

clean_body: | | | **** Congress has failed to fully fund WIC, which provides nutrition aid for pregnant women and young children. Now, with groceries more expensive than ever, multiple states are starting to turn needy families away. Democrat Derek Marshall is running for Congress for the struggling families, the marginalized communities, and for those who feel left behind by a system that often prioritizes profit over people. He'll work to fully fund WIC and raise wages, because no one should face hunger in the world’s wealthiest nation. Republicans in Congress have especially targeted WIC’s fresh fruit and vegetable benefits - a major provider of healthy, nutritious food to low-income families that also benefits American farmers. WIC is facing its first funding shortfall in decades as extremist Republicans attack a bipartisan consensus that children shouldn’t go hungry. Derek Marshall is running for Congress for economic justice - and he’ll vote to end child poverty and hunger. ** Thanks for your support, Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. name: Stand with President Biden (VPP)
subject: Did you miss this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Surely you don’t want him to be impeached...
| After we shared this awful news, we thought Democrats would RUSH to sign our letter standing with President Biden: [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57744?t=6&akid=11957%2E878179%2EKG1WTT) **_But we couldn’t have been more wrong!_** [**Only 7 Democrats in your state have added their signatures... and we can’t believe your name is still MISSING! Please don’t leave President Biden in the dust: Rush $3 to sign the letter before midnight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57744?t=7&akid=11957%2E878179%2EKG1WTT) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57744?t=8&akid=11957%2E878179%2EKG1WTT)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: I stand with you.

**Dear President Biden,

_I’m so proud to call you our President!_**

Over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**Republicans will go to ANY extreme to kick you out of office and reinstate Donald Trump. Even threatening to IMPEACH you!**

So I wanted to let you know that you’re not alone in this fight — Democrats across the nation stand with you and your amazing agenda!

[**That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing Democrats all over the country who will protect our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57744?t=9&akid=11957%2E878179%2EKG1WTT) | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57744?t=10&akid=11957%2E878179%2EKG1WTT)
---
**_X A PROUD DEMOCRAT_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11957%2E878179%2EKG1WTT). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11957%2E878179%2EKG1WTT).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11957%2E878179%2EKG1WTT) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=11957%2E878179%2EKG1WTT). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11957%2E878179%2EKG1WTT)

Peter, In Indiana, even sitting presidents need to collect petition signatures to get on the ballot. The Biden campaign is looking to collect 9,000 signatures and needs your help. With less than two weeks left until their December 15th deadline, the campaign still needs a couple hundred signatures per Congressional District. You're eligible if:
* You are an Oregon resident
* You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2023
* You will make less than $75,000 in 2023 (or $150,000 for joint-filing couples)

**2024 is a critical election year with many important races–including attorney general, secretary of state, and treasurer, all statewide races with four-year terms.** We also have to hold Republican legislators who participated in this year's walkout accountable on the ballot. We're building the resources now that we will need to elect future climate and environmental champions up and down the ballot. **[Will you help by using your Political Tax Credit to donate to OLCV today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74571672/441980800/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViYjU4ZTVmLWU1OTItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2qSne94ioQfJbwK4uUr8SkTPLuFi5GLRypyeC4jF0qI=&emci=8f3e6c12-de92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=5bb58e5f-e592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=2107230) ** Thanks for all you do. **[PS: If you aren't eligible or have already used your Political Tax Credit this year, please consider making a special gift to the OLCV PAC. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74571703/441980974/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231204_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGFkY2U3ZDktZTU5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OYDv_tEr3jc0nrZpPXE7ECu2S9bcJQkB1U5M30h41Uo=)

Peter, Not only was Elissa Slotkin’s election for Michigan’s Seventh Congressional District super close, it was the ***MOST*** expensive race in the country. Outside groups were pouring millions of dollars into her district in an effort to flip her seat, but she had an advantage: _early money. _ The cost of television ads skyrocketed as they got closer to Election Day, but luckily Elissa had started fundraising early, so she was able to buy her airtime much sooner than her opponent, before the price went up. That meant she had more money to do things like canvassing, voter registration drives, and digital ads. But that was only possible because folks chipped in months and years before Election Day, and her team was able to craft an effective, long term strategy because of it. clean_body: | = Peter, Not only was Elissa Slotkin’s election for Michigan’s Seventh Congressional District super close, it was the *MOST expensive race in the country. Outside groups were pouring millions of dollars into her district in an effort to flip her seat, but she had an advantage: early money. The cost of television ads skyrocketed as they got closer to Election Day, but luckily Elissa had started fundraising early, so she was able to buy her airtime much sooner than her opponent, before the price went up. That meant she had more money to do things like canvassing, voter registration drives, and digital ads. But that was only possible because folks chipped in months and years before Election Day, and her team was able to craft an effective, long term strategy because of it. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

and END Medicaid Expansion in North Carolina & beyond.

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74571826/441981356/823540626?refcode=ea.c1c956ee-e592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ms=ea.c1c956ee-e592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWM5NTZlZS1lNTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqUcdiUAIqeioPtEc4FqSFmuBycHsyquAIab1qUnYDo=&emci=ca433812-b992-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=c1c956ee-e592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=1049176)
Peter — **Last week, 600,000 North Carolinians gained access to critical health care through Medicaid Expansion.** This has been one of Roy’s top priorities since day one, and through sheer hard work and determination, we got it done. But just last week, Trump suggested that if he wins the White House again — and if Republicans take control of the Senate — he could overturn the Affordable Care Act, ending the law that allowed us to expand Medicaid in the first place. Roy and North Carolina Democrats fought for _years_ to enact Medicaid Expansion for our state. If Trump succeeds, he’ll undo all their hard work. **Overturning the ACA and ripping health care away from the American people is unacceptable. Now, he needs to know where YOU stand.** | **Peter: Do you OPPOSE Donald Trump’s threat to overturn the Affordable Care Act?** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74571828/441981358/1600736749?refcode=ea.c1c956ee-e592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ms=ea.c1c956ee-e592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWM5NTZlZS1lNTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqUcdiUAIqeioPtEc4FqSFmuBycHsyquAIab1qUnYDo=&emci=ca433812-b992-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=c1c956ee-e592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74571830/441981360/1600736749?refcode=ea.c1c956ee-e592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ms=ea.c1c956ee-e592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWM5NTZlZS1lNTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqUcdiUAIqeioPtEc4FqSFmuBycHsyquAIab1qUnYDo=&emci=ca433812-b992-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=c1c956ee-e592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=1049176)

subject: Three reasons:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate**
body:
Add your name to show Tammy that you’re with us. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74571928/441981693/1354111473?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231204_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFiNjYwNmUtZTY5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m5kzecV_zpMBeoaXjIVKf9HpIy08dhaf_Sbve8HB-Kw=)
---
**First Lady Tammy Murphy is running for the United States Senate, and we want to show her who’s standing with her as she launches her campaign.** We’ll give you three good reasons to give Tammy your endorsement today, but if you’re ready to cut right to the chase: [**Click here to personally endorse Tammy Murphy for the United States Senate!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74571929/441981694/-2126796021?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231204_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFiNjYwNmUtZTY5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m5kzecV_zpMBeoaXjIVKf9HpIy08dhaf_Sbve8HB-Kw=&emci=15d8ec21-e692-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4ab6606e-e692-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=18002451) | [ENDORSE TAMMY NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74571930/441981695/-2126796021?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231204_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFiNjYwNmUtZTY5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m5kzecV_zpMBeoaXjIVKf9HpIy08dhaf_Sbve8HB-Kw=&emci=15d8ec21-e692-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4ab6606e-e692-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=18002451)
---
There are too many reasons to support Tammy to fit them all in this email. Here are just three of them:
1. **New Jersey deserves a Senator we can trust.** Bob Menendez is too busy fighting for his own future to fight for ours, but Tammy has delivered big wins for Jersey from the moment she became First Lady.
2. **Tammy would break barriers — giving NJ women another seat at the table.** New Jersey has never elected a woman to the US Senate before. It’s time to change that.
3. **Tammy has proven she’ll make our state better for everyone.** As First Lady, she’s helped deliver better healthcare for moms and babies, introduced a climate change curriculum for all our schools, and led the conversation on issues that matter most — from gun safety, to climate change, to reproductive rights.

[**If you believe Tammy’s the right woman for this job, add your name now to personally endorse her in New Jersey’s Senate race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74571931/441981696/-2126796021?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231204_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGFiNjYwNmUtZTY5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m5kzecV_zpMBeoaXjIVKf9HpIy08dhaf_Sbve8HB-Kw=&emci=15d8ec21-e692-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4ab6606e-e692-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=18002451)

Tammy would break barriers — giving NJ women another seat at the table. New Jersey has never elected a woman to the US Senate before. It’s time to change that. 3. Tammy has proven she’ll make our state better for everyone. Peter, We’re in! Team Eric has officially submitted its statement of candidacy and over 1,000 petition signatures – waaay more than required - to get Eric on the ballot for re-election! For the past month and a half, volunteers across the district have worked tirelessly to collect signatures, and we cannot thank them enough. The first part is done, but with just months until the primary there’s a tough fight ahead and we need all supporters on deck. **[Would you sign on to show your support for Eric’s re-election bid, Peter?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlMt4cxn0OolCoyXreppPcfoY2fLkqa7FWNWDEFsEwtiF7P0ISQ1t3zMvPstUTDc9tE78bPzMtl9N_SR8Mp_Uq-yUFrlOwpWuafNjAmCghd2Nv7HTQaRXDsYGwdqu8EKYqIHAJ2BF19rl4y_2jFpmdShoALt1XRFJGwWj56OI_t8fwEMsrePeiGNoPwlO-e9w4FPSORSrWwwvCW5AxRlshAA6E3cfLe2zVO39-DlO2T6jmMaGpH_VD5JKKxFaLrJMOReN8sVONfoxIzT2lpUuL4/41u/qV7Wn3mUSqebK38blQxG2A/h1/R34997NiXjz_r7DeVo7P6uTsPKatIhciO8gyVKUZKUM)**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlMt4cxn0OolCoyXreppPcfoY2fLkqa7FWNWDEFsEwtiF7P0ISQ1t3zMvPstUTDc9s-RnchQUT_HTkVY2TnicvY_1VK2KlW1XRzYvzlBolmajZjBgAkVei8VfgJzZ9tcKImaC9B-gvclvl80TKqZh_yIb4njKpMq4xzRBYDK8I8xyHC8J-l6FkYQNQZushhyqaEzxutHYBxCB4_oxBqVL0Zg4evzciS_7R0ia37IZ_qtMmh09v74cZSU6QBRR8d6WEd2UYgACLUIOD2g-rGDwAH/41u/qV7Wn3mUSqebK38blQxG2A/h2/ilXMOgBwCWpvYeTEd1i5mAFvRTpInbroGVHW9-XTOeU)
---
With this major milestone accomplished, Eric wanted to share some of his most valued lessons from winter door knocking:
---
**Lesson #1: Layer, layer, and until the zipper is almost stuck... keep layering!** The most important step of petitioning in winter happens before you even grab the clipboard. I check the radar each morning and see the winds whipping over the Mississippi as the temperatures drop into the single digits! You need at least two pairs of socks, a minimum of three layers over your core, and probably two pairs of pants. Furry boots encouraged. **Lesson #2: You can never have enough pens!** Believe it or not, they all freeze. Seriously, every pocket should have multiple. I even recommend bringing some spare boxes in the car! **Lesson #3: Bring a friend!**
It’s a lot more fun with company. Dog treats help too so you can make friends along the way! **Lesson #4: Wear gloves!**
Yes, this is separate from layering because it’s just that important. Your fingers will thank you later. **Lesson #5: Have a good smile!**
The goal is to talk to voters and fighting for democracy puts a smile on my face. We all could use more smiles!
---
Every volunteer, voter, supporter, and donor inspires our effort, and we can’t make it through this cycle without your grassroots support. [**That’s why we’re asking everyone to sign on as a citizen signer for Eric’s re-election to IL-17.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlMt4cxn0OolCoyXreppPcfoY2fLkqa7FWNWDEFsEwtiF7P0ISQ1t3zMvPstUTDc9srxp7u87f9l2WlpUxZEOa0ROE8hh_0tygnE-QDAHlOG-rqiY7HzgViASHqlMgE5qkC80U-ZJzHqVgb6rbOvk-uX2XMWvyxs6XI0Dk6oSX-MeST77sMrYBP4e85brJZCz0iPBKcoOsJ_LVPE74e2yMO1phD8y39iiLKyGOrATAjJt0U3WE_ijNwsI4GT0L40Qy5i-JXpqq7VEhfnQFvFuGe/41u/qV7Wn3mUSqebK38blQxG2A/h3/3UvMmKzSDADXVm5LfNsfOGSG84LcZYQUqRxBgzDmXpU)
---
[ **Sign the Petition** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlMt4cxn0OolCoyXreppPcfoY2fLkqa7FWNWDEFsEwtiF7P0ISQ1t3zMvPstUTDc9sJPX1Isf0HBbpOkzmP5WTHMAJFSKV2tSSZNf95tq6em9yWOj_uLMkJH7yvsU_PFc3d31PRzHQfrn23-r5T0BwmgriY4aaHnXlbrcP2_yYc6-AmzJOB1479KXi-NSCg3xfekjEFp1RUzwTmWD_eA_VdcTlfV2TfinB63nVdSCcZP0ps9CL1yncx2Fy7qOEMtjTvpqGlfJhuHeIOvh_F7fwi/41u/qV7Wn3mUSqebK38blQxG2A/h4/_JiXd1y5dFz62GcDIs_AFofJ_IDLU1KBow87bWDL-5A)
---
Thank you for being on this journey with us. Our work doesn’t stop here. Eric Sorensen HQ PS. If you’re interested in helping support our canvassing efforts, from supplies to staff, **[every dollar you contribute will go a long way.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE16Yq3cn0CZ98JsJ-X0f71bUM8BtRYWsT0NooHHP6BH041XlWgZDygPmAE0nhfqc0zCadAmAVy9zdIeGPfg2K8FSn4yI-cGLWOMKD6vjYawg1SyggEEbevktUtOFEbzJQdFHkP6wGEzCUixWCdd_hGz791pNIFjiETYAbRRzoDU4oxmG93Nma4GAU6aU6x-gTOQQnZQ7P2Py_sVz9haQKvDgzr9vJSm1MFoLQbLThUs6F-AlV9X5gVhl9CA-cJjqsAXcMurx1fmbRJWLfII8e8e8M7UGVWzY7o1Mgxiom-FpgW8epTit1aq9yVmDg7pMPbn7O4iteBMMzMopYOJ08jeXWM9ClFnwBc5I7t1onzbiw/41u/qV7Wn3mUSqebK38blQxG2A/h5/sQZ7EbFeFqoa1amV7hPRIbk2QPX5gM2jcQrWumQu44Q)**

Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. Fellow American,

2024 hasn’t even begun yet, but Big Tech’s election-interfering censorship is already here. I have a new title to add to the list – **_the most censored presidential candidate._**

Back in May, LinkedIn locked my account and censored me for posting videos where I expressed fact-based views as a presidential candidate about climate policy and Biden's relationships with China. They said it violated their policies relating to "misinformation, hate speech, and violence."

Now we’re finding out that was only one instance of **18 times Big Tech censored or suppressed my freedom of speech.** _This is election interference of the highest order._

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-ovL1mFtxVm51q9opDiS-A~~/AARclAA~)
| [** STAND UP TO BIG TECH **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-ovL1mFtxVm51q9opDiS-A~~/AARclAA~)
---

They are not censoring me because it's false. **They are censoring me because it's the TRUTH.**

But at this point are we really that surprised? Conservatives have been dealing with censorship, shadow bans, and outright suppression of free speech for years now.

_**I’ve had enough. Once I’m President, we will shut this [censored] down.**_

[**If you're as concerned as I am about how easy it was to shut down a presidential candidate's platform to reach out to voters, then I need you to stand with me, Fellow American.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-ovL1mFtxVm51q9opDiS-A~~/AARclAA~)

Thank you,

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-ovL1mFtxVm51q9opDiS-A~~/AARclAA~)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** TRUTH > CENSORSHIP **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-ovL1mFtxVm51q9opDiS-A~~/AARclAA~)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-ovL1mFtxVm51q9opDiS-A~~/AARclAA~)

name: Our Revolution
subject: indiscriminate bombing only strengthens Hamas and endangers Jewish hostages
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12577?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231204_PT_berniept_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_berniept&t=1011&akid=4964%2E5885482%2EmAhAPN

STAND WITH BERNIE (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12577?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231204_PT_berniept_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_berniept&t=1012&akid=4964%2E5885482%2EmAhAPN)

Peter Willis,

On Friday, the temporary pause in Gaza ended and the horrific bombing that has claimed the lives of so many innocent men, women, and children began again.

Hamas is a terrorist organization that must be destroyed, but killing innocent people in Gaza will only strengthen their hold on the region, not weaken it.

That’s why we’re reaching out to ask you to stand with Bernie and progressives calling for an end to indiscriminate bombing in Gaza. Speak out for innocent civilians here! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12577?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231204_PT_berniept_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_berniept&t=1013&akid=4964%2E5885482%2EmAhAPN)

SAVE CIVILIANS (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12577?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231204_PT_berniept_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_berniept&t=1014&akid=4964%2E5885482%2EmAhAPN)

With AIPAC and other right-wing groups pledging to spend “at least $100 million” defeating any progressive with the moral conviction to call for ending the bombing of civilians, Our Revolution is mobilizing to ensure progressives know we have their back.

In the short pause, Hamas freed many hostages and critical humanitarian aid was brought into Gaza. Now, with bombing resuming, both hostages and Palestinian civilians are in great danger.

AIPAC claims to speak for Jewish Americans, but with Jewish leaders like Senator Bernie Sanders, Congressman Jamie Raskin, and others calling for a stop to the indiscriminate bombing, that is clearly not the case.

However, we know AIPAC has unlimited resources, and we need to stand in solidarity with progressives calling for peace.

Can we count on you to add your name here to join Bernie Sanders in calling for an end to the senseless murder of civilians in Gaza? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12577?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231204_PT_berniept_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_berniept&t=1015&akid=4964%2E5885482%2EmAhAPN)

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

clean_body: Judicial Watch, America’s leading government watchdog group, today announced that Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton will question candidates at the next Republican presidential debate to be aired on NewsNation and Rumble at 8 p.m. ET, Wednesday, December 6, from the University of Alabama. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 4, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch, America’s leading government watchdog group, today announced that Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton will question candidates at the next Republican presidential debate to be aired on NewsNation and Rumble at 8 p.m. ET, Wednesday, December 6, from the University of Alabama. ---|--- | | | | | “DC crime is out of control but local leaders continue to waste $270,000 in tax money promoting the extremist Black Lives Matter movement in the heart of Washington, DC, that is racist, anti-police, anti-American, and often violent,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. ---|--- | | | | | A few years after Facebook (now Meta) launched a censorship board to decide which posts get blocked an update on the panel, which is currently inviting public opinion on whether to suppress anti-immigration speech, is in order. The original board—as well as new members—is stacked with leftists, including a close friend of leftwing billionaire George Soros who served on the board of directors of his Open Society Foundations (OSF). This is important because the oversight board, as it is officially known, determines which posts get blocked from the world’s most popular social networking website which has an estimated 3 billion users. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently it received five pages of records from the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) that show then-Vice President Joe Biden and his son Hunter received a May 26, 2016, email detailing a scheduled “8:45 am prep for a 9 am phone call with Pres Poroshenko,” who was the president of Ukraine. Joe Biden’s email address is the alias robert.l.peters@pci.gov, Hunter Biden’s email account is disclosed as hbiden@rosemontseneca.com. (Hunter Biden was on the board of the controversial Ukrainian firm Burisma at the time.) ---|--- | | | Newsweek The Department of Justice recently released a redacted subpoena for ex-President Donald Trump‘s account on Twitter, now named X, amid Special Counsel Jack Smith‘s investigation of attempts to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election. Tom Fitton, president of watchdog Judicial Watch, also spoke about the warrant, saying that it “lends further urgency to Congress DEFUNDING NOW this rogue operation. Call your members of Congress now to share your views.” Fox News The Washington, D.C., government dropped hundreds of thousands of dollars touching up its “Black Lives Matter” street painting as crime skyrockets in the Democrat-run city. The refurbishment of the infamous mural, which Democrat Mayor Muriel Bowser initially painted in June 2020 as BLM protests were underway in the city and across the country, appears to have run taxpayers $271,231, including $217,680 in labor costs and $53,551 in paint supplies, according to documents obtained by Judicial Watch from D.C.’s Department of Transportation. The Daily Wire A House Democrat said former President Donald Trump should be “eliminated” moments after he decried the use of “dangerous” rhetoric, an ironic choice of words that prompted blowback and led the congressman to issue an apology. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

It’s a nice video, but c’mon man. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/07e66eba305b/a-new-way-forward-for-texas-12666075?e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
Shortly before Thanksgiving, Colin Allred shared a video on his social media recapping his time in this race so far.
He showed photos from the different locations he’s traveled to throughout the campaign. It was a nice video. But by our count, _there were only 10 counties on the list._
_**TEN!**_
Out of 254 counties in Texas, Colin has only made it to a small handful of them.
Thierry on the other hand has visited literally dozens of counties since launching his grassroots campaign.

[](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=bae4fb7568&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Thierry knows that we cannot win Texas if we’re not showing up.
Which is why he’s committed to traveling to every corner of The Lone Star State throughout this campaign.
[**Please kick in $20.24 or more today and ensure we have the resources we need to keep Thierry on the road, meeting everyday Texans where they are.**](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=f0d78349b9&e=b8ba94fd9b)
**It’s the only way we’re going to flip Texas blue, fire Ted Cruz and create A New Way Forward.**
Thank you!Team Tchenko

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: This is how we will win in Arizona:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
As you read this, we're asking hundreds of thousands of people a critically important question
#

Peter -
As you read this, we're asking hundreds of thousands of people a critically important question:
Can Ruben Gallego count on your personal endorsement in his campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona?
In October, Kari Lake announced her campaign for Senate. Since then, thousands of committed supporters have added their names to help Ruben defend our Senate majority.
So today, we want to ask you an important question: will you add your name as one of the thousands of supporters who are standing with Ruben Gallego in Arizona?
It's a small and simple action, but it sends a very powerful message about the size and strength of our grassroots campaign. And that's critically important — we’re going to need thousands and thousands more supporters behind us to win this campaign.
We’ll even send Ruben a list of everyone who signs on today so he knows who his top supporters are.
What do you say?
[**Please use this link to add your name and say you endorse Ruben Gallego in his campaign for United States Senate in Arizona.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_dec23/?source=em231204-1&refcode2=1511.734936.uVmGcD&akid=1511%2E734936%2EuVmGcD)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_dec23/?source=em231204-1&refcode2=1511.734936.uVmGcD&akid=1511%2E734936%2EuVmGcD)
It'll be great for Ruben to see your name on the list of endorsers. Thank you in advance for saying you're in.
Ruben Gallego for Senate

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1511%2E734936%2EuVmGcD). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=1511_734936_uVmGcD&akid=1511%2E734936%2EuVmGcD)

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: I’m so proud of this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
Thanks to this amazing grassroots team, we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal for November. |
#
---
Team, My team and I just ran through our numbers for November, and I’m happy to report that we reached our fundraising goal, and then some! While we strive to reach our goals _every_ month, the fact that we were able to surpass even our most optimistic projections in November speaks volumes about the strength of this grassroots team. I launched Fight Like Hell PAC to build on our success in Michigan and support President Biden, Vice President Harris, and Democrats across the country who will defend working people and protect our fundamental rights. **And the fact that so many of you have gone above and beyond in supporting this mission means the world to me.** We have more deadlines coming up and you’ll surely be hearing from us, but I wanted to take today to let you know how much I appreciate you. I’m so proud of this team. Thank you, Gretchen | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573149/441986368/751862923?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE4YjMyNjUtZWE5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Upyoawjzd6lvBWUfKhRhK7WDFxWUwDE_mx2nkeJaN8s=)

And the fact that so many of you have gone above and beyond in supporting this mission means the world to me. We have more deadlines coming up and you’ll surely be hearing from us, but I wanted to take today to let you know how much I appreciate you. I’m so proud of this team. Thank you, Gretchen | = Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: =?utf-8?Q?Julie=20Clark?=
subject: I Signed The Border Policy Pledge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
Proudly signed the Texans for Strong Borders Federal Policy Pledge! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/80c8220fe90f/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12666323?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=fffd33c81b&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Peter,

Our country is under attack from _**illegal immigration**_ , _**career criminals walking across our border**_ , and an _**endless flow of dangerous drugs**_ that are wiping out a generation of Americans. **Where are our leaders,__where is Tony Gonzales?__**

Tony Gonzales persuaded the people he would stand strong on border security **but has failed the people of Texas and the United States.** While he loves to visit the border for photo ops with celebrities, Tony refuses to introduce or support legislation that will finally secure our border. He ignores the border crisis until it’s time to run for reelection, then magically appears at the border with his campaign staff, cameras in hand, to drum up campaign donations from dark money special interest groups.

_**Well, the people of Texas see through his phony display**_ and so do the American people. We are tired of RINO Tony’s false promises on border security and we are tired of the Biden administrations’ criminal neglect.

As far as I am concerned, _**there is no difference between Tony the RINO and ol’ sleepy Joe._They both don’t care about Texas and they are both selling out America._**_

What the people of Texas deserve is a **Congresswoman who understands that the __American people COME FIRST__** __,__ and will fight like hell to secure our borders and protect our Republic.

_**I am the person for the job,**_ I will never stop fighting to secure our border, and just like Trump,_**I will defend our Republic against the wave of illegal immigrants and career criminals coming across our southern border.**_

**That’s why I signed the Texans for Strong Borders Federal Policy Pledge,** because I will stand up to the drug cartels, I will stand up to special interest groups, and I will stand up to the RINOs and extreme liberals who are hell-bent on destroying our Republic.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=502bb3811a&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| [PROTECT OUR SOUTHERN BORDER](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=a1da94170b&e=c982eb7ad4 "PROTECT OUR SOUTHERN BORDER")
---
| [JOIN THE FIGHT FOR AMERICA](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=c9bc2316dd&e=c982eb7ad4 "JOIN THE FIGHT FOR AMERICA")
---
|
---
|
For Our Republic,

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23

name: Hill Harper
subject: Repping black + gold makes me so proud
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
I had the pleasure to speak at the Alpha PAC’s reception during the Congressional Black Caucus 52nd Annual Legislative Conference.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231204&t=1&akid=662%2E62735%2E8MYr49)
**Peter,** **did you know I’m a proud ΑΦΑ fraternity member?**
I’m proud to rep black and gold everyday but I’m especially proud today as it’s our ΑΦΑ Founders Day — the day in 1906 that the ΑΦΑ fraternity was founded at Cornell University.
**Since then ΑΦΑ has become a space of community, service, culture, and brotherhood for folks across the country.**
It’s been full circle for me to start out as a young man becoming an Alpha to now being a single dad running for Senate and being endorsed by the Alpha PAC in my race. I even getting the opportunity to speak at the Alpha PAC’s reception during the Congressional Black Caucus 52nd Annual Legislative Conference.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231204?amount=5&refcode=em20231204-662&refcode2=662_62735_8MYr49&akid=662%2E62735%2E8MYr49)
_Hill speaking at the at the Alpha PAC’s reception during the Congressional Black Caucus 52nd Annual Legislative Conference_
The Alpha PAC endorsing me and giving me this platform means that my brothers see that I’m trying to fight for **_us_**. I’m fighting to bring back investment into our communities that have been ignored for far too long. I’m fighting to make this system work for everyday people, not just the wealthy elite.
[**If you believe in that political future and want to see our Senate be diversified with representatives who are willing to fight for the people, not corporations or the 1% please, chip in anything you can right now!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231204?amount=5&refcode=em20231204-662&refcode2=662_62735_8MYr49&akid=662%2E62735%2E8MYr49)_Small-dollar grassroots donations are going to make all the difference as we take on the political establishment._
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231204?amount=5&refcode=em20231204-662&refcode2=662_62735_8MYr49&akid=662%2E62735%2E8MYr49)**
To my fellow Alphas, happy Founders Day!
Onwards,
Hill
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231204&t=2&refcode2=662_62735_8MYr49&akid=662%2E62735%2E8MYr49)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=662%2E62735%2E8MYr49)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=662%2E62735%2E8MYr49)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

| | Patriot,

---
**One week from today, reports indicate I will once again take the WITNESS STAND for the fake trial in New York.**
---
Not since Teddy Roosevelt – over 100 years ago – has a former U.S. President taken the witness stand.
---
_Teddy was defending himself from what he called an**“alliance of corruption”** between the political machines that had seized control of both the Republicans and the Democrats._
---
_...Sound familiar, Patriot?_
---
Much like Teddy, I am a relentless fighter and a “happy warrior” in our mission to buck the political machine and put the _American people_ first.
---
It’s no surprise Teddy earned a spot on Mount Rushmore alongside Washington, Lincoln, and Jefferson.
---
Who knows, maybe one day, we will have to make a slight modification to Mount Rushmore...
---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=0c01abf6ae79426e8762dd036097cadc&_e=AoBPDqQG9-JFoF7KRGrerTDprSMMnh1HiPaWH7oNxlXU_oNGt_U4D0by1JbjGYv1n0X2qAKbu68xKv0qfT3xmnUuA0nhS7FntoL3zjC9O5sLxWP2pjrK3MQxCKEwt2wLBYBrWodXe5cxBNp08pvoPqGvn5EqKDDbDcsPkgeo2mNoFHc-Ts5gUJvd2BVe9m09_1kbsBx-jWWUlI5zDEVjgw-MikmmfItDD-grTyk0PY9-kfdTwD1HOxmW50xS74GEbZHth2STqF1LC6WYqLAIJkCZFBgdGqXxKKsc9K-81wcqA5ilIpe5zM5p5PyqKwS-7t4ZPjsmETYDB1KmLluyXVzwMrLQBM58r5LAsnbjEw-XzFVTvj1a-lbOI8FsEUlWY4v5r4nwbsNUHZTp1YbtndPu1ExdgET5NwkbcwyXLe1eOJ0nPCzR13rs8Ve_9ktXmXPPIjrLW349Mg5Nmc5bOIkjm9TIz5PXIAv5KsdN9Yp_V-HC_Hm9NAwIXtZozkcc)
---
Your chance to vote for a Washington, a Lincoln, a Jefferson, a Teddy Roosevelt only comes every once in a lifetime.
---
_And in 2024, you have the chance to cast a historic, once-in-a-lifetime vote to save our country and Make America Great Again!_
---
I’m committed now more than ever to save America. Are you?
---

clean_body: One week from today, reports indicate I will take the witness stand...| | | | | Patriot, One week from today, reports indicate I will once again take the WITNESS STAND for the fake trial in New York. Not since Teddy Roosevelt – over 100 years ago – has a former U.S. President taken the witness stand. Teddy was defending himself from what he called an“alliance of corruption” between the political machines that had seized control of both the Republicans and the Democrats. ...Sound familiar, Patriot? Much like Teddy, I am a relentless fighter and a “happy warrior” in our mission to buck the political machine and put the American people first. It’s no surprise Teddy earned a spot on Mount Rushmore alongside Washington, Lincoln, and Jefferson. Who knows, maybe one day, we will have to make a slight modification to Mount Rushmore... Your chance to vote for a Washington, a Lincoln, a Jefferson, a Teddy Roosevelt only comes every once in a lifetime. And in 2024, you have the chance to cast a historic, once-in-a-lifetime vote to save our country and Make America Great Again! I’m committed now more than ever to save America. Are you? Of course, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people running our country right now, please don’t even think about donating. I sincerely mean it! | | - Thank you, Donald J. | | Friend,

---
Over the past few years, we've all heard that "American democracy is dying."
---
During my speech in Iowa, I made it clear that there is no greater threat to our nation's democracy than Crooked Joe Biden and the Democrats.
---
**We are witnessing a sitting president weaponize the entire legal system to try and steal an election and imprison his leading opponent despite committing NO CRIME.**
---
Biden isn't just threatening American democracy. He's _killing_ it.
---
Our campaign is a righteous crusade to liberate our Republic from Biden.
---
For decades, you watched as a corrupt political class in our nation's capital looted your money, trampled your dignity, and pushed their radical agenda into every aspect of your lives.
---
In 2016, you voted to stand up to those liars, losers, crooks, and creeps - and you elected an outsider as president to put America FIRST.
---
But now, those liars, losers, crooks, and creeps lurking within the depths of the Washington Swamp are revolting against our America First movement by trying to imprison the only man who can stop them.
---
I promise you this: if you put me back in the White House, their reign will be over, and America will be a FREE NATION once again.
---
**Very soon, the first vote of the entire 2024 election will be cast. It will be our first chance to take a stand against tyranny and peacefully defend our Republic.**
---

name: Americans Against Terrorism
subject: STOP Terrorist Sympathizers!
body:
| | | **Right now, social media is FLOODED with pro-Hamas content from far Left extremists.

_And the scariest part is,_it’s reaching and influencing our young people._ _

Let us be clear: there is NO ROOM for terrorist sympathizers in America.

We’re working to clear this content from our children’s screens, but we need your help.
