name: Brian King
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Peter, I'm Rep. Brian King, and I'm running to be Utah's next governor. **Peter – we can do so much better.** **I'm running to offer an alternative—a government that prioritizes the public good over personal interests, delivering results, not rhetoric, and a culture of courage and character, not contention—for the better.** [**We officially launched our campaign for Governor of Utah this month! But to start this campaign off strong, we need 81 Digital Founding Donors to stand with us. Peter, will you contribute $35 or more and become a Digital Founding Donor today? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573902/441988768/158643898?refcode=20231204_em_fr_b1_BK_mandate&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUwODQyZjQtZWQ5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FoyML8yg7ovuDwnVjr6bKc0Q5ibvt8vOMUvtAq-Rg2Q=) [Become a Founding Digital Donor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573903/441988769/158643898?refcode=20231204_em_fr_b1_BK_mandate&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUwODQyZjQtZWQ5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FoyML8yg7ovuDwnVjr6bKc0Q5ibvt8vOMUvtAq-Rg2Q=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573904/441988770/158643898?refcode=20231204_em_fr_b1_BK_mandate&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUwODQyZjQtZWQ5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FoyML8yg7ovuDwnVjr6bKc0Q5ibvt8vOMUvtAq-Rg2Q=)
**Let me share why I'm running, Peter:** 1️⃣**My faith and roots in Utah guide me:** I was born in Salt Lake City. My father was an attorney, and my grandfather was a sheep and cattle rancher in Wayne and Garfield counties. On my mother's side, I proudly carry the legacy of my great-great-grandfather, Hyrum Smith, brother to Joseph Smith, the founder of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints. **As an LDS Bishop in the mid-1990s, I've embraced connecting with people during vulnerable moments.** My interfaith marriage and close ties with friends and family from diverse religious backgrounds underscore my belief that every Utahn deserves an advocate for religious or non-religious liberty. 2️⃣**I have a career of advocating for Utahns:** I decided to become a trial lawyer representing individuals who had been harmed by insurers' wrongful denial of claims. **It's a constant David vs. Goliath battle.** I was regularly in court advocating for families against corporate interest and representing those whose mental health and substance use disorder treatment claims were denied by insurance companies. Political service became a natural extension of this commitment to advocating for others. I was elected to the State Legislature in 2008 and House Minority Leader from 2015 to 2023. **In navigating the complexities of legislation, I learned the art of thoughtful disagreement for the better.** 3️⃣ **Some political parties have abandoned us:** At my dinner table on Mondays, our Brady Bunch family of seven children, along with three grandkids, all gather to eat, laugh, and thoughtfully discuss diverse perspectives. It seems so natural to me that the richness of our diversity is a source of strength and unity. **_But some political parties have simply given up on problem-solving and representing our values_**. **_Instead, they restrict our freedoms and demonize our diversity._** **Peter, you deserve better than our current state of politics. I'm running to offer an alternative – for the better.** **I'm running to give us a chance to deliver results with character and courage but it's going to take a large coalition of everyday Utahns to make this happen.** [**We need Digital Founding Donors supporting our grassroots movement to ensure that our state has an experienced, thoughtful, and deeply-rooted advocate as our next governor. Peter, will you join our team with a $35 donation today? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573905/441988771/158643898?refcode=20231204_em_fr_b1_BK_mandate&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUwODQyZjQtZWQ5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FoyML8yg7ovuDwnVjr6bKc0Q5ibvt8vOMUvtAq-Rg2Q=) [Join our team](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573906/441988772/158643898?refcode=20231204_em_fr_b1_BK_mandate&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGUwODQyZjQtZWQ5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FoyML8yg7ovuDwnVjr6bKc0Q5ibvt8vOMUvtAq-Rg2Q=) In service, Rep. Brian King |

clean_body: | | | Peter, I'm Rep. Brian King, and I'm running to be Utah's next governor. Peter – we can do so much better. I'm running to offer an alternative—a government that prioritizes the public good over personal interests, delivering results, not rhetoric, and a culture of courage and character, not contention—for the better. = = = Let me share why I'm running, Peter: 1️⃣My faith and roots in Utah guide me: I was born in Salt Lake City. My father was an attorney, and my grandfather was a sheep and cattle rancher in Wayne and Garfield counties. On my mother's side, I proudly carry the legacy of my great-great-grandfather, Hyrum Smith, brother to Joseph Smith, the founder of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints. As an LDS Bishop in the mid-1990s, I've embraced connecting with people during vulnerable moments. My interfaith marriage and close ties with friends and family from diverse religious backgrounds underscore my belief that every Utahn deserves an advocate for religious or non-religious liberty. 2️⃣I have a career of advocating for Utahns: I decided to become a trial lawyer representing individuals who had been harmed by insurers' wrongful denial of claims. It's a constant David vs. Goliath battle. I was regularly in court advocating for families against corporate interest and representing those whose mental health and substance use disorder treatment claims were denied by insurance companies. Political service became a natural extension of this commitment to advocating for others. I was elected to the State Legislature in 2008 and House Minority Leader from 2015 to 2023. In navigating the complexities of legislation, I learned the art of thoughtful disagreement for the better. 3️⃣ Some political parties have abandoned us: At my dinner table on Mondays, our Brady Bunch family of seven children, along with three grandkids, all gather to eat, laugh, and thoughtfully discuss diverse perspectives. It seems so natural to me that the richness of our diversity is a source of strength and unity. But some political parties have simply given up on problem-solving and representing our values. Instead, they restrict our freedoms and demonize our diversity. Peter, you deserve better than our current state of politics. I'm running to offer an alternative – for the better. I'm running to give us a chance to deliver results with character and courage but it's going to take a large coalition of everyday Utahns to make this happen. = = In service, Rep. Brian King | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress. |

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573934/441988865/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=231203_mk_railroad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjZlNzAzYi1lZTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iaa016PblNLbMmsRqEeKVgJc9OoUTIKlg58v1oFpL74=)

Friend, For too long, the Heartland has been overlooked and underfunded. That's why the top priority of my career has been bringing federal investments back home to Northern Ohio. **We scored another big victory in that fight recently, team, and I'm so proud to share it with you.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573935/441988866/1289029043?ms=231203_mk_railroad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjZlNzAzYi1lZTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iaa016PblNLbMmsRqEeKVgJc9OoUTIKlg58v1oFpL74=&emci=885c25e9-ca92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=e66e703b-ee92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=2814549) This funding is a direct result of the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, passed in November of 2021. And it couldn't come at a better time. The Napoleon, Defiance & Western Railway had 48 train derailments during 2022 alone. For the safety of our rail workers and our communities, we must rebuild our infrastructure. **Friend, this vital investment will turn one of the worst railroad tracks in America into an engine of economic development in Ohio. I'm so proud to bring these federal dollars home.** Thank you for being part of our team, friend. — Marcy **[Support our work →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573936/441988867/1037629634?refcode=231203_mk_railroad_b1&ms=231203_mk_railroad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjZlNzAzYi1lZTkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iaa016PblNLbMmsRqEeKVgJc9OoUTIKlg58v1oFpL74=)**

name: COURIER
subject: Re: Far-right propagandists are terrified of us
body:
We’re not surprised, but we are a little flattered.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573948/441988964/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU2MGQ0NWUtZWU5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P2I7bPhSEk_PZKQtx8-ZT4Mf6HKWZJPUyzfYy4bFFbk=&emci=ffa38153-e292-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4e60d45e-ee92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=14016711)
Whether it’s Joe Rogan or _The Daily Caller_ , we’re used to being attacked by bad actors who spread lies and misinformation.
But here's the thing, Peter.
**Attacks like these tell us that we're doing our jobs. These guys are terrified of our mission to use factual journalism to correct the record and stop right-wing propaganda and conspiracy theories before they spread.**
You can learn more about why the right-wing network is attacking us below, but if you already know you're ready to do your part to hold bad actors on the right accountable, [**please pitch in $5 or anything you can today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573950/441988966/-2108642287?refcode=em20231204&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU2MGQ0NWUtZWU5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P2I7bPhSEk_PZKQtx8-ZT4Mf6HKWZJPUyzfYy4bFFbk=)
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Courier Newsroom [info@e.couriernewsroom.com]
Date: Mon, Nov 27, 2023 at 7:16 PM
Subject: Far-right propagandists are terrified of us_
Peter,
Our commitment to reliable, fact-based reporting is getting under the skin of one of the most influential far-right websites out there. We can’t say we’re surprised...
**_The Daily Caller_ — a right-wing conspiracy theory machine masquerading as a news outlet — just published a “report” attacking COURIER** and our mission to provide trustworthy online reporting to communities in news deserts across the country.
[**If you want to make sure we have the resources to continue our hard-hitting reporting, will you pitch in $5 today? Our stories are free to read with no subscription fees, so we’re counting on your support to keep up our work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573952/441988968/-2108642287?refcode=em20231204&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU2MGQ0NWUtZWU5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P2I7bPhSEk_PZKQtx8-ZT4Mf6HKWZJPUyzfYy4bFFbk=)
If our reporting is making the folks at _The Daily Caller_ anxious, it’s clear we’re doing something right. Let’s take a step back to remember exactly what kind of website it is in the first place:
* It was **founded by Tucker Carlson** , a man so extreme he was fired by Fox News.
* In 2016, it amplified **extremist election conspiracy theories** from Infowars and other far-right websites.
* In addition to the shady connections already mentioned, it has a history of **disturbing ties to white nationalists**.

_The Daily Caller_ is functionally a propaganda outlet that employs far-right bloggers who pretend to be journalists. They publish hit pieces that are light on facts and heavy on hate and conspiracy theories — and this latest “report” is no different.
**But the real reason they published their recent hit piece is that they’re terrified of us.** They’re finally being confronted by journalists who aren’t afraid to call out their lies in real-time in the places where misinformation spreads the fastest and expose them for what they are.
So we’re not intimidated by their attacks — **we’re emboldened.** We’re going to continue doing the hard work necessary to expose their lies and bring the truth to the communities we serve, whether the propagandists at _The Daily Caller_ like it or not.
**But we need your support to keep it up, Peter. As we mentioned, none of our stories are locked behind a paywall or subscription fee. Every single one of our reports is free to read, meaning we depend on your support to keep going.**
[**If you want to make sure we have the resources to keep reporting the facts in the face of right-wing attacks, please click here to pitch in $5 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573954/441988971/-2108642287?refcode=em20231204&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU2MGQ0NWUtZWU5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P2I7bPhSEk_PZKQtx8-ZT4Mf6HKWZJPUyzfYy4bFFbk=)
**[Donate $5 ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74573956/441988972/-2108642287?refcode=em20231204&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU2MGQ0NWUtZWU5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P2I7bPhSEk_PZKQtx8-ZT4Mf6HKWZJPUyzfYy4bFFbk=)**

Thank you,
The COURIER Team

You can learn more about why the right-wing network is attacking us below, but if you already know you're ready to do your part to hold bad actors on the right accountable, = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Courier Newsroom [info@e.couriernewsroom.com] Date: Mon, Nov 27, 2023 at 7:16 PM Subject: Far-right propagandists are terrified of us Peter, Our commitment to reliable, fact-based reporting is getting under the skin of one of the most influential far-right websites out there. We can’t say we’re surprised... The Daily Caller — a right-wing conspiracy theory machine masquerading as a news outlet — just published a “report” attacking COURIER and our mission to provide trustworthy online reporting to communities in news deserts across the country. = If our reporting is making the folks at The Daily Caller anxious, it’s clear we’re doing something right. Let’s take a step back to remember exactly what kind of website it is in the first place: It was founded by Tucker Carlson , a man so extreme he was fired by Fox News. In 2016, it amplified extremist election conspiracy theories from Infowars and other far-right websites. In addition to the shady connections already mentioned, it has a history of disturbing ties to white nationalists. The Daily Caller is functionally a propaganda outlet that employs far-right bloggers who pretend to be journalists. They publish hit pieces that are light on facts and heavy on hate and conspiracy theories — and this latest “report” is no different. But the real reason they published their recent hit piece is that they’re terrified of us. They’re finally being confronted by journalists who aren’t afraid to call out their lies in real-time in the places where misinformation spreads the fastest and expose them for what they are. So we’re not intimidated by their attacks — we’re emboldened. We’re going to continue doing the hard work necessary to expose their lies and bring the truth to the communities we serve, whether the propagandists at The Daily Caller like it or not. But we need your support to keep it up, Peter. As we mentioned, none of our stories are locked behind a paywall or subscription fee. Every single one of our reports is free to read, meaning we depend on your support to keep going. = = Thank you, The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

I’m proud to be one of the youngest women ever elected to state government and represent my neighbors in Virginia’s House of Delegates.
Now, I’m running for Congress because Virginians deserve someone who will fight for what’s right, who knows how hard it is to make ends meet, and who won’t let Congress take away our freedom to make decisions about our own bodies.
**But I can’t get to Congress without you.** Virginia’s 7th District has been home to some of the most competitive and expensive elections in recent years, and you can bet it’s going to be just as tough in 2024.

name: Governor Ralph Northam
subject: Abigail is the best choice to become the next Governor of Virginia.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
As Governor, I saw Abigail’s incredible commitment to her district and Virginia as a whole. I saw an effective leader, and I saw someone who never stopped working to deliver results.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74574187/441989700/-1898250603?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2023-12-4_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDFmY2NmYTQtZWY5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OjTySM9uZkcj6XKiTbO6JB9FgAA3evdoZPF0Hkoa0gQ=)

| Peter,

My good friend Abigail Spanberger officially announced her candidacy for Governor of Virginia, and I am honored to endorse her to serve as our next Governor.

Abigail is the best choice to become the next Governor of Virginia.

As Governor, I saw Abigail’s incredible commitment to her district and Virginia as a whole. I saw an effective leader, and I saw someone who never stopped working to deliver results.

I know Abigail will remain focused on the issues that matter most – creating jobs, investing in our schools, lowering drug prices, protecting our natural resources, and defending the rights of all Virginians.

[_**Early grassroots investment is key to her success, so I hope you’ll join me in making a contribution to become a founding donor to her campaign so we can show everyone that there is tremendous support for Abigail’s candidacy:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74574188/441989701/-1898250603?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2023-12-4_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDFmY2NmYTQtZWY5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OjTySM9uZkcj6XKiTbO6JB9FgAA3evdoZPF0Hkoa0gQ=)

| Peter,

I wanted to reach out to thank you for your ongoing support of my campaign.

As our most vulnerable communities see legislative attacks on voting rights, reproductive freedom, Social Security, and Medicare, we have to work together to take back the House. As we start a new fundraising month and finish off the year, I can’t understate the importance of supporting campaigns like mine.

These next few weeks will be critical in ensuring we have the resources we need to take back the House. _Unfortunately, this month is also historically a difficult period for fundraising._ [_**So, Peter, will you help me start this month on a strong note with a $5, $10, $15 contribution to my campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74574468/441991091/-1667771349?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2023-12-04_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzI2YWE3Ny1mMDkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RL1e_zaELWRqUxzAyML_svFGaF9TA0Dj6EmAIPp9UaA=)

Friend,
I am proud to announce that I am taking steps to listen and present legislative solutions to some serious issues—in particular, sexual assault and the protection of children and students. **
****I have drafted legislation that would ensure justice for victims of sexual abuse and assault, and that would improve systems of detecting, reporting, and acting on credible claims of sexual assault.** [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDY2Njg4OTg3Mjk4NTQ4NDYsXCJyXCI6MTA2NjY4OTQzMzk4MTQzNjAxfSIsInMiOiJhMDI0MWYwODEwOTcxNmVmIn0)

| It’s just another example of how far the GOP is willing to bend themselves to please Trump, and boost his many falsehoods.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4669%2E5257348%2EyMtxRY)
Derek,
Anna Paulina Luna, the architect of the sham vote to censure me, just released a new children’s book. To nobody’s surprise, it’s full of misinformation about the 2020 presidential election — this time trying to teach kids that Democrats stole the election.
****[It’s currently on sale for $19.99. Instead of spending your money on this book, I’m asking you to chip in $19.99 to help me defeat MAGA extremists and take our fight to defend democracy to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3286?c0=dec2023_abs_em.61xCN_&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC30_20231204_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4669%2E5257348%2EyMtxRY)****

---
Using thinly veiled analogies, Anna Paulina Luna’s book celebrates a candidate named Naranja (an orange fruit that bears a remarkable resemblance to a former president...).
Just take a look:
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC30_20231204_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4669%2E5257348%2EyMtxRY)
Derek, I’m not surprised that the person who kickstarted the sham censure vote against me in service of Donald Trump is now behind a children’s book praising him.
It’s just another example of how far the GOP is willing to bend themselves to please Trump, and boost his many falsehoods.
MAGA extremists have proposed expunging Trump’s impeachments.
And they continue to visit Mar-A-Lago to cozy up to Trump (and host their GOP mega-donors).
**Derek, there’s no limit to how far the GOP will go to defend Donald Trump, and rewrite history, which makes it all the more important that I make it to the U.S. Senate to hold them accountable.**
****[So please, pitch in $19.99 or any amount you can spare to help me defeat MAGA extremism and defend our democracy in the Senate.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3286?c0=dec2023_abs_em.61xCN_&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC30_20231204_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4669%2E5257348%2EyMtxRY)****

However, If you wish to unsubscribe you can do so [here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=L0bZ%2FV9MklofMFuvtF1RptHAGOX%2Fyip%2FJD164n43seTcLkTN%2F2SSaZ5%2FB%2BsHHXob4uLOamJYzjThTv5%2FQvkUSpAkk2JKcfZiMf%2BfQJpN0ELlJgPWRkk2Kz%2BP%2FlpikJzP52G77NnDFLTKtAtifHQ1rutGPT9e7Pv2cAnqjdAF55bcfxBGINP6IJLENh4dxhWt4PgqSaHiw3lRw8gn0rSg5vaufQ%2BOjef%2BNxpCgRSTvkqvzotGMP8jsKx55gddfPYbNx5lBUTZ1vC5qFLW5UV71cQpfsXv%2Ficvjh5VjQleMfHtQBIK2iALgusuGykwchK8xLFCPwt%2BFNqiQULlEbzr89JfyEvYJqaW67u9XBKxs04XOhXvC9sicAQNxPezkCvh8QWoVYiDz3zlWBx9S%2FixsvWyWD63K4cxiqJmzz42bBl9SIiBTzKFYgHx1lbFBbMh).

clean_body: Maps have been released | | | Peter, Georgia Republicans just released their plan to kick me out of Congress. In a blatant attempt to make me lose my seat, they redrew the district I represent to be over 20 points Republican. My worst fears have unfortunately been confirmed. The GOP has shown they’ll do anything and everything in their power to force me out of the Capitol. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = In 2021, Republicans tried to gerrymander me for the first time. My supporters stood beside me and I returned to Congress despite the GOP’s best efforts. But because of a court case, Georgia Republicans are now working to redraw the maps AGAIN, and they’ve chosen to target me for the second time in three years. I need to know you have my back right now, team. The fate of the gun safety movement I’ve been leading in Washington D.C. depends on our ability to fight back. =**_ We’re in this together, Lucy McBath | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Navigating Uncertainty (by Vikram Mansharamani)
subject: Is War Coming to South America?
body:
While the world focuses on the wars in Ukraine and Israel, Venezuela is threatening to annex a large portion of resource-rich Guyana
| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..08oY9rpOa-PghTIj0sVx7erClkRyMmbwjU3y9P8qoVs?) for more
---
[](https://substack..rB1H7axcP_sjWdENJB-L8zwcXwIYaWlaw1cRMkQb43M?)

# [Is War Coming to South America?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=139405864&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5NDA1ODY0LCJpYXQiOjE3MDE3MjkwODgsImV4cCI6MTcwNDMyMTA4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5X7kKUWyuUcG4_1l0PdcJYIvHg25fUhlzf_GXdzosVU)
### While the world focuses on the wars in Ukraine and Israel, Venezuela is threatening to annex a large portion of resource-rich Guyana
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/redirect/a67be19f-5ba0-43ac-98b3-77fde3a550d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Dec 4
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a67be19f-5ba0-43ac-98b3-77fde3a550d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=139405864&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5NDA1ODY0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcwMTcyOTA4OCwiZXhwIjoxNzA0MzIxMDg4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.UIyVrKCR6o6IUsdnYiJAFDetlksLW50rO4hcv2kr4eU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=139405864&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5NDA1ODY0LCJpYXQiOjE3MDE3MjkwODgsImV4cCI6MTcwNDMyMTA4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5X7kKUWyuUcG4_1l0PdcJYIvHg25fUhlzf_GXdzosVU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=139405864&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5NDA1ODY0LCJpYXQiOjE3MDE3MjkwODgsImV4cCI6MTcwNDMyMTA4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5X7kKUWyuUcG4_1l0PdcJYIvHg25fUhlzf_GXdzosVU)
---
| | [](https://substack..IlhYD63DnOhB_h_snN50ySePSon1odUXeBTmgxOOzjk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/is-war-coming-to-south-america?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ad7557db-467a-4538-bec5-f4363f324ca7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Failed socialist policies in the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela destroyed South America's most prosperous country and created economic hardship for most of the country. Hyperinflation decimated the purchasing power of ordinary citizens ](https://substack.com/redirect/e5f31498-9aa7-4155-ac05-454072dc0792?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and led to extreme shortages of many household items, ranging from toilet paper to [simple food items](https://substack.com/redirect/5e1ad3a3-6ad3-48b2-a90c-996d5cbd7d1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). A humanitarian crisis of epic proportions ensued. President Nicolas Maduro nevertheless stuck with socialism and has aligned ever more closely with China, Russia, and Iran.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c5bd8758-b85f-4936-a0dc-1d789e4e8dd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: https://www.sandiegouniontribune.com/news/nation-world/story/2022-09-13/maduro-venezuela-will-be-guarantor-in-colombian-peace-talks
At one point, the country began distributing baby rabbits in poor settlements with the hopes the rapidly reproducing animals would provide much needed protein to a hungry population. In describing the policy, _The Economist_ noted "[it makes more sense than some of Mr. Maduro's other ideas](https://substack.com/redirect/34590a23-b8a2-4930-8997-274d12e0b771?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" but went on describe how Venezuelans were treating them like pets rather than food. The policy, like many others pursued by the government, failed to help citizens.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..X9ugF9L1zwKAYI6uwBkGCB4kBdv_t2b7xajMmZKJrq0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=139405864)
[The situation got worse in 2017 when US president Donald Trump imposed sanctions on the Venezuelan petroleum industry that impacted a major source of Maduro's funding](https://substack.com/redirect/09aefa76-2e62-4fe3-9105-399ac4c9a705?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). In fact, many in the world simply stopped thinking about Venezuela as a potential risk to global affairs and believed it was going to fail into the dustbin of history.
The election of President Joe Biden, however, gave the Maduro regime a unique lifeline, [one that Bloomberg TV highlighted in a special report on the country called "Inside Venezuela,"](https://substack.com/redirect/e5f31498-9aa7-4155-ac05-454072dc0792?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to normalize relations withe the United States in return for promising to hold democratic elections. [During the fall of 2023, the Biden administration suspended certain sanctions on the Venezuelan oil and gold mining sectors, and simultaneously gave Americans the ability to transact in Venezuela equities and debt](https://substack.com/redirect/e1dca075-069a-4fe6-ade7-eb0df04a409f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The Maduro regime promised to hold an election in 2024.
A mere days after the agreement was struck, the Venezuelan opposition held a primary to select a candidate to run against President Maduro. Despite efforts by the government to undermine the process, a violation of the agreement made with the United States, more than 2.4 million votes were cast and there was a clear winner. [Maria Corina Machado](https://substack.com/redirect/6eaf04e3-9710-4a0e-a32d-a76a7f4f8044?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a former lawmaker and mother of three who believes in free market principles, became the opposition nominee by securing more than 93% of the votes.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cc366f53-e2f3-4681-98e1-34b0240452a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: https://impunityobserver.com/2023/07/27/maria-corina-machado-is-chavismo-greatest-threat/
As momentum built towards a competitive election in 2024, the Maduro regime reopened a long-standing border dispute with its oil-rich neighbor [Guayana](https://substack.com/redirect/b7997f41-bc35-48c5-9748-c6474321a72d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Venezuela claims that all land west of the Essequibo River belongs to them, a territory of more than 61,600 square miles that represents more than two-thirds of Guyana's land](https://substack.com/redirect/213d600b-48f3-431d-bc86-4a873e555ed5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and is home to almost 40% of the population. And on December 3, 2023, [Venezuelans were basically asked if the country should annex and claim sovereignty over the land](https://substack.com/redirect/213d600b-48f3-431d-bc86-4a873e555ed5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/386c33b1-6273-436b-8642-355d2e570fd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [https://www.theguardian.com/world/2023/dec/04/venezuela-referendum-2023-results-guyana-region-claim-succeeds-sovereignty-essequibo](https://substack.com/redirect/3e84b6b4-1384-49af-9180-825ef3ed37f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
There were widespread reports that voter turnout for the referendum was low, but that didn't stop the government from claiming success. According to the _Associated Press_ : "_[Long lines typical of electoral events did not form outside voting centers in Caracas....The turnout and voter enthusiasm in the capital paled in comparison with the hours-long lines that formed outside voting centers during the presidential primary....State media attributed the lack of wait times Sunday to the fast speed at which people were casting their electronic ballots](https://substack.com/redirect/213d600b-48f3-431d-bc86-4a873e555ed5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." _The government reported that more than [50% of Venezuelans voted in the referendum, with more than 95% of the ballots in favor of claiming sovereignty over the Essequibo territory](https://substack.com/redirect/593a9a65-6eda-4e67-8499-91f4a9decaf1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
While there are historical political reasons that Venezuela feels entitled to the territory in dispute (going back to the late 1800s), there may be economic considerations as well. Guyana is South America's only English-speaking country and its almost 800,000 citizens are the beneficiaries of a major oil discovery. In 2015, a consortium led by ExxonMobil struck oil 100 miles off Guyana's coast. Before production began in 2019, more than 40% of Guyana lived on less than $5.50 per day.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..X9ugF9L1zwKAYI6uwBkGCB4kBdv_t2b7xajMmZKJrq0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=139405864)
Once the oil started flowing, so too did money, [transforming Guyana into the world's fastest growing economy](https://substack.com/redirect/365997b1-1b71-4deb-96b5-aeb93d160516?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): "[With $1.6 billion in oil revenue so far, the government has launched infrastructure projects including the construction of 12 hospitals, seven hotels, scores of schools, two main highways, its first deep-water port](https://substack.com/redirect/910e8199-b3a4-4480-89c9-059a9c56ecfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [a $1.9 billion gas-to-energy project](https://substack.com/redirect/89e96b42-8c6a-4058-a425-1c5d7738a9d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [that... will double Guyana's energy output and slash high power bills by half](https://substack.com/redirect/910e8199-b3a4-4480-89c9-059a9c56ecfb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
The oil field was a gigantic discovery, perhaps the largest ever in the Western Hemisphere. [ExxonMobil now believes it may be its most productive region within its portfolio of global assets and analysts believe Guyana will become the fourth largest producer of offshore oil in the world](https://substack.com/redirect/4fd6ca64-94ac-4f1e-a5e4-c5ce21348355?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **[The Stabroek Block, about the size of Massachusetts, is reported to have more oil reserves than Kuwait or the United Arab Emirates](https://substack.com/redirect/a7f5f237-3a5f-49f0-9aac-ba18218a6c72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** And the Essequibo territory includes the waters containing the oil field, meaning the owner of that land is, according to International law, the owner of the Stabroek Block.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/932a22c0-e4f2-41ee-9498-eebd17af020b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The economic impact of securing the Essequibo territory is enormous. [Some analysts, including Blackwater founder Erik Prince, suggest it could increase Venezuela's GDP by 25%.](https://substack.com/redirect/33ba5298-58ba-4561-a405-be94f858d70a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) There are likely also lots of other resources, ranging from gold to copper and bauxite, in the area.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..X9ugF9L1zwKAYI6uwBkGCB4kBdv_t2b7xajMmZKJrq0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=139405864)
## **So What?**
**Could the escalating tensions lead to war?** [Brazil, which borders both Venezuela and Guyana, has intensified its military operations on its northern border](https://substack.com/redirect/a4311957-4e6b-4a4c-ad9e-162584e5602c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Also noteworthy is the fact that the [the leadership of the United States Army's Security Force Assistance Brigade (SFAB) met with the the Guyana Defense Force (GDF) last week](https://substack.com/redirect/26465abb-eace-4a71-8437-9c99db01a62d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Some analysts have suggested the [situation resembles Saddam Hussein's invasion of Kuwait that kicked off the Gulf War in the early 1990s](https://substack.com/redirect/462c4080-4218-4c36-a15e-9c16588aafc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Others have suggested it is just like Argentinian claims of sovereignty over the Falkland Islands that led to war.
Another possible reason that the Maduro regime held the referendum is it a unifying topic among voting Venezuelans. There are very few issues on which the current leadership and opposition agree, but the Essequibo issue is definitely one of them. According to the BBC, "[Analysts anticipate massive support for the Venezuelan government's proposals, which will mobilize its electorate in a country where ](https://substack.com/redirect/bd748c66-8783-4e49-8151-a5dd5f1fb59e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_**[the Essequibo demand unites Chavistas and opponents like no other issue](https://substack.com/redirect/bd748c66-8783-4e49-8151-a5dd5f1fb59e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ " (emphasis added). Interestingly, [opposition leader Marina Corina Machado actually tried to prevent the referendum from going forward -- likely to disrupt the popular support it would generate for Maduro](https://substack.com/redirect/3ac6e46c-a0b9-4a7b-91a6-0aa0a38f7568?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Might the whole endeavor be an attempt by the Maduro regime to reclaim popular opinion as it heads into a contested election that the world is closely watching? Could the referendum be a strategy to generate nationalism to support his re-election? The possibility reminded me of the 1997 movie "[Wag the Dog](https://substack.com/redirect/104a8c06-fc7d-4480-a23d-aed1e94f62ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" starring Dustin Hoffman and Robert DeNiro, in which a flailing president creates a fictional war to help unify the electorate.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4fbada8a-6f9e-47a9-b8f2-e7129132ce50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But in this case, **Maduro might start an** _**actual**_**war, one that would help grow his economy while simultaneously generating nationalism and support for his election**.
| | POLL
---
Will Maduro militarily invade Guyana to take control of the Essequibo territory?
| [Yes](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.7WTbqFY7OlZ-Qet5pYvyhDIVN2e3QkDtYXeqaHUFIKY?)
---
[No](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.yjsts42HNktpSneIFIpdVcRpsmiXuAbTOQgQLIRcOM0?)
The downside of a military action might be the US response. What, if anything, would the US reaction be to such an invasion? There is, after all, a presidential election underway in the United States. With the Ukraine and Israel wars raging, the American population may not have the appetite to support another conflict. Ever since the disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan, America's enemies have seen the United States as weak and have sought to take advantage of the situation. Borders are not being respected and dictators the world over are testing American leadership. Will Maduro be the next to see how the United States will respond? Or [should the United States, as the American Enterprise Institute's Michael Rubin suggests, preemptively send American troops to Guyana to deter any potential conflict](https://substack.com/redirect/462c4080-4218-4c36-a15e-9c16588aafc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..X9ugF9L1zwKAYI6uwBkGCB4kBdv_t2b7xajMmZKJrq0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=139405864)
We must also consider Venezuela's relationships with Russia, China, and Iran. Let's not forget that [Russian nuclear bombers have been seen in Venezuela](https://substack.com/redirect/5512d0fa-f896-4f53-882b-562e1ea5c556?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Russia has likely supplied missiles to Caracas](https://substack.com/redirect/43146b40-3bcd-4c52-bb0b-25c3f52247bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [Venezuela pledged support to Russia after Putin invaded Ukraine](https://substack.com/redirect/4e3c0248-0271-455e-82ea-2eea379e3f73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). In addition, [Maduro is apparently in the midst of planning another visit to Moscow](https://substack.com/redirect/0d3d4a16-79e3-4c7d-aab4-c91cf004b489?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Venezuela also has strong ties with the Islamic Republic of Iran: _[The Wall Street Journal](https://substack.com/redirect/3fae04e8-1210-4781-b7f5-2edd30b2aa34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ noted that Iranian elite forces (and Iranian arms) have been in Venezuela supporting Maduro](https://substack.com/redirect/3fae04e8-1210-4781-b7f5-2edd30b2aa34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Iran may also be outsourcing kamikaze drone production to Caracas](https://substack.com/redirect/1cea264b-c967-4d1f-867d-6dffee9db29d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And when Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi visited Venezuela in June of this year, he used the trip to highlight "[the relationship between Iran and Venezuela is not a normal relationship, but is a strategic relationship between two countries that have common interests, common visions, and common enemies](https://substack.com/redirect/f296f146-5ebf-4a4a-b969-c848de40703d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." Maduro replied by confirming his commitment to advance the "[construction of a new world](https://substack.com/redirect/f296f146-5ebf-4a4a-b969-c848de40703d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
And of course, we cannot forget Beijing, which has been strengthening its relationship with Caracas for years. [The Chinese have armed the Venezuela Navy with anti-ship missiles](https://substack.com/redirect/0fafdcd0-cdc7-404e-80f3-9ac787f5ccf0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [have helped the Maduro regime sell oil to evade US sanctions](https://substack.com/redirect/a1c1b24e-36c8-49ce-bc0b-e9a96a2b43f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Xi met with Maduro in September of this year, the output of which was the elevation of the Beijing-Caracas relationship to an "all-weather strategic partnership."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/af5e2d31-df32-458a-abd8-c14c5f70b96f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Center for Strategic and International Studies recently noted how this growing friendship between Beijing and Caracas might in fact be related to the US China war:
> _[By bringing Venezuela into China's orbit, China gains access to vast resources and a staunch ally in its geopolitical standoff against the United States and the broader Western world. As the CCP aims to reshape the global order, nations like Venezuela become pawns in China's strategy to encircle the United States and exert more influence in the American hemisphere...](https://substack.com/redirect/46f7d4db-a517-43e8-9200-fcc63ff34e2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
While it's impossible to know what Venezuela might do in the days, weeks, or months ahead, one thing is crystal clear: Venezuela is a proxy for the China-Russia-Iran axis that is eager to keep America divided, distracted, over-extended and over-entangled. It might even be in Chinese interests to keep the threat of a potential war in South America on the front burner so America has to keep an eye on (or even deploy resources to) the region. After all, wouldn't a thinly-spread US military be less capable of deterring or engaging Chinese aggression in the Indo-Pacific?
| | POLL
---
Is the Venezuela-Guyana territorial dispute another potential front in the US-China War?
| [Yes](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.wtTajKpXdf9znIhBHr2VsY83EKttNvlqOOJgElrHnMk?)
---
[Not obvious](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.Usi_mvpDWwpVwda6LitSCe95268XX87oEwSBT8sDGs4?)
[No](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.MrrVIG2f26cQ3ubyY1__4pq5lGa_QCrxYwXxdkCryE0?)
I've long felt that it's important to adopt a wide-angle perspective on looking at geopolitical developments because seemingly irrelevant dots can connect to generate important insights. So while a small country like Guyana may not seem that relevant to global affairs, developments there may be shed light on greater tensions between the West and the rest.
| | POLL

Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Friend, On day five of the 2023 United Nations Climate Change Conference, as we reach the end of the [warmest year on record](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74575739/441995455/-1587932715?ms=231204_bp_2c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDk0NDZlMzYtZjU5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kXMc6YjGgYCV6g7xcBrKQs5YZbV6aboPVerTeifpf00=&emci=cc87a779-dc92-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=d9446e36-f592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=9668897), it's clear that we need to take major steps to ensure a habitable future for all of us. In November, Earth's temperatures hit an alarming new milestone - average global surface temperatures climbed about **2 degrees Celsius for the first time.** What does that mean? Well, we're talking about more extreme weather — floods, storms, hurricanes, droughts, and heat waves, all intensified by higher temperatures caused by the burning of fossil fuels. Rising sea levels directly impact us here in New Jersey, and we have no time to waste. Climate change is the existential threat of our time, and we have to treat it like the emergency it is. Denial in the Republican party and corporate greed have hindered climate progress for far too long — putting our communities, neighborhoods, and children's lives at risk. **But all hope is not lost, friend.** We have made progress with the Inflation Reduction Act which provides the largest support for wind, solar, energy storage, and other renewable energy projects in world history, but we have more work ahead of us to tackle this enormous problem. **The truth is, we CAN achieve net-zero greenhouse gas emissions while establishing high-wage jobs, ensuring both economic and environmental security for all Americans. But this can only happen if we mobilize every facet of American ingenuity and come together to reject GOP climate denial.** **[**We must flip the House in 2024 and get climate-denying Republicans out of office. Friend, we need Democrats back in power to pass any substantive climate legislation. name: Chris (via Team Salinas)
subject: Hi 👋 It’s Andrea’s husband, Chris, here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
While Andrea is back, hard at work, in DC, I wanted to reach out to ask for your help on a birthday surprise I’m planning for her! Let me explain:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74576025/441996210/-2066741384?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.04_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWJmYzc3Yi1mNjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bv5Hv8Ak1DXI-Xtx7gh7bsfb_44b1qnMyn8ofyRHaUc=)
---
Hi friend – My name is Chris, and I’m Andrea’s husband.

While Andrea is back, hard at work, in DC, I wanted to reach out to ask for your help on a birthday surprise I’m planning for her! Let me explain:
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74576026/441996211/-2066741384?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.04_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWJmYzc3Yi1mNjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bv5Hv8Ak1DXI-Xtx7gh7bsfb_44b1qnMyn8ofyRHaUc=)** _Here’s one of my favorite family pictures with Andrea and our daughter, Amelia._
I’ve known Andrea for over 30 wonderful years and we’ve been married for the last 24.

From the moment I met her, I knew that she would dedicate her life to working to create a stronger, more prosperous future for our community and country. That became even more apparent when our daughter, Amelia, was born. I have seen her fight tirelessly to make the world a better place for her and all of us.

**You can take it from me: There is no one who fights harder for our community than Andrea.**_(Trust me, I see all the early mornings, late nights, and weekend work up close!)_

She has devoted her life to fighting for _our_ future, so I thought it would be nice to surprise her with an outpour of support on her birthday to show that, just like she has our back, we have hers as well.

[**Your support makes all the difference in her ability to keep fighting for Oregon. Do me a favor and, if you’re able to, pitch in $5, $25, or whatever you can spare before Andrea’s birthday. Seeing your name as a Team Salinas grassroots supporter will make her day!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74576027/441996212/-2066741384?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.04_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWJmYzc3Yi1mNjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bv5Hv8Ak1DXI-Xtx7gh7bsfb_44b1qnMyn8ofyRHaUc=)

Thank you so much,

Chris

P.S. Thank you for all that you do to fight for the best possible future for our community and country. I know Andrea’s campaign is powered by folks like you, so thank you.
** **
** **
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74576028/441996213/-2066741384?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.04_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWJmYzc3Yi1mNjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bv5Hv8Ak1DXI-Xtx7gh7bsfb_44b1qnMyn8ofyRHaUc=)

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILYs List
subject: Peter, add your name to stand against abortion bans everywhere →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
Show your support for pro-choice Democrats in Texas and across the country |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74576020/441996203/-506541816?refcode=20231204_TXSignOn_DON_v1s2&refcode2=WTENEL05&sourceid=1052414&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2NkMTc1NS1mNjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEBXTVY-h2alAJGJrci5ZvBuVpp5T3wYcQ-DL0jz_C0=&emci=860e7097-f592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=77cd1755-f692-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Since the day _Roe v. Wade_ fell, we all knew what would follow: anti-choice Republicans working around the clock to restrict reproductive freedom in every state across the nation. And that's what happened, especially in Texas, where anti-choice legislators passed laws prohibiting nearly all abortions even _before_ we lost _Roe's_ protections.

Now, 20 women and two doctors are fighting back — by suing the state of Texas and arguing before the state Supreme Court that the medical exemptions to its abortion ban are too narrow and put pregnant people's lives at risk.

****EMILYs List stands against ALL abortion bans — _everywhere_. Will you add your name to show support for the pro-choice Democrats fighting to protect choice in Texas and across the country?**** | [ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND AGAINST ABORTION BANS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74576021/441996204/-506541816?refcode=20231204_TXSignOn_DON_v1s2&refcode2=WTENEL05&sourceid=1052414&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2NkMTc1NS1mNjkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEBXTVY-h2alAJGJrci5ZvBuVpp5T3wYcQ-DL0jz_C0=&emci=860e7097-f592-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=77cd1755-f692-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=5177934)
---
We're proud to stand with the brave women and doctors taking on Texas' abortion ban, and we're proud to stand with the Democratic pro-choice women who are fighting every day to protect choice in a country without _Roe v. Wade_.

**Peter, will you add your name to oppose abortion bans across the country?**

clean_body: Show your support for pro-choice Democrats in Texas and across the country | | | Peter, Since the day Roe v. Wade fell, we all knew what would follow: anti-choice Republicans working around the clock to restrict reproductive freedom in every state across the nation. And that's what happened, especially in Texas, where anti-choice legislators passed laws prohibiting nearly all abortions even before we lost Roe's protections. Now, 20 women and two doctors are fighting back — by suing the state of Texas and arguing before the state Supreme Court that the medical exemptions to its abortion ban are too narrow and put pregnant people's lives at risk. **EMILYs List stands against ALL abortion bans — everywhere. Will you add your name to show support for the pro-choice Democrats fighting to protect choice in Texas and across the country? | We're proud to stand with the brave women and doctors taking on Texas' abortion ban, and we're proud to stand with the Democratic pro-choice women who are fighting every day to protect choice in a country without Roe v. Peter - when my husband was recently elected Speaker of the House, our world was flipped upside down.

But I believe to my core that God has a plan for every single one of our lives, and I know that my husband Mike was chosen for a reason. Mike and I have been married for 24 years, and during that time I have seen his desire for servant leadership, his patriotism for this country, and his love for all people.

**It is the honor of a lifetime to call Mike my husband, and I feel so proud and grateful to watch him serve our country as Speaker of the House.**

[**Today, I wanted to reach out to you personally with a video message, Peter. Would you take a moment to watch it now?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d3e94843451c4b7ebb2a96e0ef3d95f2&_e=39Bcly0DUXsVb6M6vg7OEB5eqSK4la2_VlN8fcbsgwBQSq1X3hDSbhtX9joh_hIIA_4CeC0g1N9oxiOVYtac_i77V5LxuLe_I1ai2rurDpysfoDinm4gkFxLsAQHnmjpAjTJZzMXxAw_haHlQ7K_X2C-XVFIqPjZf-u-liyL3x70phDzSFGA8If9p2FkQZV0VhN8YQtpzP4K-Jzy7OLbKCJCBvtmQgv-SpJcQUWnRmGBvbDwnsHu_5BGM_v8Lx3cLW4NInReHcMEkU3tPDIfEu2LWgByWxnYr71LI1kKsAXcUg0nR1ExsFJaGRrB9-Aogc-QXBXnfqJBCiokskvBScOyhLGos0rulBN8ZOxVm7UONFQC7q11A2Ndu_-l9qCbRtJHJjfZlW-cgwLLBCOf1ljwhiFJV2x0HOKv58GNFps%3D)

Kelly Johnson

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

clean_body: Your support would truly mean so much to me. | | | Friend: Last month, Trump took the stage right down the street from me to rally his MAGA base while his fellow extremists pushed their hateful agenda on prime-time TV during the GOP debate. There were a lot of lies told, but there's one thing that has been proved true: Republicans will do absolutely anything to win Florida. And now, more and more people from the far-right are going to be tuning into our election. We have to rally our own base of support if we want any chance of fighting back. | | This state has given me so much: A better life, opportunities to give back to my community, a way to serve my country, a beautiful family, and a chance to win my own American Dream. That's why I refuse to let far-right extremists push their hateful agenda on our state any longer. I'm going to defeat Rick Scott next fall and win a better future for Florida — but I need your help in this critical moment to do it. | | I'm so grateful for your support, friend. Thank you, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

Peter,
---
We are officially in the final month of 2023 and are preparing for the battle of 2024 where we will fight to grow the House majority.
---
But as we look towards the new year, I wanted to reach out to hear firsthand from grassroots like YOU about what your priorities are and what the House should focus on this last month and heading into 2024.
---
Thanks to Joe Biden’s disastrous and failing agenda, our country is plagued with crisis after crisis.
---
_An economy in trouble, a dangerous and growing border problem, weakness on the world stage, and constitutional rights under attack – _Biden has done his very best to destroy America.__
---
**But I won’t stop fighting to save America from the radical Left’s clutches to build a better future for YOU.**
---
That’s why I am sending you this survey, to ask for your opinion on some important issues facing this country and to let me know what Congress’s TOP priority should be.
---
After all, I work for YOU and therefore am counting on you to help guide the fight in Congress.
---

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_

---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5c304eb42f4b40d6b53ea9c091cc9f2a&_e=LksuU-glHJEHYkmG54GH3OtTiR84QlL846c0UYxdH2jqf_fexi1x8cGUU35TRM0T4kIX3ahpdMcDy2tKROG8SeJZrBEZxP6Kgv34r6b3GJlY4b9KxKiGlStnxFlHWFF04Ja5-tjZ_xLhJuxuSoRx1EPVkOHZ9Fv2M1X0oPbS_xXE-EMQ5qWNLLDKOaCCT29fjIqRmv-xPJgcES72csS0WIUXz0ozkcDbx1BcysbXTmjkNvvOiGsJBnR0OlOkF76ltZQcRX3zjKie5EkbmwEzcPwKW-GTmYb7NdvnLQzrK4HGWria9OsQeO5E9hYVmGaocd3i6-G1u43D0_ISARPYviQgHgIa2V-_1nW08jPfley1FdATg5AjgJWz9KDvMlAAQz0TN9_kC964WzviQRSOYI-mivT2o3Y5XCLrJdM7nByvAL-NWea7AivjKr-MGC-aT_Cd-q2wBn1XivY5bZ3hUQ%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: The National Democratic Redistricting Committee
subject: We *are* in a perpetual redistricting era
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
President Obama & Attorney General Eric Holder agree
|
---

Team, the NDRC is working across the country to stop GOP gerrymandering and secure fair maps so we can hand power back to the people – where it belongs.

Ahead of the 2022 elections, our work helped secure the fairest congressional map of the last forty years, according to the _New York Times_. **And now, our work must continue.** | **_President Barack Obama:_

“Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished. States that were once gerrymandered...are now highly competitive, allowing voters to choose their representatives instead of the other way around ...

But the movement doesn’t stop here. We must continue the work until we have fair maps in every state ...

Redistricting is no longer a once-a-decade event. The fight for fair maps is happening right now.”**
---
[**_Join the fight for fair maps! Donate to the NDRC >>>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74577181/442000294/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231204_FR_12B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4NzBkOWYzLWZhOTItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LK56LRGV5DhjH-YgbX6X8hpgZ1VBUdr-aqbVPmCIaEQ=)
It’s true. According to _Reuters_ , “nearly a dozen” states could see new maps before the 2024 election – more than enough to flip control of the U.S. House.

**That means one of two things could happen before Election Day:**
(1) If we continue our fight for fairness, we could **build on our progress** by securing _even fairer maps_ for the American people.

(2) But if we grow complacent, Republicans could **roll back our progress** by pushing through manipulated maps that silence voters’ voices!
**_Attorney General Eric Holder_

“The fight against gerrymandering must go on.”**
---
[**_The NDRC is committed to continuing the fight against gerrymandering, team. clean_body: President Obama & Attorney General Eric Holder agree | Team, the NDRC is working across the country to stop GOP gerrymandering and secure fair maps so we can hand power back to the people – where it belongs. Ahead of the 2022 elections, our work helped secure the fairest congressional map of the last forty years, according to the New York Times. And now, our work must continue. | President Barack Obama: “Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished. States that were once gerrymandered...are now highly competitive, allowing voters to choose their representatives instead of the other way around ... But the movement doesn’t stop here. We must continue the work until we have fair maps in every state ... Redistricting is no longer a once-a-decade event. The fight for fair maps is happening right now.” = It’s true. According to Reuters , “nearly a dozen” states could see new maps before the 2024 election – more than enough to flip control of the U.S. House. That means one of two things could happen before Election Day: (1) If we continue our fight for fairness, we could build on our progress by securing even fairer maps for the American people. (2) But if we grow complacent, Republicans could roll back our progress by pushing through manipulated maps that silence voters’ voices! Attorney General Eric Holder “The fight against gerrymandering must go on.” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. We are almost at the end of this year, and thanks to your ongoing support, we were able to secure significant climate victories to build a livable future – from Virginia to California, we elected climate champions up and down the ballot who will fight for climate action in their communities. **I hope you know how impactful your support truly is.**

That said, we still have a long way to go to defeat the fossil fuel industry as they continue to spend millions of dollars to keep their allies in office.

As we gear up for 2024, we need to keep up our strong momentum and cannot slow down because we are just getting started.

But we can’t do this alone — support from grassroots donors like you will help us grow our program as we go into the most consequential campaign cycle for climate action. **That’s why we set an ambitious $25,000 end-of-the-year fundraising goal to ensure we start off 2024 strong.** [_**Will you contribute $10 to help us reach our end-of-year goal of $25,000 to fuel our efforts to continue our fight against Big Oil in 2024?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74577230/442000376/931971737?refcode=BLU_EM_JANE_2023-12-04_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhOTMxODQzLWZiOTItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bOoSL22BSIroILVlhcQ3wAHWlr5MkuYxJ8HVj3UW0M8=)

subject: George Santos was just expelled from Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee

we have to mobilize harder and faster than ever before

| Peter there, it’s Tom Suozzi. I’m running for Congress in NY-03, the district formerly represented by George Santos.

George Santos was just expelled from Congress. Finally, this is an important first step toward restoring some sanity to the 3rd Congressional District and electing someone who will fight for and get things done for the people of Long Island and Northeast Queens.

Now, we need to mobilize harder and faster than ever before, and that means supporters like you will be more important than ever.

We need leaders who will get things done and not play partisan games. We need more common sense and less senseless fighting. We need someone who will help our nation solve problems like climate change, the cost of living, and the immigration crisis.

George Santos was very clearly not that person. I’m running for Congress in NY-03 to get us back on the right track.

[_**So, I really need your support right now.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74577337/442000690/-1629830224?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-12-4_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjNTNjNGNlLWZiOTItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZCR0m1lVo7lPAWR9qy1kL8LYe3ZJJ66u-7qyZah1GAw=) Every dollar counts right now, and time is of the essence. I really hope I can count on you.

George Santos was just expelled from Congress. Finally, this is an important first step toward restoring some sanity to the 3rd Congressional District and electing someone who will fight for and get things done for the people of Long Island and Northeast Queens. Now, we need to mobilize harder and faster than ever before, and that means supporters like you will be more important than ever. = | = | = | = | = | = We need leaders who will get things done and not play partisan games. We need more common sense and less senseless fighting. We need someone who will help our nation solve problems like climate change, the cost of living, and the immigration crisis. George Santos was very clearly not that person. I’m running for Congress in NY-03 to get us back on the right track. = Every dollar counts right now, and time is of the essence. name: Katie Porter
subject: Happy National Cookie Day, from my kitchen to yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=34219%2E3422442%2EZVfp4r)
Derek,
It’s National Cookie Day, and one of my favorite holiday traditions is baking cookies with my kids. Every year, my sugar ‘n spice cookies are a hit. The dough is easy to handle, so it’s a great recipe for kids who want to cut cookies into all sorts of fun shapes and sizes.
[**If you chip in any amount to this email, I’ll send you my original recipes**.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231204-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_NCD_20231204_V1_F&refcode2=34219_3422442_ZVfp4r&akid=34219%2E3422442%2EZVfp4r) You won’t just get the cookie recipe—there’s a few other cozy classics, like french onion soup, banana bread, and meatballs.
[Get Katie's Recipes ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231204-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_NCD_20231204_V1_F&refcode2=34219_3422442_ZVfp4r&akid=34219%2E3422442%2EZVfp4r)
**_The recipes will be included in the emailed receipt Actblue sends to you immediately after donating._**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231204-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_NCD_20231204_V1_F&refcode2=34219_3422442_ZVfp4r&akid=34219%2E3422442%2EZVfp4r)
As a single working mom of three, meal prep and these recipes have become an essential part of feeding my family. On the days I fly to DC, I get up at 5:30 am to prepare dinner for the kids to enjoy that night. It’s always a slow cooker recipe or something that can sit in the fridge until the kids cook it. Favorites include baked potato bar and pepperoncini beef.
I know so many others are juggling responsibilities and just trying to get a hot meal served. **[Hopefully these recipes can help—while also supporting our campaign for the U.S. Senate!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231204-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_NCD_20231204_V1_F&refcode2=34219_3422442_ZVfp4r&akid=34219%2E3422442%2EZVfp4r)**
[Get Katie's Recipes ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231204-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_NCD_20231204_V1_F&refcode2=34219_3422442_ZVfp4r&akid=34219%2E3422442%2EZVfp4r)
Happy cooking!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_1_NCD_20231204_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=34219_3422442_ZVfp4r&akid=34219%2E3422442%2EZVfp4r)**

Friend,

Keep shining ☀️

Team Sepi

And if you didn't get to help out this time, could you help us get a headstart on our end-of-quarter goal today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231204_ts_eomty_l1]

POWER OUR MOVEMENT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231204_ts_eomty_b1]
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?
