clean_body: [] Friend, We're so excited to share that we did it, we reached our November goal! So we just want to say... [] Our people-powered movement is ascending to new heights — all across CA-30 and the country. Your support is making a difference, and we couldn't be more grateful. Together, we're one step closer to Congress, where we will achieve justice, equity, and a brighter future for all. Keep shining ☀️ Team Sepi And if you didn't get to help out this time, could you help us get a headstart on our end-of-quarter goal today? [] POWER OUR MOVEMENT [] Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress? Contribute Now [] GIVE Monthly [] PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [] . Sepi Shyne For Congress 8149 Santa Monica Blvd #280 West Hollywood, CA 90046 United States

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Border Crisis Keeps Getting Worse
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The Southern Border has collapsed, and President Biden won't say a word about it.

|
---
| | | **The Southern Border has collapsed—and President Biden won’t say a word about it.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=border_1_12_4_23_email_1_non_d&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
The Southern Border has collapsed, and...
[President Biden won’t say a word about it. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=border_1_12_4_23_email_1_non_d&n=2)
Our failed border policies have created a massive criminal syndicate that profits from sex and drug trafficking. At first, RFK Jr. didn’t believe this—until he visited the border and saw it with his own eyes.
Thousands of illegal immigrants from the Middle East, China, Venezuela, Ukraine, and dozens of other regions and countries are crushing our economy and our cities. And creating the biggest humanitarian crisis in U.S. history.
The U.S. has never experienced illegal immigration at this volume. _**_Ever_**_.
Illegal immigration is up 63% since 2021, when nearly two million illegal immigrants crossed the border. And over the last 12 months, an astounding 3.2 million immigrants have entered the U.S. illegally.
This is simply unsustainable.
Under President Biden, the Customs and Border Protection (CBP) stats paint a crystal clear picture: **_The illegal migrants crossing both the northern and southern borders represent a substantial threat to U.S. citizens._**
On _**Day One as President**_ , Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will implement his “Tall Fences and Wide Gates” policy to secure our country’s borders, __effective immediately__.
RFK Jr. understands this crisis is a threat to the stability of the United States.
| Together, _we must stop the criminal cartels_ who are making millions of dollars while U.S. taxpayers suffer and Border Security personnel risk their lives every day.
---
Together, _we must stop the flood of illegal immigrants_ being shipped to our cities and end the overwhelming of our resources. American citizens, first and foremost, deserve those resources. But the current reality is this: migrants sleep in hotels, while veterans sleep on the street.
Together _we must use the technology_ that was installed at the border but then dismantled by Joe Biden—lights, cameras, motion detectors, and more.
Together _we must protect opportunity_ and job security for the legal immigrants that make our country great.
If you agree the United States of America is at a crossroads, then please give today to support RFK Jr.'s campaign right now.

I wanted to reach out personally to say muchisimas gracias por todo.

This past Thursday was our November fundraising deadline, and I needed my top supporters to help me reach my $15,000 goal before the holiday season really picks up.

**I’m proud to say that Team Vasquez stood together stronger than ever.** Even during one of the toughest fundraising weeks of the year, you all came through and helped us reach our goal.

Thanks to you, I’m confident we’re ready for anything my opponent and her backers in the NRCC might throw our way this month.

Times like these remind me that grassroots supporters like you are the most important members of our team. It’s your support that’s going to keep this seat blue and help us flip the House in 2024.

So thank you for everything — I couldn’t be more grateful for your willingness to step up, no matter what time of year it is.

Un abrazo,

Gabe

P.S. _If you didn’t get a chance to contribute before our deadline, please consider making a donation of any amount at[this link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74577668/442002032/-2082721552?source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_120423_1_1_NovThankYou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjNlM2MyMi1mZDkyLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLtlhiRMEYs45PwTCQTxlNzKbmHh59_LRTm1S-Gqiq0=) to help me hold this seat._

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: A promise that I’ve kept
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74577649/442001955/1072501871?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg2Y2Y2MDctZmQ5Mi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QhFJPm1tEwnDh9qTtH31-WUOVp4uM7eQw_0WdnWODp8=)
---
Folks, when I got elected to Congress, I promised myself, my loved ones, and my constituents one thing:**I’d never give in to Washington corruption and cynicism.**

**And I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise.** I’ve spent every day in Congress combating Republican extremism and obstruction to deliver for the American people and my community. I travel home every week to spend time with my family and meet with constituents so that I can stay connected to their needs and advocate for them.

Because at the end of the day, I was elected to govern, not to waste time on partisan witch hunts and agendas that don’t serve the people who elected me.

But my outspoken advocacy for the American people and my willingness to call out MAGA extremism has **put a target on my back, team** – _and I need your help to win re-election and flip the House so we can get to work for YOU._

[**Can I count on your donation today before our midnight deadline? clean_body: | = Folks, when I got elected to Congress, I promised myself, my loved ones, and my constituents one thing:I’d never give in to Washington corruption and cynicism. And I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise. I’ve spent every day in Congress combating Republican extremism and obstruction to deliver for the American people and my community. I travel home every week to spend time with my family and meet with constituents so that I can stay connected to their needs and advocate for them. Because at the end of the day, I was elected to govern, not to waste time on partisan witch hunts and agendas that don’t serve the people who elected me. But my outspoken advocacy for the American people and my willingness to call out MAGA extremism has put a target on my back, team – and I need your help to win re-election and flip the House so we can get to work for YOU. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = If you’re fed up with MAGA chaos and ready for partisan gridlock to come to an end, = Thank you, Dr. Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. body:
| This headline from POLITICO says it all:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1645%2E35263%2ECXJtn0)
Peter — have you seen this headline from _POLITICO_? [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231204_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1645%2E35263%2ECXJtn0) While House Republicans have descended into utter chaos at the expense of the American people, Republicans in the Senate are using it as an opportunity to rake in the dollars. As _POLITICO_ puts it, **_“Senate Republicans are amplifying their pitch to donors: We’re your best possible investment.”_** Make no mistake: Extreme Republicans will bring that same chaos to the Senate floor if the GOP retakes the majority in 2024. They’re laser-focused on defeating vulnerable Democrats like Tammy so that they can advance their far-right agenda and hand the keys to the GOP’s most extreme wing. **Tammy’s the last line of defense against a Republican Senate takeover, and she needs your help to hold the line.** **[Will you add in a donation to Tammy’s reelection campaign today? It’s going to take all of our efforts to overcome the Senate GOP’s fundraising surge, keep Wisconsin blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231204_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1645%2E35263%2ECXJtn0)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-dec23.4hRD_b&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231204_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1645%2E35263%2ECXJtn0)

name: Jon Favreau
subject: Let’s not forget…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Pennsylvania is as competitive as can be
Hi Peter, it’s Jon Favreau.
I wouldn’t exactly say I’m calm about 2024.
Mitch McConnell is trying to take back the Senate, and if he does, Republicans will cut Social Security and Medicare, pack the courts with extreme right-wing judges, and make it harder to vote.
The only way we can stop them is by protecting Democratic incumbents like Bob Casey who aren’t afraid to stand up to Republican extremism.
[**Here’s what I know: the PA Senate race is going to be one of the country’s most expensive and competitive, and we need to do everything we can to make sure Bob Casey wins. Is there anything you can give to Bob’s campaign right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231204-2?refcode=em20231204-2&refcode2=1291_552475_FKYBCM&akid=1291%2E552475%2EFKYBCM)
Let’s not forget that in 2016, Donald Trump won the state by just over 40,000 votes.
Yes, PA has had some big victories since then, but it’s also seen razor-thin margins in swing counties and a fight to turn out voters in Democratic hubs like Philadelphia.
**Pennsylvania is as competitive as it gets, and with the Senate majority and the White House depending on it, we can’t take anything for granted.**
If we’re going to protect our Democratic Senate majority, our coalition to re-elect Bob Casey in 2024 has to be even bigger and better than PA saw in 2020 and 2022. It won’t be easy, but it’s what we have to do to win, and I know it’s possible.
**[Will you chip in whatever you can to Bob’s campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231204-2?refcode=em20231204-2&refcode2=1291_552475_FKYBCM&akid=1291%2E552475%2EFKYBCM)**
[Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231204-2?amount=250&refcode=em20231204-2-el&refcode2=1291_552475_FKYBCM&akid=1291%2E552475%2EFKYBCM) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231204-2?amount=100&refcode=em20231204-2-el&refcode2=1291_552475_FKYBCM&akid=1291%2E552475%2EFKYBCM) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231204-2?amount=50&refcode=em20231204-2-el&refcode2=1291_552475_FKYBCM&akid=1291%2E552475%2EFKYBCM) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231204-2?amount=25&refcode=em20231204-2-el&refcode2=1291_552475_FKYBCM&akid=1291%2E552475%2EFKYBCM) [Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231204-2?amount=15&refcode=em20231204-2-el&refcode2=1291_552475_FKYBCM&akid=1291%2E552475%2EFKYBCM) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231204-2?refcode=em20231204-2&refcode2=1291_552475_FKYBCM&akid=1291%2E552475%2EFKYBCM)
---
Thanks,
Jon
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231204-2?refcode=em20231204-2&refcode2=1291_552475_FKYBCM&akid=1291%2E552475%2EFKYBCM)
Jon Favreau
Co-host of Pod Save America
Former Speechwriter to President Obama
